Android.name: 仿生人 Android
Android.text:
安卓体几乎能在任何环境中茁壮生存，并作为无数文化的一部分而存在，这意味着你几乎可以在银河系的任何地方发现他们。许多安卓体对自己的起源充满好奇，独自或与他人同行，寻找关于自身身份以及更宏大宇宙的各种形而上与物质问题的答案。安卓体多种多样，尽管他们是被制造出来的，但几乎没有两个个体拥有完全相同的外貌。

如果你想扮演一名踏上自我探索之旅的合成人角色，你就该选择安卓体。

你也许会……

  • 尽量避免他人利用你。
  • 试图理解自己在更广阔银河中的目的。
  • 根据他人如何对待服务业人员、蓝领劳动者、粉丝或宠物来评价他们。

其他人可能会……

  • 难以辨析你的情绪，或难以理解你何时在表达情绪。
  • 暗中羡慕你不会衰老。
  • 因他们的祖先曾将你的物种当作劳工使用，而怀有某种程度的愧疚。

外貌描述

安卓体是生物机械构造体，通常看起来像带有发光电路的人形生物。大多数安卓体诞生于称为铸厂的专门孕育场所。较早期的安卓体变种，例如戈拉里昂上的安卓体，主要是生物性的；而现代的安卓体通常会在身体中融入更多科技组件与合成元素。安卓体需要进食和睡眠，但他们不会繁殖，不会衰老，也没有与生俱来的性别概念——不过许多个体会表达出类人性别认同，或在其间流动变化。大多数安卓体会在大约一个世纪后自愿释放自己的身体，让新的灵魂入住其中，这一过程被称为重续。

社群

安卓体在造访新地点、结识新朋友时往往较为谨慎。一旦感到自在，安卓体就能建立紧密的友谊与亲属纽带，接纳自组家庭，并将整个街区与社群选作自己的家，而不是把自己局限在墙壁划定的边界之内。安卓体常常会不遗余力地帮助彼此，以及他们自己选择的家庭与社群。大多数安卓体也不愿摧毁另一个安卓体的身体，因为他们知道，这样做结束的不仅是一条生命，还会抹去未来原本可能入住那具身体的无数灵魂。

示例姓名

Asha, Blue-17, Celita, Daniv, Emene-3, Era- 4, Flick, Garro, Historia-6, Hope-1, Iseph, Melody, Naga, Olas, Omen, Prime, Ruby-17, Stringer, Twenty Six, Urdun, Verity-3, Yose

信仰

安卓体持有各种不同的宗教与哲学观点，而个体有时会在数十年的生活经历中积累起一套信念与实践。由于与精灵及其他长寿物种有着相似的视角，安卓体看待现实的方式往往与短命种族不同。许多安卓体在追求目标时很有耐心，并可能制定横跨数十年乃至数百年的计划，希望自己届时仍活着，能够见证结果。那些自愿迈向自身循环下一阶段的年长安卓体，有时会将自己的目标遗赠给下一位入住其身体的灵魂。

常见典范

探寻你的起源，帮助他人实现长期目标，为未来做规划

常见禁忌

从事鲁莽或自我毁灭的行为

安卓体机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 敏捷、智力、自由

属性缺陷 魅力

语言 通用语

额外语言 数量等于 1 + 你的智力调整值（如果它为正值）。从通用语言列表，以及你能够接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你家乡世界中通行的语言）。

特质

  • 安卓体
  • 类人生物

感官 微光视觉

构装体躯壳

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.mnhmhOKWLiOD0lev inline]

安卓体传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.yp5O0Z97KtL0vlsZ]{Artificial Scion Android}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.C1E7FVWq1A9vmeeG]{Mod Fanatic Android}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.wHGhjTqNvsaAMJHM]{Networked Android}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.oyxtHoW8wUWnYzTO]{Renewed Android}

Androids thrive in nearly any environment and exist as part of countless cultures, meaning they can be found almost anywhere in the galaxy. Many androids are curious about their origins, traveling alone or with others in search of answers to a variety of metaphysical and material questions about their identities and the greater cosmos. Androids are diverse, with few individuals sharing the exact same appearance, despite their manufactured state.

If you want to roleplay a synthetic character on a journey of self-discovery, you should play an android.

You Might...

  • Try to avoid others taking advantage of you.
  • Seek to understand your purpose in the wider galaxy.
  • Judge others based on how they treat service workers, blue-collar laborers, fans, or pets.

Others Probably...

  • Have trouble parsing your emotions or understanding when you express them.
  • Secretly covet your lack of aging.
  • Have some level of guilt for their ancestors' use of your species as laborers.

Physical Description

Androids are biomechanical constructs who typically resemble humanoids with glowing circuitry. Most were created in specialized birthing sites called foundries. Older variants of androids, such as androids on Golarion, were primarily biological, but androids in the modern era usually incorporate more technological components and synthetic elements into their bodies. Androids need to eat and sleep, but they don't reproduce, don't age, and have no innate concept of gender—though many express humanoid gender identities or shift fluidly between them. Most androids voluntarily release their bodies after a century or so, allowing new souls to inhabit them in a process called renewal.

Society

Androids tend to be cautious when visiting new places and meeting new people. Once comfortable, androids can form tight bonds of friendship and kinship, adopting found families, and choosing entire neighborhoods and communities as their home, rather than remaining confined by the boundaries formed by walls. Androids often go out of their way to help one another and their chosen families and communities, and most hesitate to destroy the body of another android, knowing that to do so ends not only one life, but erases the countless other souls who could one day inhabit that body.

Sample Names

Asha, Blue-17, Celita, Daniv, Emene-3, Era- 4, Flick, Garro, Historia-6, Hope-1, Iseph, Melody, Naga, Olas, Omen, Prime, Ruby-17, Stringer, Twenty Six, Urdun, Verity-3, Yose

Beliefs

Androids hold a variety of religious and philosophical views, with individuals sometimes collecting beliefs and practices through decades of lived experiences. With a similar perspective to elves and other long-lived species, androids tend to view reality differently than beings with shorter lifespans. Many androids are patient in achieving their goals and might create plans that span decades or centuries, hoping they will be alive to experience the results. Elder androids who voluntarily pass on to the next part of their cycle sometimes bequeath their goals to the next soul to inhabit their body.

Popular Edicts

discover your origins, help others achieve long-term goals, plan for the future

Popular Anathema

engage in reckless or self-destructive behavior

Android Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Dexterity, Intelligence, Free

Attribute Flaw Charisma

Languages Common

Additional languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose, from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have, access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • android
  • humanoid

Senses Low-Light Vision

Constructed

Barathu.name: 飞螅族 Barathu
Barathu.text:
飞螅族是漂浮的异怪生物，能够毫不费力地编辑自身的基因代码，并彼此融合成无数怪异而美丽的形态。早期阶段的飞螅族往往更具个人主义倾向，热衷于学习其他文化；而更有经验的飞螅族则会发展出流动的自我认知，并寻求在更深层次上与他者共鸣。梦行者会退隐到一种只有他们自己能够体验的超然现实之中。

如果你想要扮演一名拥有异星思维、能够适应任何处境的角色，你就应该选择飞螅族。

你也许会……

  • 享受新体验，并热切地适应新观念。
  • 根据环境或处境频繁进化自己的身体。
  • 与你的同伴融合，或复制他们的基因结构来了解他们。

其他人可能会……

  • 对你独特的身体构造感到着迷。
  • 钦佩你的适应能力。
  • 因为你经常改变外貌而难以认出你。

外貌描述

普通飞螅族拥有漂浮的、飞艇般的身体，其上垂挂着色彩鲜艳的触须和肢体。他们的身体反映了他们对自我的个人想象，而他们也能在一定程度上控制其外在呈现。由于飞螅族经常在基因层面改变自己的身体，一名飞螅族在一生中可能会经历数十次独特的进化。飞螅族在融合后会将自己塑造成更庞大、更奇幻的形态。飞螅族聚合体可能看起来像巨大的水母、盛开的软泥之花，或一群彩虹云鳐。

社群

大多数飞螅族都有一种流动的自我认知。在早期阶段，年轻的飞螅族常常从其他文化中汲取灵感，展现出更强的个人主义倾向；随后，随着他们获得经验并与他者融合，这种世界观会逐渐趋于平衡。飞螅族可以与其他飞螅族融合成一种被称为“聚合体”的复合生命。飞螅族聚合体并非只是其各部分的总和，而是由融合创造出的全新身份与世界观。重新分裂回各自个体部分的飞螅族聚合体成员，只能模糊地回忆起自己作为聚合体时的经历，有些人将这种感觉形容为观看一卷全息影像。尽管年轻的飞螅族往往会觉得这种经历令人不安，大多数年长的飞螅族都会花时间与聚合体共处。随着年岁增长，他们的身体与记忆开始衰退，许多飞螅族会选择永久融入某个聚合体，放下个体自我，加入更伟大的意识与存在。

示例名称

飞螅族的名字会在他们融合及再度分裂回组成部分时发生变化。许多早期阶段的飞螅族会自行选择名字，挑选那些能与自己产生共鸣的概念词汇，或创造出他们觉得悦耳的声音组合。一些飞螅族名字包括 Ataraxia、Breeze、Bubble in Flight、Dololola、Gleelee、Harmony of Many、Ixeelu、Lilting Song、Sigh、Tenfold Storm、Unity of Purpose、Vortex、Wonder Among Iridescent Clouds、Xonswe 和 Y。

信仰

许多飞螅族认同欧拉斯，并选择探索他的信仰，将自身不断进化视作他从细胞成长为神祇之旅的映照。那些探索过利亚瓦拉并体验过其太空之歌的飞螅族，也拥有属于自己的信仰；他们以连其他所有人都无法理解、唯有其他梦行者才能领会的歌声分享这些信念。飞螅族的世界观与宗教会随着其一生不断变化，因为他们会与他者融合，并从字面意义上扩展自己的心智。

常见典范

适应新处境，将身体改变成你选择的形状，齐心协力解决问题

常见禁忌

独自处理问题

飞螅族机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 5 尺（悬浮）；飞行 20 尺

属性提升 体质、感知、自由

属性缺陷 敏捷

语言 布雷斯语、通用语

额外语言 等于你的智力调整值（如果为正值）。从通用语言列表以及你能够接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你母星上通行的语言）。

特性

  • 异怪
  • 飞螅族

基因适应

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.83O5vLT0CiahoOds inline]

有限心灵感应

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.N9EDgQPjWcSS6rSb inline]

飞螅族传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.IKJwTaMRnPIio4jH]{制造者飞螅族}

Barathus are floating, aberrant beings who effortlessly edit their own genetic code and merge together into countless bizarre and beautiful configurations. Early-stage barathus tend to be individualistic and gravitate toward learning about other cultures, while more experienced barathus develop a fluid sense of self and seek communion with others on a deeper level. Dreamers retreat to a transcendent reality only they can experience

If you want a character with an alien mindset who adapts to any situation, you should play a barathu.

You Might...

  • Enjoy new experiences and eagerly adapt to new ideas.
  • Evolve your body frequently based on the environment or situation.
  • Merge with your companions or copy their genetic structure to learn about them.

Others Probably...

  • Are intrigued by your unique anatomy.
  • Admire your adaptability.
  • Struggle to recognize you because of your frequently changing appearance.

Physical Description

The average barathu has a floating, blimp-like body with colorful tentacles and limbs dangling from it. Their bodies reflect their personal vision of themselves, and they maintain some control of its presentation. Since barathus frequently change their bodies at a genetic level, a barathu might experience dozens of unique evolutions over the course of their lifetime. Barathus mold themselves into larger, more fantastical forms after merging. Barathu conglomerates might appear as gigantic jellyfish, blooming ooze-flowers, or a flock of rainbow cloud rays.

Society

Most barathus have a fluid sense of self. In their early stage, young barathus often take inspiration from other cultures and exhibit more individualistic tendencies, then temper this worldview as they gain experience and merge with others. A barathu can merge with other barathus into a compound being called a conglomerate. A barathu conglomerate is greater than the sum of its parts, with an entirely new identity and worldview created by the fusion. Barathu conglomerates who split back into their individual parts recall only hazy memories from their time within the conglomerate, described by some as watching a holovid reel. While young barathus tend to find the experience disconcerting, most older barathus spend time with conglomerates. As their bodies and memories begin to fade with age, many barathus choose to merge permanently with a conglomerate, letting go of their individual self to join a greater consciousness and being.

Sample Names

Barathu names change when they merge and split back into their component parts. Many early stage barathus choose their own names, selecting words for concepts that resonate with them or creating combinations of sounds they find pleasing. Some barathu names include Ataraxia, Breeze, Bubble in Flight, Dololola, Gleelee, Harmony of Many, Ixeelu, Lilting Song, Sigh, Tenfold Storm, Unity of Purpose, Vortex, Wonder Among Iridescent Clouds, Xonswe, and Y.

Beliefs

Many barathus identify with Oras and choose to explore his faith, seeing their own constant evolution as a mirror of his journey from cell to god. Barathus who explored Liavara and experienced its cosmic song have their own beliefs, which they share in songs unfathomable to everyone except other Dreamers. A barathu's worldview and religion shift throughout their lifetime as they merge with others and literally expand their mind.

Popular Edicts

adapt to new situations, change your body into the shape you choose, work together to solve problems

Popular Anathema

tackle problems on your own

Barathu Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 5 Feet (Hover); Fly 20 Feet

Attribute Boosts Constitution, Wisdom, Free

Attribute Flaw Dexterity

Languages Brethedan, Common

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence, modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list, of common languages and any other languages, to which you have access (such as the languages, prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • aberration
  • barathu

Genetic Adaptation

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.83O5vLT0CiahoOds inline]

Limited Telepathy

Human.name: 人类 Human
Human.text:
人类的野心在群星之间建立了诸多帝国。协约世界中有许多人类居民，而阿兹兰特星际帝国的扩张则展现了人类成长更为阴暗的一面。尽管阿兹兰特星际帝国被视为压迫的堡垒，但由人类在银河各处建立的多元且包容的社群依然数不胜数。人类曾参与建立已知宇宙中最著名的港口：艾巴萨罗姆空间站。无论动机为何，人类都能在城市蔓延区与最偏远的银河边疆蓬勃发展。

如果你想扮演一个适应力强、几乎能成为什么都行的角色，你就该选择人类。

你可能会……

  • 努力成就伟业，无论是为了个人利益还是为了某项事业。
  • 渴望探索并体验宇宙。
  • 珍视你与家人和朋友之间的关系。

其他人大概会……

  • 尊重你的灵活性以及通常较为开放的心态。
  • 不信任你的动机，担心你追求的只有权力或财富。
  • 不太确定该对你抱有什么预期，因此不愿贸然揣测你的意图。

外貌特征

人类的身体特征会因其血统和母星而有所不同。人类拥有极其丰富的肤色、发色、体型和面部特征。有些环境会塑造出独特的人类外貌，例如生活在阿基顿、拥有深红色皮肤的希尔基人人类。许多人类喜欢通过染发、在皮肤上刺青或制造疤痕、用身体艺术与装饰性服饰打扮自己，以及安装植入体来改变自己的外表。

社群

人类社群就和他们繁衍生息的世界一样多种多样。阿兹兰特星际帝国试图通过孤立并理想化失落的戈拉里昂上一种古代文化，来重现一个想象中的辉煌时代；而大多数人类群体则与其他物种在多元的社群中共存。即便彼此只相距几英里的人类聚居地，也可能拥有截然不同的治理风格和社会规范。尽管生活方式和观点千差万别，人类仍具备适应力与野心，正是这些特质驱使他们探索未知、开创自己的未来，并在无数星球上定居；他们或者融入外星社群，或者在遥远世界上建立属于自己的社群与聚居地，创造自己的生活。

在协约世界所有常见祖裔之中，人类或许是受大断层影响最严重的。由于戈拉里昂的消失，人类留下的证据相对稀少，难以据此推究并重建自身社群。尽管艾巴萨罗姆空间站以及其他拥有大量人类人口的世界保有与人类远古历史相关的文献，但这些内容对现代人类社群究竟有多大意义，仍是一个争论激烈的话题。

示例名称

Akif, Alezandaru, Amare, Baolo, Belor, Darilian, Hadzi, Hai Minh, Hiriko, Iolana, Jokug, Korva, Morvius, Navasi, Pao, Pasara, Raziya, Revhi, Sahba, Seoni, Sephia, Signe, Valeros, Valki, Yon, Zemir

信念

人类往往相信自己所建立的体制，许多人遵循协约的理念，或遵守其他地区或组织的法律，例如阿兹兰特星际帝国或自由船长。也有许多人紧紧依附于信仰、哲学或宗教，从这些思想与精神支柱中获得信心、明晰与慰藉。由于人类乐于拥抱变化，总会有人类通过挑战由来已久的信念或法律来反抗社会规范。这些理念，无论属于社会、思想还是精神层面，常常都会成为推动人类行为与野心的动力，或为其提供正当理由。

常见典范

投身于更伟大的事业，探索宇宙，追求卓越

常见禁忌

浪费你仅有的短暂时间

人类机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 两项自由属性增强

语言 通用语

额外语言 数量等于 1 + 你的智力调整值（若其为正值）。从常见语言列表中选择，并可选择你能够接触到的任何其他语言（例如你母星上流行的语言）。

特征

  • 人类
  • 类人生物

人类传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.zVf0Hlp5xG0Q7kmc]{熟练人类}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.mLPafbWvDDwKK7U4]{都市人类}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.hFBwsVcSnNCJoimo]{多才人类}

Human ambition has created empires throughout the stars. The Pact Worlds have many human residents, while the expansion of the Azlanti Star Empire presents a more sinister expression of humanity's growth. Though the Azlanti Star Empire is considered a bastion of oppression, there are countless diverse and inclusive societies established by humanity across the galaxy. Humans played a role in founding the most famous port in the known cosmos: Absalom Station. Regardless of their motives, humans thrive in both urban sprawls and in the most remote galactic frontiers.

If you want an adaptable character who can become just about anything, you should play a human.

You Might...

  • Strive to achieve greatness, either for personal gain or on behalf of a cause.
  • Yearn to explore and experience the cosmos.
  • Cherish your relationships with family and friends.

Others Probably...

  • Respect your flexibility and usual open-mindedness.
  • Distrust your motivations, fearing you seek only power or wealth.
  • Aren't sure what to expect from you and are hesitant to assume your intentions.

Physical Description

Humans' physical characteristics vary based on their lineage and home world. Humans have a wide variety of skin and hair colors, body types, and facial features. Some environments produce distinct human appearances, such as crimson-skinned hylki humans living on Akiton. Many humans enjoy altering their appearances by dyeing their hair, tattooing or scarring their skin, adorning themselves with body art and decorative garments, and installing augmentations.

Society

Human societies are as varied as the worlds they thrive on. While the Azlanti Star Empire seeks to recapture an imagined era of glory by isolating and idealizing an ancient culture from lost Golarion, most human groups coexist with other species in diverse communities. Human settlements just a few miles apart might have wildly different governmental styles and social norms. Despite their diverse lifestyles and outlooks, humans are adaptive and ambitious traits that have driven them to explore the unknown, forge their own futures, and settle on countless planets, creating lives for themselves by either integrating into alien societies or creating communities and settlements on distant worlds.

Of all the common ancestries in the Pact Worlds, humans were perhaps the hardest hit by the Gap. Due to Golarion's disappearance, humans were left with relatively little evidence with which to puzzle out and reconstruct their society. While Absalom Station and other worlds with large human populations contain documents related to the ancient history of humanity, how much relevance this should have to modern human society is a hotly debated topic.

Sample Names

Akif, Alezandaru, Amare, Baolo, Belor, Darilian, Hadzi, Hai Minh, Hiriko, Iolana, Jokug, Korva, Morvius, Navasi, Pao, Pasara, Raziya, Revhi, Sahba, Seoni, Sephia, Signe, Valeros, Valki, Yon, Zemir

Beliefs

Humans often believe in the structures they've established, and many adhere to the ideals of the Pact or follow the laws of other regions or organizations, like the Azlanti Star Empire or the Free Captains. Many also cleave tightly to faith, philosophy, or religion, finding in these intellectual and spiritual touchstones confidence, clarity, and comfort. Since humanity eagerly embraces change, there are always humans who oppose societal norms by challenging long-standing beliefs or laws. These ideals, whether societal, intellectual, or spiritual, are often used as a driving force or justification for a human's behavior and ambitions.

Popular Edicts

devote yourself to a greater cause, explore the cosmos, strive for greatness

Popular Anathema

waste what little time you have

Human Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Two free attribute, boosts

Languages Common

Additional languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent in your home world).

Traits

  • human
  • humanoid

Human Heritages

Kasatha.name: 卡萨塔 Kasatha
Kasatha.text:
卡萨斯人最初来自沙漠行星卡萨斯——一颗环绕红巨星运行、注定毁灭的世界。在被称为大断层的失落历史时期结束后不久，卡萨斯领袖们意识到他们的星球正在走向死亡，于是制订了离开卡萨斯、前往协约星系中那颗名为阿基顿的遥远红色世界定居的计划。数个世纪后，他们乘坐世界舰伊达里号抵达时，却发现那里早已是一颗繁荣兴盛、并有无数其他物种居住的星球。大多数卡萨斯人决定继续留在伊达里号上，另一些则和平移居到协约世界的众多行星上；他们的科学与形而上学知识，成为这个多元恒星系广受欢迎的新补充。如今，卡萨斯人遍布协约世界，甚至也出现在若干近宇星系之中。

如果你想扮演一名追求平衡与和谐的角色，你就该选择卡萨斯人。

你也许会……

  • 努力维持你与他人之间、以及各种太空力量之间的平衡与和谐。
  • 觉得传统武器比现代军械更为光荣。
  • 在公共场合用围巾或面具遮住自己的嘴。

其他人多半会……

  • 认为你对传统的尊重使你对物质宇宙抱持僵化的看法。
  • 向你寻求建议，并期待你提供指引与智慧。
  • 把你对个人尊严的重视视为精英主义的表现。

外貌描述

卡萨斯人是类人生物，拥有灰色皮肤、四条手臂和纯黑色的眼睛。他们的头骨细长，并向颈后延伸，使其高挑的身形更显突出。由于是在一颗巨型世界上演化出来、以适应迁徙求生，许多卡萨斯人都拥有精瘦的身躯与厚实的肌肉，这让他们虽然外表修长，却依然十分强壮。

许多卡萨斯人偏好穿着宽松、分层的服装，用来遮掩自己多条手臂以及手中所持之物。

社群

卡萨斯文化重视稳定与平衡，尊崇荣誉、传统，以及遵守并尊重个人训令与禁忌的重要性。大多数卡萨斯人组成母系、游牧的氏族与分支氏族，并被组织进一个复杂的大家族网络之中。尽管每个大家族都有自己的一套风俗与传统，但共同的文化核心包括：除最亲密的同伴外，不向他人显露口部；相信使用近战武器作战更具荣誉；以及被称为“淬炼”的成年仪式时期——这通常会持续一年，不过对某些卡萨斯人来说可能更久。在淬炼期间，卡萨斯人会被鼓励去测试自身极限、向不同文化学习，并暂时放下家族习俗，以期通过亲身经历领悟稳定与传统的重要性。

虽然大多数卡萨斯人平时只使用名字中的首个部分，但许多人拥有由多达六个部分组成的全名，这些部分会指向其祖先、氏族，以及自己与卡萨斯诸大家族的连接。例如，一位正式全名为“巴拉苏尔·奈达林·阿拉尔，阿拉尔氏族暨霍尔达雷家族之人，千万思绪的守护者”的卡萨斯人，通常会将自己介绍为“巴拉苏尔”。

示例姓名

Altronus, Barasul, Ehu, Esar, Gorsen, Hadif, Jahir, Kala, Khsutil, Maeda, Metweska, Ninura, Remu, Senesel, Tolar, Umana, Voloteo, Zye

信念

卡萨斯文化高度重视习俗与祖先传统，但每位卡萨斯人都会遵循自己独特的一套传统，将氏族仪式与自己在人生经历中发展出的习惯结合起来。这种传统与习俗的不断累积，常常会促使年长的卡萨斯人每天花时间追忆并缅怀过去。

常见训令

在公共场合遮住嘴，建立属于自己的习俗，尊重你的传统，维持平衡

常见禁忌

不尊重或轻视他人的传统，不尊重长者

卡萨斯人机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 力量、感知、自由

属性缺陷 魅力

语言 通用语、卡萨斯语、你自选的一种地区语言

额外语言 数量等于你的智力调整值（如果它为正值）。从常见语言列表和你能够接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你母星上通行的语言）。

特征

  • 类人生物
  • 卡萨斯人

四臂

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.jwBbIr07dlAfrow8 inline]

卡萨斯人传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.P8x1XiN52lgbgzB0]{船生卡萨斯人}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.JiQwHacgrrb6qUqA]{星际游民卡萨斯人}

Kasathas are originally from the desert planet of Kasath, a doomed world orbiting a red giant. Shortly after the period of lost history known as the Gap, kasatha leaders realized their planet was dying and made a plan to leave Kasath and settle on the distant red world in the Pact System known as Akiton. Centuries later, they arrived aboard the worldship Idari to find a thriving planet already inhabited by multitudes of other species. Most kasathas decided to stay on board the Idari, while others peacefully emigrated to the many planets of the Pact Worlds, where their scientific and metaphysical knowledge are welcomed additions to the diverse star system. Today, kasathas are found throughout the Pact Worlds and even in several Near Space systems.

If you want a character who strives for balance and harmony, you should play a kasatha.

You Might...

  • Seek to maintain balance and harmony between yourself and others, as well as among cosmic forces.
  • Find traditional weaponry to be more honorable than modern munitions.
  • Keep your mouth hidden with a scarf or mask while in public.

Others Probably...

  • Assume your respect for tradition gives you an inflexible view of the universe.
  • Go to you for advice and expect you to provide guidance and wisdom.
  • Take your prioritization of personal dignity as a sign of elitism.

Physical Description

Kasathas are humanoids with gray skin, four arms, and pure black eyes. They have an elongated skull that extends behind their neck, further accentuating their tall frames. After evolving to survive migrations on a massive world, many kasathas have wiry bodies with thick musculature that makes them strong despite their lanky appearance.

Many kasathas prefer wearing baggy, layered clothing that conceals their multiple arms and what they're wielding.

Society

Kasathan culture prioritizes stability and balance, with a respect for honor, tradition, and the importance of upholding and respecting one's edicts and anathemas. Most kasathas form matriarchal and nomadic clans and subclans organized into a complex myriad of Great Families. While each Great Family has its own set of customs and traditions, common staples include concealing one's mouth from all but your most intimate companions, a belief in the honor of fighting with melee weapons, and a coming-of-age period known as the Tempering, a traditionally yearlong period that could last longer for some kasathas. During their Tempering, a kasatha is encouraged to test their limits, learn from different cultures, and forgo familial customs in the hopes of learning firsthand the importance of stability and tradition.

While most kasathas go by their first name, many have a full name consisting of up to half a dozen elements referring to one's ancestors, clan, and connection to the Great Families of Kasath. For example, a kasatha properly named Barasul Naedarin Allar of Clan Allar and House Holdare, Keeper of Ten Million Thoughts would likely introduce themself as Barasul.

Sample Names

Altronus, Barasul, Ehu, Esar, Gorsen, Hadif, Jahir, Kala, Khsutil, Maeda, Metweska, Ninura, Remu, Senesel, Tolar, Umana, Voloteo, Zye

Beliefs

Kasathan cultures hold custom and ancestral tradition in high regard, but each kasatha follows their own unique set of traditions, combining the rituals of their clan with those they develop through life experience. This accumulation of traditions and customs often inspires older kasathas to spend time remembering and honoring the past daily.

Popular Edicts

cover your mouth in public, establish your own customs, honor your traditions, maintain balance

Popular Anathema

disrespect or belittle the traditions of others, disrespect your elders

Kasatha Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Strength, Wisdom, Free

Attribute Flaw Charisma

Languages Common, Kasatha, One regional language of your choice

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent in your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • kasatha

Four-Armed

Lashunta.name: 拉申塔人 Lashunta
Lashunta.text:
拉申塔人是天生的灵能者，拥有适应性基因，并且传统上会在青春期发育为两种传承之一：达玛亚或科拉沙。她们以富有魅力、目标坚定、善于自省而享有盛名，并始终怀有成长的渴望——无论是个人 advancement 还是自我提升。这样一种认识自我、接纳自身长处、超越过往成就并不断追求更高目标的文化推动力，使拉申塔人重视教育、专注与训练，也促使她们探索新的发现、技术与思维方式。尽管如今仍有许多拉申塔人履行着开明战士或杰出学者的传统角色，但时间与不断变化的社会规范已赋予拉申塔人以无数方式开辟新道路的自由，去发展她们自己的兴趣、爱好与基因表达，而不受其传承或社会地位的限制。

如果你想扮演一名追求自我提升并拥有天生灵能能力的角色，你就应该选择扮演一名拉申塔人。

你也许会……

  • 不断通过练习技能和磨炼自身力量来提升自己。
  • 如果你是达玛亚，会优先重视学习与外交；如果你是科拉沙，则会优先重视体魄与战术才能——如果你是无缚拉申塔人，你则可能有不同的优先事项。
  • 对自己要求远高于你对他人的要求。

其他人多半会……

  • 觉得你是个完美主义者，并认为你对自我提升的追求令人厌烦。
  • 不信任你的灵能能力，担心你会读取他们的思想。
  • 基于你的基因表达来理想化你，或给你贴上标签。

外貌描述

达玛亚通常身材高挑、举止优雅、五官精致，传统上常被引导去从事艺术或智识追求以及政治职业。科拉沙则更矮一些，肌肉更发达，并倾向于投身军旅、体力劳动和战时领导。无论属于何种传承，所有拉申塔人额头上都有短短的触角，用以聚焦她们的心灵感应能力，同时还拥有每个人各不相同的彩色突起与面部纹记。拉申塔人会分泌信息素，以微妙的方式传达自己的情绪，而其他族裔可能会觉得这种效果迷人或令人不安。

在青春期前后，拉申塔人传统上会选择表达达玛亚或科拉沙的基因——这一决定将确定她们的身体发育，并影响她们可能承担的社会角色。拉申塔人通过灵能仪式与基因疗法相结合的方式实现这一选择。如今，许多年轻的拉申塔人选择走上自己的道路并放弃这一选择，转而成为“无缚者”。无缚拉申塔人反抗传统角色与标签，她们可能表现出这两类群体中双方共有的特征与天生倾向，也可能两者都不具备。另有一个日益壮大的少数群体，则主张进一步推动基因多样化，并试图表达独特或长期埋没的基因变体，开创全新的自选传承。这样的实验最终是否会卓有成效，仍有待观察。

社群

自远古以来，拉申塔人一直居住在卡斯卓韦海岸与荒野之间那些绵延广阔、风景如画的城市中。卡斯卓韦是一颗郁郁葱葱的丛林世界，遍布危险的掠食者和极端天气。这些独立聚落受到强大军武阶层的灵能战士、科技防御设施和魔法反制手段的保护。其中最具代表性的士兵是修塔拉舒骑兵，这些轻甲骑手会与（并因此以之命名）建立心灵感应纽带

示例名称

拉申塔人的命名习惯常常采用音调元素。以下是一些拉申塔人的名字示例：Domash、Hesori、Imaaz、Kima、Kopalo、Maenala、Nomae、Oraeus、Raia、Shess、Soryn、Stretto、Taeon 和 Varikuara。

信念

拉申塔文化重视教育、自我提升以及社群防卫。有宗教信仰的拉申塔人往往认同那些鼓励平衡、知识、冥想实践与追求启迪的信仰，例如艾洛里图、伊布拉或雅蕾萨。另一些拉申塔人则完全摒弃宗教，转而接受诸如循环或绿之信仰这样的哲学、尊崇某位国家领袖，或遵循历史悠久的社群传统。

常见典范

成为最好的自己，永不停止学习，每日锻炼你的心智或身体

常见禁忌

忽视你的目标，沉湎于失败

拉申塔人机制

生命值 6

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 魅力、自由

语言 卡斯卓韦语、通用语

额外语言 等于你的智力调整值（如果为正值）。从常见语言列表中选择，并可选择你能够接触到的任何其他语言（例如你母星上通行的语言）。

特征

  • 类人生物
  • 拉申塔人

有限心灵感应

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.N9EDgQPjWcSS6rSb inline]

拉申塔人传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.ymuI4UO22iMmobRh]{达玛亚拉申塔人}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.a5znSq93Wz22iQHP]{科拉沙拉申塔人}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.2TXiMFGXAL2aO6Ar]{无缚拉申塔人}

Lashuntas are natural psychics with adaptive genetics who traditionally develop into one of two heritages at puberty: damayas or korashas. They have a well-earned reputation for being charismatic, driven, and self-reflective, with a perpetual desire for growth—both in terms of personal advancement and self-improvement. This cultural push to know oneself, embrace one's strengths, surpass one's past successes, and strive for ever- greater goals drives lashuntas to value education, focus, and training as well as to explore new discoveries, technologies, and modes of thought. While many lashuntas today still fulfill the traditional role of the enlightened warrior or the consummate scholar, time and shifting social norms have gifted lashuntas the freedom to branch out in countless ways, developing their own interests, hobbies, and genetic expressions, with no regard to their heritage or societal standing.

If you want to play a character who strives for self- improvement and has innate psychic abilities, you should play a lashunta.

You Might...

  • Constantly strive to improve yourself through practicing skills and honing your powers.
  • Prioritize learning and diplomacy if you're a damaya, or physique and tactical prowess if you're a korasha—or if you're an unbound lashunta, you have different priorities.
  • Hold yourself to a much higher standard than you apply to others.

Others Probably...

  • Think you're a perfectionist and find your pursuit of self-improvement tiresome.
  • Distrust your psychic abilities, fearing you'll read their minds.
  • Idealize or label you based on your genetic expression.

Physical Description

Damayas tend to be tall and graceful with delicate features and are traditionally pushed toward artistic or intellectual pursuits and political occupations. Korashas are shorter, more muscular, and gravitate toward military service, manual labor, and wartime leadership. Regardless of heritage, all lashuntas have short forehead antennae that focus their telepathy, with colorful bumps and facial markings unique to each individual. Lashuntas produce pheromones that subtly broadcast their moods in ways that other ancestries might find alluring or unnerving.

Around puberty, lashuntas traditionally choose whether to express damaya or korasha genetics—a decision that determines their physical development and influences their potential societal roles. Lashuntas achieve their choice through a combination of psychic rituals and gene therapy. Today, many young lashuntas have chosen to tread their own path and abstain from this choice, instead becoming “unbound.” Unbound lashuntas defy traditional roles and labels, and they might express traits and innate proclivities common to both of or neither of these groups. A growing minority of lashuntas instead pushes for further genetic diversification and aims to express unique or long-buried genetic permutations, pioneering entirely new chosen heritages. Whether such experimentation will prove fruitful remains to be seen.

Society

Since time immemorial, lashuntas have dwelled in sprawling, picturesque cities along the shores and wildlands of Castrovel, a lush jungle world teeming with dangerous predators and extreme weather. These independent settlements are protected by a mighty military caste of psychic warriors, technological defenses, and magical countermeasures. The most iconic of these soldiers are the shotalashu cavalry, lightly armored riders who form telepathic bonds with (and take their name from)

Sample Names

Lashunta naming conventions often use tonal elements. Some sample lashunta names are Domash, Hesori, Imaaz, Kima, Kopalo, Maenala, Nomae, Oraeus, Raia, Shess, Soryn, Stretto, Taeon, and Varikuara.

Beliefs

Lashunta cultures value education, self-improvement, and community defense. Religious lashuntas tend to identify with faiths that encourage balance, knowledge, meditative practice, and seeking enlightenment, such as Eloritu, Ibra, or Yaraesa. Other lashuntas shun religion entirely in favor of adopting a philosophy like the Cycle or the Green Faith, honoring a state leader, or following historic community traditions.

Popular Edicts

become the best version of yourself, never stop learning, train your mind or body daily

Popular Anathema

neglect your goals, wallow in failure

Lashunta Mechanics

Hit Points 6

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Charisma, Free

Languages Castrovelian, Common

Pahtra.name: 帕赫特拉 Pahtra
Pahtra.text:
帕赫特拉人进化自一颗名为普洛尼斯的低重力丛林星球，他们曾在那里为摆脱维斯卡里姆征服者而进行了一场漫长的独立战争。直到最近，帕赫特拉自由战士击败了最后的维斯卡里姆占领者，随后投票决定以主权星球的身份加入协约世界。如今，普洛尼斯是一颗植被繁茂、郁郁葱葱的世界，却饱受危险磁场风暴的肆虐，并留有维斯卡里姆残酷入侵造成的伤痕。为生存而进行的抗争影响了许多帕赫特拉传统，形成了一种崇尚竞技战争游戏、尊奉古老秘术并发展非正统科技的文化。在帕赫特拉文化中，音乐伴随一切活动，从流行娱乐到传统战术皆是如此，甚至武艺战斗也被归类为一种战舞。

如果你想扮演一名以优雅与风采为自由而战的角色，你就应该扮演一名帕赫特拉人。

你或许会……

  • 喜欢友好的竞争。
  • 是一位有天赋的表演者，或是对各种音乐与舞蹈流派颇有鉴赏力的文化爱好者。
  • 坚守祖先传承的传统，拒绝向残暴的暴君屈膝。

其他人可能会……

  • 认为你不擅长使用计算机、驾驶载具以及操作其他科技设备。
  • 嫉妒你的音乐天赋。
  • 以为你总是在找借口，好在战斗中证明自己。

身体描述

帕赫特拉人是覆盖着毛皮的猫科类人种族。他们的毛色包括黑色、白色、蓝色、三花、双色和虎斑，身上常有由不规则形状构成的独特花纹，而传统上先知会用这些花纹来占卜个体的潜能。他们的眼睛颜色遍及所有可见光谱中的色彩。典型的帕赫特拉人身高在6到7英尺之间，四肢修长，关节灵活。他们的生理特征具有很高的可变性，而离开普洛尼斯的家庭往往会发现，随着适应更高重力环境，他们的孩子会发育出更敦实、更强壮的身体。

帕赫特拉人的手脚都长有锋利牙齿般锐利的可折叠爪子。他们的口鼻部位分布着一组独特的感觉器官，其功能因个体而异。其中最常见的这类周边神经包括能够感知声音的谐波感应器官。

社群

帕赫特拉文化深受传统影响且高度好胜，个体彼此争夺认可与资源，这种竞争模仿了他们星球严酷的自然秩序。在维斯卡里姆入侵之前，普洛尼斯上的技术进步因这颗星球难以预测的磁场风暴而陷入停滞。即使在今天，普洛尼斯的技术发展仍主要集中于陶瓷、生物工程、化学和魔法。在脱离维斯卡里姆之后，普洛尼斯各城邦国家的居民以压倒性多数投票加入协约世界，而他们至今仍在适应这一新的政治归属。

大多数帕赫特拉人都是无性恋。多数人会与伴侣寻求充满爱意且相伴终生的关系，但在现代，很少有人决定养育孩子。帕赫特拉人每胎会生下六到八个孩子，并偏好社群式育儿，这样既能让父母保有各自的个体性，也能共同分担责任。

示例名称

传统的帕赫特拉名字包含由一位秘学者决定的吉祥要素。帕赫特拉名字包括 Cahnex、Dae、Fetenekku、Hafoumei、Ifset、Ihrasara、Jeviish、Khieper、Lealorn、Mahdran、Miiyu、Onharaf、Rishir、Sanna、Tendris、Teoshanhi、Vokuvi、Voyenrel 和 Zamahaii。

信仰

许多帕赫特拉人强烈执着于祖传的普洛尼斯传统，努力在承受维斯卡里姆数代压迫之后让自己的文化得以延续。普洛尼斯文化重视个人成就与从同侪中脱颖而出，并将一切存在视为一首宏大的歌曲，其中每个人、每件事和每个行动都在为自时间黎明开始的银河交响乐添上一笔。大多数帕赫特拉人乐于参与健康而富有成效的竞争，相信一个人的真正潜力只能在抗争中显现。若对遵守竞赛规则的对手暗中破坏或公然不敬，则是严重的冒犯，通常也会被视为软弱的表现。帕赫特拉人在面对不光彩的敌人时会对这套准则网开一面，例如来自技术先进的维斯卡里姆的入侵者。在这种情况下，任何形式的抗性都是可接受的，而使用下作战术则被视为对敌人不公平优势的明智反制。许多有宗教信仰的帕赫特拉人会向梅耶尔祈祷，这是一位在普洛尼斯受人崇敬的祖灵神祇，司掌舞蹈、音乐与战斗。

常见典范

挑战自己与盟友，每日演奏音乐和跳舞，为自己的成就感到自豪

常见禁忌

抛弃祖传传统，向暴君低头，放弃自己的身份

帕赫特拉机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 魅力、敏捷、自由

属性缺陷 体质

语言 通用语、帕赫特拉语、维斯克语

额外语言 数量等于你的智力调整值（如果为正值）。从常见语言列表以及你可接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你的母星上流行的语言）。

特质

  • 类人
  • 帕赫特拉

感官 黑暗视觉

帕赫特拉传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.KgekeGih8FTo36Sc]{猎手潜行者帕赫特拉}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.FGOV0tjruePwBpLM]{梅耶尔之选帕赫特拉}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.sVLbQ2yf5ITq4asR]{霜原行者帕赫特拉}

Pahtras evolved on a low-gravity jungle world called Pulonis, where they fought a long war for independence from their Veskarium conquerors. Recently, pahtra freedom fighters defeated the last Veskarium occupiers, then voted to join the Pact Worlds as a sovereign planet. Today, Pulonis is a lush, verdant world wracked by dangerous magnetic storms and scarred by the Veskarium's brutal invasion. The struggles of survival have influenced many pahtra traditions, leading to a culture of competitive war games, time-honored mysticism, and unorthodox technology. Music accompanies everything in pahtra culture, from popular entertainment to traditional battle tactics, with martial combat even categorized as a form of battle dance.

If you want to play a character who fights for freedom with grace and style, you should play a pahtra.

You Might...

  • Enjoy friendly competition.
  • Be a talented performer or cultured aficionado of a wide variety of music and dance genres.
  • Hold true to your ancestral traditions and refuse to kneel to cruel despots.

Others Probably...

  • Think you struggle with computers, vehicles, and other technology.
  • Envy your musical talent.
  • Assume you're looking for an excuse to prove yourself in a fight.

Physical Description

Pahtras are feline humanoids covered in fur. Their coats vary from black, white, blue, calico, bi-colored, and tabby, often possessing unique patterns of irregular shapes that seers traditionally use to divine an individual's potential. Their eyes vary across all colors of the visible spectrum. Typical pahtras stand between 6 and 7 feet tall, with elongated limbs and flexible joints. Their physiology is highly mutable, and families that leave Pulonis often find their children developing stockier and more muscular bodies as they adjust to higher gravity.

Pahtras have sharp teeth and retractable claws on their hands and feet. They have a unique set of sensory organs across their muzzles, with functions varying from individual to individual. The most common of these peripheral nerves include harmonic sensory apparatuses that can feel sound.

Society

Pahtra cultures are steeped in tradition and highly competitive, with individuals vying for recognition and resources in a struggle that mimics the harsh natural order of their planet. Before the Veskarium invasion, technological advancement on Pulonis stalled because of the world's unpredictable magnetic storms. Even today, Pulonian technological development focuses on ceramics, bioengineering, chemistry, and magic. After breaking from the Veskarium, residents of Pulonis's nation-states overwhelmingly voted to join the Pact Worlds, and they're still acclimating to this new political allegiance.

The majority of pahtras are asexual. Most seek loving and life-long relationships with partners, but in modern times few commit to having children. Pahtras bear litters of six to eight children and prefer communal child-rearing, which allows parents to retain their individuality and shoulder responsibilities together.

Sample Names

Traditional pahtra names contain auspicious elements determined by a mystic. Pahtra names include Cahnex, Dae, Fetenekku, Hafoumei, Ifset, Ihrasara, Jeviish, Khieper, Lealorn, Mahdran, Miiyu, Onharaf, Rishir, Sanna, Tendris, Teoshanhi, Vokuvi, Voyenrel, and Zamahaii.

Beliefs

Many pahtras cling fiercely to their ancestral Pulonian traditions in an effort to keep their cultures alive after enduring generations of oppression by the Veskarium. Pulonian culture values personal success and standing out from one's peers and views all existence as a great song, with each person, event, and action adding to the galactic symphony that began at the dawn of time. Most pahtras enjoy healthy and productive competition, believing that one's true potential can emerge only from struggle. Underhandedly sabotaging or blatantly disrespecting a rival who follows the rules of a competition is a grave offense and usually seen as a sign of weakness. Pahtras make an exception to this code when facing a dishonorable foe, such as invaders from the technologically advanced Veskarium. In such cases, any form of resistance is acceptable, and the use of dirty tactics is considered a wise counter to a foe's unfair advantages. Many religious pahtras pray to Meyel, an ancestral deity of dance, music, and battle worshipped on Pulonis.

Popular Edicts

challenge yourself and your allies, perform music and dance daily, take pride in your accomplishments

Popular Anathema

abandon your ancestral traditions, bow to tyrants, give up your identity

Pahtra Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Charisma, Dexterity, Free

Attribute Flaw Constitution

Languages Common, Pahtra, Vesk

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • pahtra

Senses Darkvision

Shirren.name: 希连人 Shirren
Shirren.text:
希壬人最初是虫群的一员；虫群是由蜂巢意识控制的殖民集合体，会吞噬整颗星球。随着时间推移，希壬人获得了个体自我的意识，并拒绝虫群那种无意识的吞食。他们逃离了蜂巢意识，定居于协约世界，在那里建立起自己的社群，并融入现有的聚居地。

如果你想要扮演一名既喜欢团队合作、又重视独立自主的角色，那么你应该选择希壬人。

你也许会……

  • 与同伴建立深厚而强大的纽带。
  • 享受自己的自由，并为能够自行做出决定而感到欣喜。
  • 不喜欢暴力，倾向于寻求让所有人都受益的和平妥协。

其他人或许会……

  • 指望你调解争端，并充当理性之声。
  • 认为你过度看重、也过度思考一些简单的选择。
  • 对你的昆虫型生理结构和心灵感应感到不安。

外貌描述

希壬人是节肢动物，拥有触角、复眼和几丁质外骨骼。希壬人直立行走，拥有三对肢体，以及长有三爪的手。较低位置、较为孱弱的两对肢体通常会被隐藏起来，只在礼仪和繁殖相关场合使用。希壬人的外貌会因其所出身的虫巢而有所不同，有些还保有退化的翅膀、分节的胸部或毒刺。

希壬人有三种参与繁殖的性别：雄性、雌性和宿主。雌性与雄性希壬人分别提供卵子和精子，而宿主负责孵育受精卵。在一些希壬人社群中，一名宿主会为许多伴侣进行孵育；而在另一些社群中，三方结合则更为常见。希壬幼体在生命最初的2年里会处于蠕虫般的幼虫形态。父母可能会将自己的幼虫子嗣装在一个防护容器中携带，以便他们在达到蛹期前能够安全地体验这个世界。蛹会在大约八岁时经历第二次变态，并在几年后稳定为成熟形态。

社群

希壬人重视个人选择与权利；他们之所以能够逃离虫群，是因为其生理结构发生了一种适应，使他们在为自己做出选择时会感到愉悦。希壬文化正是建立在这种对选择的热爱之上，鼓励希壬人去适应各种不同的信念、哲学与职业。希壬人高度群居，若不身处某个群体之中，往往会感到孤独。一旦希壬人为自己选择了一个社群，他们通常会在其中安顿到某个专门化的角色里。时局艰难时，他们会投身团队合作，只要自身自主性仍得到保留，他们就会优先考虑什么对群体最有利，而非仅仅对个人有益。

示例名字

希壬人主要依靠心灵感应进行交流，并拥有一个纯由思维构成、秘而不宣的灵魂名。希壬人也很乐于接受同伴赋予的昵称。一些希壬人的发声名包括：Cesca、Chk Chk、Halicon、Izenzi、Jchk、J'scib、Keskodai、Kinnik、Korskal、Philt、Schect、Thast、T'sen、Xylit、Zenka 和 Zigvigix。

信仰

希壬人以自己的选择来定义自身，并对一切形式的压迫深感反感。他们乐于进行文化交流；虽然大多数人会积极接纳其他社群的神祇与习俗，但也有人坚定奉行无神论世界观，拒绝神明崇拜，转而以世俗凡人的经验为核心。许多希壬社群都会向海拉丝致敬，这位仁慈的神祇被认为是他们物种的始祖。反过来，海拉丝的信仰也受到她的希壬追随者塑造；他们认为她体现了“统一而不趋同”的至高境界。

常见典范

自己做出选择，尽量以和平方式解决问题，为群体的更大利益而努力

常见禁忌

施加不假思索的破坏，剥夺他人做出选择的权利

希壬人机制

生命值 10

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性加值 体质、感知、自由

属性缺陷 魅力

语言 通用语、希壬语，以及一种你自选的地区语言

额外语言 数量等于你的智力调整值（如果为正值）。从常见语言列表以及你能接触到的其他语言中选择（例如你母星上通行的语言）。

特质

  • 类人
  • 希壬人

有限心灵感应

Shirrens were originally members of the Swarm, a collection of colonies controlled by a hive mind that devoured entire planets. In time, shirrens gained a sense of individual self and rejected the Swarm's mindless consumption. They fled the hive mind and settled in the Pact Worlds, where they established their own communities and integrated into existing settlements.

If you want a character who enjoys working as part of a team while still valuing independence, you should play a shirren.

You Might...

  • Build deep and powerful bonds with your comrades.
  • Enjoy your freedom and delight in the opportunity to make your own decisions.
  • Dislike violence and prefer seeking peaceful compromises that benefit everyone.

Others Probably...

  • Count on you to mediate disputes and act as a voice of reason.
  • Believe you overvalue and overthink simple choices.
  • Are disconcerted by your insectile physiology and telepathy.

Physical Description

Shirrens are arthropods with antennae, compound eyes, and chitinous exoskeletons. Shirrens walk upright and have three sets of limbs with three-clawed hands. The lower, weaker pairs of limbs are generally kept concealed and only used for ceremonial and reproductive reasons. Shirrens vary in appearance based on the colony they descended from, and some have vestigial wings, segmented thoraxes, or stingers.

Shirrens have three sexes with roles in reproduction: male, female, and host. Female and male shirrens provide eggs and sperm respectively, and hosts incubate the fertilized eggs. In some shirren communities, a single host incubates for many partners, while three-party unions are common in others. Shirren young spend their first 2 years in a wormlike larval form. A parent might carry their larval child in a protective container to let them safely experience the world until they reach the pupal stage. Pupae undergo a second metamorphosis around eight years old before settling into their mature form a few years later.

Society

Shirrens value individual choice and rights, having escaped from the Swarm thanks to an adaptation to their physiology that causes pleasure when they make choices for themselves. Shirren culture is built around this love of choice, encouraging shirrens to adapt themselves to a wide variety of beliefs, philosophies, and professions. Shirrens are highly communal and tend to feel lonely unless they're part of a group. Once a shirren chooses a community for themself, they often settle into a specialized role. When times are tough, they pitch in for teamwork and prioritize what's best for the group over what only benefits them as individuals, as long as they retain their autonomy.

Sample Names

Shirrens rely primarily on telepathy for communication and have a secret soul-name that's purely thought-based. Shirrens readily accept nicknames bestowed by their companions. Some shirren speech-names include Cesca, Chk Chk, Halicon, Izenzi, Jchk, J'scib, Keskodai, Kinnik, Korskal, Philt, Schect, Thast, T'sen, Xylit, Zenka, and Zigvigix.

Beliefs

Shirrens define themselves by their choices and bristle against all forms of oppression. They enjoy cultural exchange, and while most eagerly adopt the deities and practices of other communities, others hold passionately atheistic worldviews that reject divine worship in favor of centering secular mortal experiences. Many shirren communities pay homage to Hylax, a benevolent deity believed to be the progenitor of their species. Hylax's faith is in turn shaped by her shirren followers, who believe her to be the pinnacle of unity without conformity.

Popular Edicts

make your own choices, try to solve problems peacefully, work for the greater good of the group

Popular Anathema

inflict thoughtless destruction, take away another's right to make choices

Shirren Mechanics

Hit Points 10

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Constitution, Wisdom, Free

Attribute Flaw Charisma

Languages Common, Shirren, One regional language of your choice

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • shirren

Limited Telepathy

Skittermander.name: 斯基特曼德尔 Skittermander
Skittermander.text:
斯基特曼德是奥德德特琼克的原生居民；这颗行星早在大断层之前很久就被维斯卡里姆入侵，如今更常被称为维斯克三号。斯基特曼德无论外表还是个性都色彩鲜明，通常精力充沛且乐于助人。

大多数斯基特曼德都能很快结交新朋友，通常喜欢让自己忙碌起来，并寻求合作。斯基特曼德传统上从小被教导，要随时伸出“六六全手”去帮助朋友或陌生人。正因这些价值观，他们在整个银河系都以富有同情心和无私著称，尽管并非每个斯基特曼德都名副其实。即使是最乐善好施的斯基特曼德，也可能好奇又爱管闲事，或把自己插手进别人的事务和问题里，仿佛那本来就与自己有关。

如果你想扮演一个友善、情感丰富并且乐于帮助他人的角色，你就该选择斯基特曼德。

你可能会……

  • 热衷于帮助他人，甚至可能把他们的需求置于自己之上，或者在无法提供帮助时感到焦虑。
  • 喜欢探索新地方，并结识“新朋友”。
  • 把真心实意写在你六只袖子上。

其他人可能会……

  • 对你无穷无尽的精力、热情和积极态度（或你最常表现出的其他情绪）感到惊叹。
  • 理所当然地认为你会想帮助他们，而如果你不这么做，他们就会感到惊讶。
  • 以为你轻浮靠不住，而且不把自己当回事。

生理描述

斯基特曼德身材矮小而圆滚，有大眼睛和布满尖牙的宽嘴。他们有六条手臂，因此会用俚语“六六全手”来表示全力以赴。斯基特曼德全身覆盖着色彩鲜艳的毛皮，最常见的是亮蓝、绿色、紫色或红色。斯基特曼德是哺乳动物，生命最初会经历一个称为幼崽的无智慧幼体阶段。斯基特幼崽看起来像微型的斯基特曼德，不同之处在于它们会用八条肢体四处爬动，耳朵更大，而且腹部长着第二张管状嘴巴。斯基特幼崽出生后除了吃几乎什么都不做，会吞食水果、种子、叶子、生肉，以及任何它们能塞进嘴里的其他营养来源，最好能有父母的指引。斯基特幼崽腹部的胃口能够附着在大型猎物身上，并分泌带有麻痹效果的唾液，使它们能像长毛水蛭一样挂在大型动物身上，随着时间慢慢取食。斯基特幼崽大约在六岁时成熟为斯基特曼德，那时它们的胃口会脱落。大多数个体终其一生都保留着庞大而不挑食的胃口。

社群

斯基特曼德社会不会建立政府、法律或规则，但居民会很自然地彼此帮助，形成自由松散的独立社区，或加入邻近的社群。社区关系紧密且欢迎外来者，个体往往友善、善于交际并积极参与。斯基特曼德通常很多话，只有在专注于某项特别困难的任务时或睡觉时，才会不参与持续不断的群体交谈。当遇到一位专注而沉默的斯基特曼德时，其他斯基特曼德往往也会跟着安静下来，好帮助对方集中注意力，尊重那位同伴周围弥漫开的静谧。

据说，维斯卡里姆几乎不费吹灰之力就征服了斯基特曼德的母星奥德德特琼克。当斯基特曼德居民意识到来访的维斯克蜥人想占据他们的世界时，他们就只是跑到别处去，以这种方式“帮了个忙”。奥德德特琼克既是维斯卡里姆的一处被占据前哨，同时又完全由独立自主的主权社区构成。斯基特曼德想帮维斯卡里姆时就会帮，但并不承认维斯卡里姆的领袖地位或统治。由于斯基特曼德并不进行军事上的反抗，维斯卡里姆也乐于容忍这种安排。

斯基特曼德会随着年龄增长并跨越特定人生里程碑，在自己的名字后面不断增添音节。一个名字起初都很短，通常不超过一个音节。随着时间流逝，或每当斯基特曼德想纪念某件重要事件时，就会加入新的音节。新增的音节往往具有重复性，许多斯基特曼德还会把其他外来名字的一部分（尤其是维斯克蜥人的名字）吸纳进自己的名字中。

示例名字

Ayoka, Baazo, Bixby, Dakoyo, Fipzul, Gazigaz, Jomp, Kayoko, Kimikim, Mimzy, Nako, Prismacora, Quonx, Rudfuz, Sprax, Timinim, Tipps, Tonkona, Viverivim

信念

斯基特曼德不太在意有组织的宗教，而是通过故事、歌曲和艺术传承他们的信念与价值观。许多人认为自己是无神论者。

常见典范

与人为善，帮助他人，尊重并照料生命

常见禁忌

无缘无故故意造成伤害，污染环境，拒绝帮助处于危急困境中的人

斯基特曼德机制

生命值 6

体型 小型

速度 25 英尺

属性增强 魅力、敏捷、自由

属性缺陷 感知

语言 通用语、维斯克语、你选择的一种地区语言

额外语言 数量等于你的智力调整值（如果为正值）。从通用语言列表以及你能接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你的母星上通行的语言）。

特质

  • 人形生物
  • 斯基特曼德

感官 微光视觉

六臂

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.cIrL2cSC1rCIBVDa inline]

斯基特曼德传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.46QpOfnvTpkFd9ST]{永幼崽斯基特曼德}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.JWt2ARxLCZ6ru8H2]{加德拉维奇斯基特曼德}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.m9Nb3UrUoEGAxaCr]{乱爬者斯基特曼德}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.5SqvxQBmTllq2Lzu]{斯基特抚养}

Skittermanders are the original inhabitants of Oeddertchonk, a planet that the Veskarium invaded long before the Gap and is more commonly known today as Vesk-3. Colorful in both appearance and personality, skittermanders are generally energetic and altruistic.

Most skittermanders quickly form new friendships, typically enjoy staying busy, and seek collaboration. Skittermanders are traditionally raised to always lend “allsix” hands to help a friend or stranger. Because of these values, they have a reputation throughout the galaxy for their compassion and selflessness that not every skittermander lives up to. Even the most altruistic skittermanders might be curious and nosy or insert themselves into others' business and problems as though they belong there.

If you want to play a character who's friendly and emotional and who enjoys helping others, you should play a skittermander.

You Might...

  • Love to help others, perhaps even prioritizing their needs over your own or feeling anxiety when you can't offer assistance.
  • Enjoy exploring new places and meeting nufriends.
  • Wear your heart on allsix of your sleeves.

Others Probably...

  • Are in awe of your boundless energy, enthusiasm, and positivity (or another emotion you express most often).
  • Expect you to want to help them and act surprised if you don't.
  • Assume you're flighty or unreliable and that you don't take yourself seriously.

Physical Description

Skittermanders are short and rotund, with big eyes and wide mouths lined with sharp teeth. They have six arms, leading to their use of the slang term allsix for giving one's best effort. A skittermander's body is covered in colorful fur, most commonly in bright shades of blue, green, purple, or red. Skittermanders are mammals who begin life in a non-sapient larval stage called a whelp. Skitterwhelps look like miniature skittermanders, save that they scrabble around on all eight limbs, have bigger ears, and have a secondary, tubelike mouth that sprouts from their abdomen. Skitterwhelps don't do much more than eat after birth, devouring fruits, seeds, leaves, raw meat, and any other source of nutrients they can cram into their mouths, hopefully with parental guidance. A skitterwhelp's stomach-mouth can attach to large prey and secretes numbing saliva, enabling them to cling to large animals and feed on them over time like a furry leech. Skitterwhelps mature into skittermanders around the age of six, when their stomach-mouths detach. Most retain their large and undiscerning appetite throughout their lives.

Society

Skittermander societies don't create governments, laws, or rules, yet residents naturally help each other, forming free- form independent communities or joining neighboring societies. Communities are tight-knit and welcoming, and individuals tend to be friendly, sociable, and engaged. Skittermanders are often talkative, only abstaining from constant group conversation while focused on a particularly challenging task or while sleeping. Upon encountering a focused, silent skittermander, other skittermanders often fall silent in turn to help them concentrate, respectful of the hush that's overtaken their fellow.

It's said that the Veskarium effortlessly conquered the skittermander home world of Oeddertchonk. When the skittermander residents realized their vesk visitors wanted to occupy their world, they “helped” by simply being elsewhere. Oeddertchonk is simultaneously an occupied outpost of the Veskarium and made up of entirely independent sovereign communities. The skittermanders help the Veskarium when they feel like it but don't acknowledge Veskarium leadership or governance. Because skittermanders don't engage in military resistance, the Veskarium happily tolerates the arrangement.

A skittermander adds to their name as they age and pass certain milestones. A name begins very short, usually no more than one syllable. New syllables are added with the passing of time or whenever the skittermander feels like commemorating an important event. Added syllables are often repetitive, and many skittermanders adopt parts of other foreign names (notably Vesk) into their own.

Sample Names

Ayoka, Baazo, Bixby, Dakoyo, Fipzul, Gazigaz, Jomp, Kayoko, Kimikim, Mimzy, Nako, Prismacora, Quonx, Rudfuz, Sprax, Timinim, Tipps, Tonkona, Viverivim

Beliefs

Skittermanders care little for organized religion, instead passing on their beliefs and values through stories, songs, and art. Many consider themselves atheist.

Popular Edicts

be kind, help others, respect and nurture living beings

Popular Anathema

cause intentional harm without reason, pollute the environment, refuse to help someone in dire need

Skittermander Mechanics

Hit Points 6

Size Small

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Charisma, Dexterity, Free

Attribute Flaw Wisdom

Languages Common, Vesk, One regional language of your choice

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • skittermander

Senses Low-Light Vision

Six-Armed

Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.text:
维斯克蜥人有着漫长的冲突历史，起初是在他们自己的恒星系内作为征服者，后来又与邻近的星际强权发生冲突，例如协约世界和虫群。如今，维斯卡里姆正与阿兹兰特星际帝国交战。冲突渗透于维斯克蜥人文化的大多数层面，造就了强大而军国主义的帝国，并使其献身于对他们的战士之神戴莫力图斯的血腥崇拜。他们残酷的历史和军国主义价值观塑造了维斯克蜥人；他们常常拥抱冲突，重视力量、责任与个人荣誉准则。单个维斯克蜥人也同样可能将这些文化价值应用到战斗以外的生活领域，尤其是在商业和体育中，而有些维斯克蜥人则可能完全抛弃或反对其母星统治者所强加的无情价值观。每个维斯克蜥人都要自行决定，是成为征服者、协作者，还是别的什么存在。

如果你想要一个恪守职责、勇敢且坚忍的角色，你就应该扮演维斯克蜥人。

你可能会……

  • 享受在战斗中与值得一战的对手较量、证明自己的机会。
  • 有强烈的责任感与荣誉感。
  • 私下里以温柔和情绪化的爆发让同伴感到惊讶。

他人可能会……

  • 敬重并畏惧你残暴的名声，但也欣赏你作为盟友时展现的力量。
  • 把你的坚忍误认为冷酷无情。
  • 害怕在战斗中面对你。

身体描述

维斯克蜥人身高可达7英尺，通常肌肉发达，身体覆盖着坚韧的鳞状皮肤。尖刺状的角从他们的头骨上生长出来，并沿着下颚形成骨质的“胡须”，有时还会沿脊柱一直延伸到他们强壮的尾巴。维斯克蜥人的鳞片通常呈绿色系，但也可能带有鲜艳的斑驳色彩，这有时被视为健康与吸引力的标志。

维斯克蜥人在其历史早期就采用了科技武器，但仍保留着自然掠食者那种凶残的利爪与尖牙。他们会精心修饰并涂绘自己的鳞片和爪子，以展示个人风格并威慑他人。

社群

维斯克蜥人社群高度组织化且带有强烈军国主义色彩。维斯克蜥人最初居住在单一星球上，但很快扩展到其恒星系中的其他世界。如今，这些被征服世界统称为维斯卡里姆，每颗星球都以数字标示其距离太阳的远近与被征服的顺序（例如Vesk-3或Vesk-8）。维斯克主星是维斯克蜥人的祖居地，也是维斯卡里姆政府的所在地与其文化核心。

维斯克蜥人的名字通常会结合其父母的名字元素，以及其他著名祖先名字中的部分。伙伴们常会为了日常称呼而将这些名字缩短，但未经许可这么做是极其严重的侮辱。一些维斯克蜥人会采用能够象征其战斗胜利的称号，例如“三枪”“虚空行者”或“小队吞噬者”。

示例名字

Abazobari, Ahadigar, Asthonad, Dotralan, Evdokayo, Julukesh, Katara, Obozaya, Oromeras, Radokama, Sarangari, Sobok, Terikoraz, Vindasorn, Yuluzak

信仰

维斯卡里姆中的大多数维斯克蜥人都崇敬征服者戴莫力图斯——责任与战争之神——以及他麾下由战斗圣者组成的军队。圣者在生前是体现维斯克蜥人文化价值观的凡俗完美（型）人物，在赢得戴莫力图斯的祝福后获得神性；如今他们与其神祇一同受人崇拜。典型的维斯克蜥人会以个人荣誉和力量的理想武装自己，面对生活中的一切艰难困苦，并认识到并非所有冲突都发生在战场上。许多维斯克蜥人在严苛的法律体系中找到慰藉，而另一些则将个人道德感置于一切之上——无论哪种情况，大多数维斯克蜥人都会毫不犹豫地为他们认为正确的事而战。即使在战斗时，大多数维斯克蜥人也会依循一套行为准则，因此维斯卡里姆内部的冲突往往既纪律严明又充满暴力，并会扩展调整，以容纳遵循既定战争秩序的对立双方。典型的维斯克蜥人总是尊重对手，并鄙视怯懦的战术，例如处决俘虏或伤害平民。

常见典范

光荣地战斗，克制私人情绪，绝不向敌人示弱

常见禁忌

背叛盟友，放弃战斗

维斯克蜥人机制

生命值 10

体型 中型

速度 20英尺

属性增强 体质、力量、自由

属性缺陷 感知

语言 通用语、维斯克语，以及一门你自选的地区语言

额外语言 等于你的智力调整值（如果为正）。从常见语言列表以及你能够接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你家乡世界中通行的语言）。

特征

  • 人形生物
  • 维斯克蜥人

感官 微光视觉

维斯克蜥人传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.lHF7WmacNWdiRNNd]{Briskwander Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.GhfhQjc0Id58xm8E]{Nightstalker Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.4CW2vHPdjx9xDJVU]{Plated Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.2PxNQLqeXGAZ3VBf]{Venomthought Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Pxw4kKf2goygSYpB]{Warblood Vesk}

Vesk have a long history of conflict, first as conquerors within their own star system and later clashing with neighboring stellar powers such as the Pact Worlds and the Swarm. Currently, the Veskarium is at war with the Azlanti Star Empire. Conflict permeates most aspects of vesk cultures, creating powerful militaristic empires devoted to the bloody worship of their warrior god Damoritosh. Their brutal history and militaristic values shape vesk, who often embrace conflict and value strength, duty, and a personal code of honor. Individual vesk are just as likely to apply these cultural values to other aspects of life besides battle, notably in business and sport, and some vesk might abandon or oppose the ruthless values enforced by the rulers of their home worlds entirely. It's up to each vesk to claim their role as a conqueror or a collaborator—or something else entirely.

If you want a character who's duty bound, brave, and stoic, you should play a vesk.

You Might...

  • Relish the chance to prove yourself in combat against worthy opponents.
  • Have a strong sense of duty and honor.
  • Surprise your companions with tenderness and emotional outbursts in private.

Others Probably...

  • Respect and fear your brutal reputation but appreciate your strength as an ally.
  • Mistake your stoicism for heartlessness.
  • Fear facing you in battle.

Physical Description

Vesk stand up to 7 feet tall, are generally muscular, and are covered in tough, scaly skin. Spiky horns grow from their skulls and form bony “beards” along their jaws that sometimes extend down their spines to their powerful tails. Vesk scales are generally shades of green but can also display vibrant, mottled coloration that's sometimes considered an indicator of health and attractiveness.

Vesk adopted tech weapons early in their history but retain the brutal claws and teeth of natural predators. They take great care in grooming and painting their scales and claws to showcase their personal style and intimidate others.

Society

Vesk society is highly organized and militaristic. Vesk first dwelled on a single planet but quickly spread to other worlds in their system. Today, the name for these conquered worlds is the Veskarium, with each given a number to mark their distance from the sun and order of conquest (such as Vesk-3 or Vesk-8). Vesk Prime, the vesk ancestral home, is the seat of Veskarium government and the heart of their culture.

Vesk names typically combine elements of their parents' names as well as those of other prominent ancestors. Companions often shorten these names for casual use, but doing so without permission is a grave insult. Some vesk take on epithets that signify their victories in combat, such as “Three Guns,” “Voidwalker,” or “Squadeater.”

Sample Names

Abazobari, Ahadigar, Asthonad, Dotralan, Evdokayo, Julukesh, Katara, Obozaya, Oromeras, Radokama, Sarangari, Sobok, Terikoraz, Vindasorn, Yuluzak

Beliefs

Most vesk in the Veskarium venerate Damoritosh the Conqueror, god of duty and war, and his army of battle saints. In life, the saints were mortal paragons who embodied vesk cultural values and attained divinity after earning Damoritosh's blessing; now they're worshipped alongside their deity. A typical vesk faces all of life's struggles armed with ideals of personal honor and strength, recognizing that not all conflicts occur on the battlefield. Many vesk find comfort in rigid systems of law, while others hold their personal sense of morality above all else—in either case, most vesk don't hesitate to fight for what they believe is right. Even while fighting, most vesk apply a code to their actions, and conflicts within the Veskarium tend to be as disciplined as they are violent, stretching to accommodate opposing sides following the prescribed order of war. A typical vesk always respects their opponent and shuns cowardly tactics, such as executing prisoners or harming civilians.

Popular Edicts

battle honorably, keep private emotions in check, never show weakness to enemies

Popular Anathema

betray an ally, give up the fight

Vesk Mechanics

Hit Points 10

Size Medium

Speed 20 Feet

Attribute Boosts Constitution, Strength, Free

Attribute Flaw Wisdom

Languages Common, Vesk, One regional language of your choice

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • vesk

Senses Low-Light Vision

Vesk Heritages

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.lHF7WmacNWdiRNNd]{Briskwander Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.GhfhQjc0Id58xm8E]{Nightstalker Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.4CW2vHPdjx9xDJVU]{Plated Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.2PxNQLqeXGAZ3VBf]{Venomthought Vesk}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Pxw4kKf2goygSYpB]{Warblood Vesk}

Ysoki.name: 伊索基 Ysoki
Ysoki.text:
数千年来，鼠族人口在阿基顿、失落的戈拉里昂以及其他数个世界上繁衍兴盛；直到太空飞行加速了协约星系中的文化交流，这种情况才发生变化。对大多数鼠族来说，这些族群是否拥有共同祖先，或是否只是趋同进化的例子，并不重要。鼠族通常喜爱群居，他们会接纳分散各地的“远亲”，不论彼此在外貌和遗传上有何差异。

大多数鼠族热爱科技与旅行，甚至往往会被其他人觉得不讨喜的职业所吸引。鼠族常常担任拾荒者、长途星舰船员，或是在狭窄空间站走廊中穿梭作业的机械师；他们对自身价值充满自信，以至于在较差条件下生活和工作，往往成为骄傲而非羞耻的来源。

如果你想扮演一个富有冒险精神、自信而充满好奇心的角色，你就该选择鼠族。

你可能会……

  • 与散布在群星各处的庞大家族保持联系，在每一座港口都有个表亲可拜访。
  • 收集并摆弄你在旅途中遇到的各种小装置，甚至包括你自己的电控机械植入体。
  • 把同事和朋友也接纳进你的家人范围。

其他人多半会……

  • 先以为你杂乱无章、邋里邋遢，直到他们了解你的习惯。
  • 重视你运用科技的技能，但也希望你把东西重新组装起来的次数，能和你拆开它们的次数一样多。
  • 依赖你为他人挺身而出，并总是把事情办成。

身体描述

鼠族有长着胡须的口鼻、大耳朵和无毛尾巴，眼睛通常为红色或黑色，毛色则多为黑、棕、灰、白等色调。鼠族的外貌差异很大，即使在同一个家庭中也是如此。许多鼠族拥有抓握尾，能帮助他们在失重环境中保持平衡并灵活移动；他们也有灵敏的鼻子，能够通过气味辨识复杂化学物质。

鼠族会本能地通过梳理自身来保持清洁，并在其强大的社群结构中不断强化这些习惯。许多鼠族会使用化妆品来增添外表魅力，也偏爱电控机械植入体，常常是在某位表亲那间热闹的街头诊所里内嵌的。鼠族喜欢通过时尚表达个性，把衣物和配饰层层叠加，形成一种杂糅混搭的风格。无论穿着或职业如何，鼠族都重视有备无患与随机应变，几乎不会不带上几件实用工具和补给就出门；这些东西通常塞在背包、手提包、工具腰带或颊囊里。

社群

鼠族文化重视生命胜于信用点，并将工作视为另一种可以享受的集体活动。鼠族社群紧密而好客，只要陌生人不轻视他们，他们总是乐于分享一顿饭，或交换一些备用零件。许多成年鼠族喜欢与数十位朋友和亲属保持远距离通信，并在机缘使他们重逢时一同举行喧闹热烈的庆典。另一些鼠族则终生不离家园，成为其社群的中流砥柱，为一代又一代孙辈珍藏废品与故事。

对鼠族而言，绰号往往和本名一样重要；他们喜欢根据朋友和家人的外貌或个性来取昵称，例如“零嘴”、“小点”、“火花”或“轰轰”。许多鼠族的姓氏会融入他们所乘坐的飞船或家乡聚落的名称。

示例名称

Bena, Coponisa, Cors, Datch, Fitch, Goba, Kib, Lolo, Niknak, Quig, Resk, Sim, Twik

信念

鼠族相比抽象的道德概念，更关心自己的家人；大多数鼠族即使会违反民事法律，也会遵循其社群严格的社会规范。社群对所有鼠族都很重要，即便他们并不同意，也很可能会尊重其他文化中的社交期待。

常见典范

保持良好的个人卫生，将社群的需求置于自己之上，与朋友保持联系，照顾你的家人

常见禁忌

丢掉某样日后可能派得上用场的东西

鼠族机制

生命值 6

体型 小型

速度 25 尺

属性增强 敏捷、智力、自由

属性缺陷 力量

语言 阿基顿语、通用语、鼠族语

额外语言 等于你的智力调整值（若其为正值）。从常见语言列表以及你能够接触到的其他语言中选择（例如你母星上流行的语言）。

特征

  • 类人生物
  • 鼠族

感官 微光视觉

尖锐牙齿

Ysoki populations thrived on Akiton, lost Golarion, and several other worlds for millennia before spaceflight accelerated cultural exchange in the Pact System. The question of whether these ethnicities share common ancestors or were examples of convergent evolution isn't important to most ysoki. Often gregarious, ysoki embrace far-flung “cousins” regardless of differences in appearance and heredity.

Most ysoki love technology and travel, even gravitating toward professions that others find unpleasant. Ysoki often work as junkers, long-haul starship crew members, or mechanics squeezing through cramped station corridors, so sure of their own worth that living and working in subpar conditions is often a source of pride rather than shame.

If you want a character who's adventurous, confident, and curious, you should play a ysoki.

You Might...

  • Keep in touch with a large extended family scattered throughout the stars, with a cousin to visit in every port.
  • Collect and tinker with gadgets encountered in your travels, even your own cybernetic augmentations.
  • Adopt your coworkers and friends into your family.

Others Probably...

  • Assume you're disorganized and messy until they learn your habits.
  • Value your skills with technology but wish you reassembled things as often as you took them apart.
  • Depend on you to stick up for others and always get the job done.

Physical Description

Ysoki have whiskered snouts, large ears, and hairless tails, with red or black eyes and fur colors typically in shades of black, brown, gray, and white. Ysoki appearances vary considerably, even within a family unit. Many ysoki have prehensile tails that help balance and maneuvering in zero gravity as well as keen noses that can identify complex chemicals by smell.

Ysoki instinctually maintain cleanliness through personal grooming and reinforce these habits throughout their strong social structures. Many ysoki use cosmetics to spice up their looks and favor cybernetic augmentations, often installed at a cousin's bustling street clinic. Ysoki enjoy expressing their personality through fashion, layering clothing items and accessories into a jumbled fusion. Regardless of attire or profession, ysoki value preparedness and ingenuity, rarely leaving home without a few useful tools and supplies stuffed into a backpack, purse, tool belt, or cheek pouch.

Society

Ysoki culture values life over credits, framing work as another communal activity to enjoy. Ysoki communities are tight-knit and welcoming, always eager to share a meal or swap spare parts with strangers who don't look down on them. Many ysoki adults enjoy distance correspondences with dozens of friends and relatives, reuniting for rowdy celebrations whenever circumstance brings them back together. Others never leave their homes, serving as pillars of their community and curating collections of junk and stories for generations of grandchildren.

Nicknames are often as important to ysoki as their given names, and they enjoy giving their friends and family monikers based on their appearance or personality, such as “Snack,” “Dot,” “Sparks,” or “Boom-Boom.” Many ysoki family names incorporate their ships or home settlements.

Sample Names

Bena, Coponisa, Cors, Datch, Fitch, Goba, Kib, Lolo, Niknak, Quig, Resk, Sim, Twik

Beliefs

Ysoki care more about their family than abstract moral concepts, and most ysoki follow their community's strict social codes even if they break civil laws. Community is important to all ysoki, and they're likely to respect other cultures' social expectations even when they don't agree.

Popular Edicts

maintain good personal hygiene, put your community's needs above your own, stay in touch with friends, take care of your family

Popular Anathema

throw away something that might be useful later

Ysoki Mechanics

Hit Points 6

Size Small

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Dexterity, Intelligence, Free

Attribute Flaw Strength

Languages Akitonian, Common, Ysoki

Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if it's positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • humanoid
  • ysoki

Senses Low-Light Vision

Sharp Teeth

Starfinder Player Core.name: 《星际探险者玩家核心》 Starfinder Player Core

Astrazoan.name: 星体变形怪 Astrazoan
Astrazoan.text:
在自然形态下，阿斯特拉卓安看起来像一只人类体型的海星，拥有多肢的身躯，连接着一个用于储存组织的球状囊袋，以及柔软、布满裂沟的腹面，腹面排列着纤毛和骨质牙齿。阿斯特拉卓安很少向其他生物展示这种自然形态，并对其祖先起源守口如瓶，主要是因为连他们自己也不知道自己来自何处。

如果你想扮演一个能够改变身体、采用新身份与新表达方式的角色，你就应该选择阿斯特拉卓安。

你或许会……

  • 沉醉于体验新的文化。
  • 乐于在不同身份之间切换，以适应各种情境。
  • 只向最亲近的朋友显露你的自然形态。

其他人大概会……

  • 羡慕你的变形能力，并认为那毫不费力。
  • 对你关于其他文化的知识感到惊讶。
  • 难以在你各种不同形态中认出你。

身体描述

阿斯特拉卓安最具标志性的身体特征，就是他们能将自己高度柔韧的身体塑造成许多不同形态。通过扭曲肢体、重新分配胶质般的血肉，以及用长而强健的肌腱移动器官，阿斯特拉卓安能够获得全新的外貌；一旦固定成形，这种外貌甚至能在无意识状态下维持。变形迅捷而流畅，但会伴随着令人不适的爆响与骨裂声；这种痛苦很快会被一阵内啡肽激增所抵消，帮助阿斯特拉卓安适应他们的新形态。

在自然形态下，阿斯特拉卓安像一只呈辐射对称的海星，拥有五到七条肢体，柔软腹面上的带刺裂缝保护着其脆弱的纤毛、眼睛和其他器官。他们覆盖着真皮乳突的革质皮肤能够改变颜色与质地，新诞的阿斯特拉卓安会借此模仿周围环境。阿斯特拉卓安身体中央有一个肉质囊袋隆起，内含额外组织，阿斯特拉卓安可以随意重新分配这些组织，以变形成更大的形态。有些阿斯特拉卓安会将电控机械植入体内，使自己能够转变为更加多样的形态。

阿斯特拉卓安的一切都具有可塑性，甚至连肠道也是如此。在自然形态下，阿斯特拉卓安会从口中吐出胃，在体外消化食物后再将其吸回体内。阿斯特拉卓安已经学会以符合自身所采取形态的方式进食，同时又不牺牲餐食的风味与营养品质；而且大多数阿斯特拉卓安在适应一种新文化的早期就会明白，他们物种主要的进食方式在他人面前可能令人不安，甚至令人作呕。

年轻的阿斯特拉卓安，以及那些多年来一直维持同一种形态的个体，在该换上一层新“皮”的时候可能会遇到困难——“皮”是阿斯特拉卓安对借来形态的常用称呼。不论他们模仿哪一种物种，往往都会在同样的细节上出错，比如总是在同一只手上多长一根手指，或总是在同一侧膝盖骨上长出一只眼球。即使掌握了新形态，阿斯特拉卓安往往也需要数月时间，才会停止反复检查身体的同一部位，以确认那层皮已经改掉那个恼人的习惯。随着年龄增长，大多数阿斯特拉卓安会发展并分隔出多达七个自我，分别储存在每条手臂的神经网络中。虽然每个自我都有独特的外貌、个性和经历，但阿斯特拉卓安真正的自我是一个混合而复数的整体，涵盖其诸多替代人格的多个侧面。成熟的阿斯特拉卓安可以随心所欲尝试新的皮，但大多数时间里，他们会穿着与自身手臂神经网络相关联的皮，以一种与其格式塔人格相联系的完整身份生活在那种形态之中。对自我的这种灵活性也延伸到他们的性别认同与性别表达上，因此其主导人格通常具有极强的流动性别特质。

当阿斯特拉卓安变成另一种形态时，很难将他们与所模仿物种的其他成员区分开来。彻底的医学检查通常会发现某些独特之处，从而揭露阿斯特拉卓安的真实本质；但训练有素的阿斯特拉卓安能把自身本质隐藏得极好，以至于有时连他们最亲近的爱人都无法发现真相。

社群

阿斯特拉卓安虽然缺乏统一的祖先身份认同，却凭借一种近乎不可思议的能力，适应几乎任何其他物种的文化与习性。阿斯特拉卓安的模仿不仅限于外形，还包括复制行为、举止、饮食偏好、语言与口头习惯，有时甚至连他们所融入物种的天生能力也能一并模仿。阿斯特拉卓安彼此之间很少相遇，因此许多人会与其寄宿物种的成员组成家庭，或通过出芽繁殖。大多数阿斯特拉卓安最终都会以某种方式繁殖，因为他们将延续物种视为自己的责任。

传统上，阿斯特拉卓安会隐藏自己的自然形态，以免让他人不安。也有少数阿斯特拉卓安喜欢炫耀自己的自然形态，并尽量缩短披着其他皮的时间。若一名阿斯特拉卓安表演一段融入流畅变形的舞蹈编排，那会是令人屏息的景象，尽管从历史上看，真正有机会目睹这一奇观的人始终相对不多。

示例名称

大多数阿斯特拉卓安会为自己的每个身份使用不同的名字，但也并非总是如此。阿斯特拉卓安随着时间更改名字并不少见，但大多数人都有一个语言起源不明、且最能代表其自我的真名。虽然有些阿斯特拉卓安会公开使用自己的真名，但大多数人往往只会将其分享给自己最信任的盟友或其他阿斯特拉卓安。这个真名通常由三到四个音节组成，其中第一个音节常常可作为昵称；而当寄宿文化的语言习惯允许时，这个音节也会被整合进他们其他身份的名字里。示例名称包括 Adrogall、Azusha、Cee、Ciribaan、Farahan、Leileeka、Miyleen、Sunikai、Xenelei 和 Zanilee。

信仰

阿斯特拉卓安常常崇拜个人万神殿，通常会为每条肢体分别对应一位神祇。阿斯特拉卓安会被涉及社交聚会的信仰与哲学所吸引，甚至无神论的阿斯特拉卓安也喜欢宗教仪式中的盛大排场。

许多人崇拜欧拉斯与海拉丝，或融入寄宿文化的信仰之中。一些位于威瑟斯、崇拜兰巴图因的阿斯特拉卓安主持着一个安全聊天室，在那里他们互相帮助，同时在信息圈与现实世界中周旋于数十个身份之间。一群臭名昭著的阿斯特拉卓安间谍与刺客，在长期以伊索基形态活动时学会了崇敬老鼠婆。像三贤一与宗-莎琳这样的神圣复数体，也受到许多阿斯特拉卓安的崇敬。

常见典范

寻找自我，尊重其他文化，珍视你的身份

常见禁忌

伤害另一名阿斯特拉卓安，评判他人的外貌，揭露隐藏身份

阿斯特拉卓安机制

生命值 8

体型 中型

速度 25 尺

属性提升 敏捷、魅力、自由

属性缺陷 体质

语言 通用语，以及一种你自选的地区语言

额外语言 额外语言数量等于你的智力调整值（若为正值）。从通用语言列表以及你能接触到的任何其他语言中选择（例如你母星上通行的语言）。

特征

  • 异怪
  • 阿斯特拉卓安

感官 微光视觉

变形

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.zwWVolr4HkM5jjcQ inline]

阿斯特拉卓安传承

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.9tHpz23J3FSz0K2E]{Aquazoan}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.LWYCoYVa9JiN5Cs6]{Assimilated Astrazoan}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.GDVA8GmJg1slzKgv]{Cloned Astrazoan}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.mLffetxNUmSHhGk1]{Construct Copycat}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.fTJTN6C6aVLcbb0n]{Wild Astrazoan}

In their natural form, an astrazoan resembles a human-sized starfish with a many-limbed body attached to a bulbous sack used for tissue storage, and a soft, creviced underbelly lined with cilia and bony teeth. Astrazoans rarely show this natural form to other creatures and keep their ancestral origins secret, mostly because even they don't know where they came from.

If you want a character who can change their body to adopt new identities and expressions, you should play an astrazoan.

You Might...

  • Revel in experiencing new cultures.
  • Enjoy shifting between identities to suit different situations.
  • Only reveal your natural form to your closest friends.

Others Probably...

  • Envy your shapeshifting and believe it's effortless.
  • Are surprised by your knowledge of other cultures.
  • Struggle to recognize you in all your different shapes.

Physical Description

An astrazoan's most iconic physical feature is their ability to mold their own hyper-flexible body into many different forms. Contorting their limbs, redistributing their jellylike flesh, and shifting their organs with long, muscular tendons allows astrazoans to assume new appearances that can be maintained unconsciously once locked into place. The transformation is swift and fluid but accompanied by visceral pops and cracks, the pain of which is quickly offset by a rush of endorphins that help the astrazoan cope with their new form.

In their natural form, an astrazoan resembles a radially symmetrical starfish with five to seven limbs and spiny crevices in their soft underbelly that protect their delicate cilia, eyes, and other organs. Covered in dermal papillae, their leathery skin can shift color and texture, which newborn astrazoans use to mimic their surroundings. A fleshy sack forms a hump at the center of astrazoan's body, containing extra tissue astrazoans can redistribute as desired to transform into larger shapes. Some astrazoans implant cybernetics into their bodies, which they can shift to take on even more varied forms.

Everything about astrazoans is malleable, even their intestines. In their natural form, astrazoans eject their stomachs from their mouths to externally digest food before slurping it back into their bodies. Astrazoans have learned to eat in a manner consistent with whatever shape they take without sacrificing the flavor or nutrient quality of their meal, and most astrazoans figure out early on in adapting to a new culture that their species' primary method of ingestion can be unsettling or even repulsive in front of others.

Young astrazoans and those who have remained in the same form for many years might struggle when it's time to adopt a new “skin,” the word astrazoans tend to use for a borrowed shape. They often struggle with the same details regardless of which species they mimic, perhaps adding extra fingers to the same hand or always growing an eyeball on the same kneecap. Even after mastering their new form, it can take months before an astrazoan stops double-checking the same part of their body to make sure that the skin has kicked that troublesome habit. As they age, most astrazoans develop and compartmentalize up to seven selves, stored in each of their arm's neural networks. While each self has a distinct appearance, personality, and experiences, an astrazoan's true self is a blended plurality encompassing the many facets of their alternate personas. Mature astrazoans can try out new skins at will but spend most of their time wearing skins associated with their arms' neural networks, living as a fully realized identity related to their gestalt personality while in that form. The same kind of flexibility of self extends to their gender identity and gender expression, resulting in a dominant personality that's often extremely genderfluid.

When an astrazoan changes to a different form, it's difficult to tell them apart from another member of the species they're mimicking. A thorough medical examination usually reveals idiosyncrasies leading to discovery of an astrazoan's true nature, but practiced astrazoans conceal their natures so well that sometimes, even their closest loved ones don't discover the truth.

Society

What astrazoans lack in a unified ancestral identity, they make up for with an uncanny ability to adapt to the cultures and habits of nearly any other species. Astrazoan mimicry extends beyond physical shape to copying behaviors, mannerisms, dietary preferences, language and speech tics, and sometimes even the innate abilities of the species with whom they assimilate. Astrazoans infrequently encounter one another, so many start families with members of their host species or reproduce by budding. Most astrazoans eventually reproduce in some way, seeing it as their responsibility to continue the species.

Traditionally, astrazoans keep their natural form hidden to avoid unsettling others. A few astrazoans love to show off their natural forms and minimize their time wearing other skins. An astrazoan performing a dance routine that incorporates fluid shape changes is a breathtaking sight, though historically, it's a spectacle relatively few other people get to witness.

Sample Names

Most astrazoans use a different name for each of their identities, but this isn't always the case. It is not uncommon for astrazoans to change their names over time, but most have a true name of unknown linguistic origin that they most associate with themselves. While some astrazoans openly go by their true name, most tend to only share it with their most trusted allies or other astrazoans. This true name usually includes three or four syllables, with the first often functioning as a nickname and, when linguistically appropriate to the host culture, being integrated into the names of their other identities. Sample names include Adrogall, Azusha, Cee, Ciribaan, Farahan, Leileeka, Miyleen, Sunikai, Xenelei, and Zanilee.

Beliefs

Astrazoans often worship personal pantheons, typically assigning a different deity to each limb. Astrazoans are attracted to faiths and philosophies involving social gatherings, and even atheist astrazoans enjoy the pageantry of religious services.

Many worship Oras and Hylax, or assimilate to their host culture's faith. Some Lambatuin-worshipping astrazoans on Verces host a secure chat where they help one another juggle dozens of identities both on the infosphere and in the real world. A notorious group of astrazoan spies and assassins learned to revere Lao Shu Po while spending time in ysoki shapes. Divine pluralities like Triune and Zon-Shelyn are also revered by many astrazoans.

Popular Edicts

find yourself, respect other cultures, value your identities

Popular Anathema

hurt another astrazoan, judge someone's appearance, reveal a hidden identity

Astrazoan Mechanics

Hit Points 8

Size Medium

Speed 25 Feet

Attribute Boosts Dexterity, Charisma, Free

Attribute Flaw Constitution

Languages Common, One regional language of your choice

Additional languages Additional languages equal to your Intelligence modifier (if positive). Choose from the list of common languages and any other languages to which you have access (such as the languages prevalent on your home world).

Traits

  • aberration
  • astrazoan

Senses Low-Light Vision

Change Shape

Contemplative.name: 默思族 Contemplative
Contemplative.text:
随着阿基顿的核心逐渐冷却、大气层日益稀薄，默思族遥远的祖先开始在地下庇护所中寻求生存。地下生活与地表截然不同，尽管如今已无人知晓最初的默思族究竟是什么模样、又拥有哪些文化传统，但那些熬过母星剧变的幸存者意识到，若想适应这一全新的生存范式，他们自己也必须改变。于是，默思族背离了地表上耕作、狩猎与营建等繁重劳作，转而开始探索一片新的前沿：心智的秘奥领域。

在魔法引导的演化过程中，他们一代代长出了更大的脑部与更脆弱的身体，将自身奉献给对知识的追求，而非为生存而挣扎。如今，默思族是高度特化的思考者，能够随心所欲地解开秘密，并本能般地产生灵能力量。太空旅行将许多离群索居的哲人从阿基顿上与世隔绝的社群中吸引出来，向他们许诺群星之外无数的发现与数据。

如果你想扮演一名拥有天生灵能、在心智方面极其强大的角色，你就应该选择默思族。

你或许会……

  • 把挑战复杂化，往往只是为了测试自己的能力与假设。
  • 厌恶那些会让你无法深入思考的无意义噪音与混乱。
  • 致力于掌握某个宏大谜团、魔法传统或学术领域。
  • 用“我们”而不是“我”来自称。

他人多半会……

  • 认为你几乎无所不知。
  • 不太愿意在你面前表达自己的想法，因为他们相信你会没完没了地说教，或质疑他们认知论基础的可靠性。
  • 把你当作脆弱的怪胎，认定你那退化的身体结构连简单任务都做不了。

外貌描述

经过难以计数的世代、在选择性与灵能引导下的演化，默思族已经从某种早已被遗忘、身形比例近似人类的物种，转变为巨大的脑体，下方只垂着腹部与四肢的些许残迹，就像某种脑状飞艇下方悬挂的吊舱。

这颗巨大的脑体约占一名典型默思族100磅体重中的70磅。其外层覆盖着硬化的皮肤与软骨，使脑体表面既坚韧又极其柔韧。巨脑绝不只是外观惊人而已；默思族可以通过在四个脑叶区块中分化并行的显意识与潜意识处理流程，储存并处理海量信息。其中两个区块负责运动机能、语言与推理等任务，类似于人类大脑的两个半球。

尽管另外两个区块也能进行有意识思考，但它们主要用于生成默思族的灵能场。在这种念动力的托举下，默思族学会了精准飞行——尽管不一定总是飞得很快。更重要的是，默思族的念动力场还能帮助支撑脑体；若没有灵能支撑，这一器官在标准重力下缺乏维持自身形状所需的结构。若真正失去意识，默思族即使幸存，也可能面临窒息、内出血，以及持续数周的偏头痛。所幸，他们会凭本能在不同时段让大脑不同部分休息，这一过程被称为“浮眠”，与水生哺乳动物颇为相似。

相比之下，默思族的下半身显得极其孱弱。紧绷的皮肤覆盖着其瘦削的躯架，突出的骨刺昭示着那些在数千年前本该附着强健肌肉的位置。默思族拥有两对前肢，类似于虫裔，但只有上面那一对能够真正有意义地操控物体。下面那一对则更像触角，用于解析嗅觉与触觉信息。默思族常常悬浮在某个好奇对象上方，以一整套感官对其进行分析，其中也包括从脑体下方稍微突出的眼睛。

他们的双腿比双臂稍微有力一些。若有必要，默思族可以摇摇摆摆地走上短短一段距离，然后很快疲惫。不过更多时候，他们的腿只是作为稳定器，用于蹬离表面或在半空中调整身体朝向。

有些默思族觉得自己居然还保留着退化的身体这一概念既令人厌恶又毫无必要，因此他们会穿着专门设计来将其完全遮蔽的服装，让自己看起来像是一颗幽灵般的大脑，下方拖曳着翻涌飘动的罩袍。

社群

默思族社群在隔绝与连接这两种相互竞争的目标之间谨慎地维持平衡。默思族在安静的环境中最能蓬勃发展；在那里，他们得以免受干扰，潜入深层思考。在阿基顿上，他们开凿出巨大的洞窟与地下城市，这些地方不仅能隔绝常规噪音，还能偏转宇宙射线、辐射以及其他可能干扰默思族敏锐感官的微弱信号。他们的大脑如同巨型望远镜，只有远离他人思绪所带来的“污染”，竭力聆听物质宇宙中的灵能痕迹时，才能发挥最佳效能。实际上，这种对隔绝的偏好使许多默思族显得冷淡疏离，拒人于千里之外，从而劝退了一些原本想亲近他们的人。

与此同时，默思族又在演化中形成了对社群的渴望。托举其身体质量的同一种灵能场，也会辐射出心灵感应信号，仿佛精神层面的信息素。共同生活时，默思族会在潜意识中彼此联网、交换笔记，借用彼此的视角与心智处理能力。这种“交流嗡鸣”会本能地传递他们的偏见与情绪，因此大多数默思族都被塑造成直率、分析性强，而且——以大多数生物的标准来看——颇为鲁莽的存在，因为他们会公开对他人进行精神分析并反复质疑。对默思族而言，粉饰反馈反而会让信息变得含混不清。

尽管坚定不移的诚实与冷静无私的反馈在默思族社群中备受重视，但那些离开阿基顿论坛的默思族很快就会察觉并掌握各种社会规范，学会小心避开、欣赏，甚至利用他人的禁忌。毕竟，赶走潜在同伴就意味着失去那种令人安心的、来自他人思绪的低鸣。冒险中的默思族喜欢与人结伴还有另一个原因：内在驱动力。每一位同伴都可能成为潜在的对手或衡量标准，默思族借此判断自身价值，激发自己去学得更多，并且——几乎必然地——超越身边的人。有一半的时候，同伴甚至根本没有意识到，他们的默思族朋友正在进行这样一场追求支配与自我确认的私人征途。

示例姓名

埃斯卡里的第三协奏曲、骨骼坠入螺旋 16:3、波科尔夫的最后公案、灵漂的引力常数、托舒第四诗节、德丝娜之翼上的十四行诗、卡斯特罗维尔对称悖论、紫色女武神之战。

信仰

对默思族而言，理解意味着实验、哲思、发现与勤勉努力。相比之下，神启则是一种荒谬可怖、却又需要更有力引证的活动。因此，默思族很少通过崇拜来承认诸神。相反，神祇更像是大宇宙中的著名同僚与活体图书馆——重要但往往带有偏见的信息来源，能够帮助默思族揭开更宏大的真理。凡是要求服从、命令无意义仪式，或对现实做出缺乏依据主张的神祇，几乎都难以获得默思族追随者。

默思族尊重、并可能以含蓄方式崇敬那些鼓励信徒自行研究宇宙答案的神祇。像艾洛里图与雅莱萨这样的神祇便是天然契合的对象。祂们的教谕鼓励的正是大多数默思族本来就在做的事，不过也有一些默思族会像学生对待学术导师那样与这些神祇交流，寻求指引并偶尔合作。伊布拉、奥拉斯与新诞者则更像神圣谜题，一些默思族会在崇敬祂们的同时致力于解读祂们；若这些神祇掌握着更多尚未解开的秘密，祂们便值得更多赞颂与关注。那些投身于社会学、科技等特定领域的默思族，则倾向于塔拉维特与三位一体这样的神祇。最后，像海拉克斯与兰巴图因这样的社群之神有时也会拥有默思族祭司；然而，其中有些追随者会试图与自己的庇护神建立持久的心灵感应联结，就仿佛对方也是另一位默思族一样，而这往往会导致神谕般——也带有诅咒意味——的洞见洪流倾泻而来。

名为“阿肖克”的秘奥概念位于默思族信仰的核心。阿肖克究竟是什么，会因个体与历史学者而异：它可能是一套哲学体系，可能是过去某位传说中的先知，也可能是一种尚待达成的神秘开悟状态。无论默思族采纳何种定义，阿肖克这一概念都代表着向往与崇敬。它驱使默思族摆脱自满，敦促他们不断学习、探索与奋进。若声称自己真正掌握了阿肖克，那便未免太过僭越；它是一个无定无终的过程，或许可与成神或转化为纯粹思想的存在相提并论。若非默思族却试图接触阿肖克，乃至自称理解它，同样几近狂妄。能获得“阿肖克奥秘”入门荣誉的外来者少之又少。

常见教谕

与同侪合作解决问题，拥抱独处与静默的时刻，进行深刻的自我反思，在某个专精领域中出类拔萃，追寻阿肖克

常见禁忌

满足于对复杂问题的简单解释，篡改开创性研究，在没有证据的情况下妄下断言，容忍无知，将情感置于事实之上

默思族机制

生命值 6

体型 中型

速度 5尺（悬浮）；飞行 20 尺

属性提升 魅力、智力、自由

属性缺陷 力量

语言 阿基顿语、通用语

额外语言 等同于你的智力调整值（若为正值）。从常见语言列表中选择，并可选择你能够接触到的其他语言（例如你母星上常用的语言）。

特质

  • 异怪
  • 默思族

感官 微光视觉
