Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 209-211

Research.name: 研究 Research
Research.text:
一个研究挑战由两个部分组成：资料库，即包含玩家角色需要尝试的各种研究检定以了解某个主题的区域（以及玩家角色在此过程中面对的障碍）；以及研究数据栏，其中详细说明被研究的主题，并包含当玩家角色达到特定 RP 阈值时发生的信息、奖励和额外复杂情况。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究}

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK inline]

如果某项技能未被列出，但玩家能为使用它提供有力的说明，你可以以适当的 DC 将其加入（通常使用列出的最高 DC）。在进行虚拟研究时，这些条目中通常会列出计算机和信息圈学识，而社群通常用于在实体媒介资料库中导航与破译内容；但最好提前了解队伍的技能配置，这样每位成员都有机会参与——也许数据被储存在一款开放世界生存视频游戏中，因此需要进行几轮生存或视频游戏学识检定。多样的技能与决策，再加上生动的描述，才是让研究挑战引人入胜且令人难忘的关键，而不只是由魔导技师或巫战扭曲者不断掷骰而已。

每个研究检定也都有一个 RP 最大值。达到该数值后，玩家角色无法再从该研究检定中获得更多 RP，因此他们需要找到更多地点进行进一步研究。你可以利用这一点引导玩家角色穿过你的资料库，把研究检定放在你希望他们探索的位置——在入口附近放置一个简单检定来向他们介绍主题，通常会很有帮助！务必确保你的资料库提供足够的 RP，使玩家能够达到数据栏中的所有研究阈值。

章节：子系统与变体规则《Starfinder GM Core》 第 212–213 页

A research challenge has two components: the library, which is an area containing the various research checks PCs need to attempt to learn about the topic (as well as obstacles that the PCs face while doing so); and a research stat block, which details the topic being researched and contains the information, rewards, and additional complications that happen when the PCs reach certain thresholds of RP.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research}

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK inline]

If a skill isn't listed but a player provides a strong explanation for using it, you can add it at an appropriate DC (usually the highest listed DC). Computers and Infosphere Lore will often be listed in these entries when researching virtually, and Society is often used to navigate and decipher libraries of physical media, but it's good to know the party's skill repertoires in advance so every member has a chance to participate; perhaps the data is stored in an open-world survival vidgame, requiring a round of Survival or Vidgame Lore checks. A variety of skills and decisions, along with vivid descriptions, are key to an engaging and memorable research challenge, rather than just a string of die rolls by the technomancer or witchwarper.

Each research check also has a maximum RP value. After reaching this value, the PCs can't gain any more RP from that research check, so they'll need to find more locations for further research. You can use this to guide your PCs through your library by placing research checks where you want them to explore—an easy check near the entrance to introduce them to the topic is usually helpful! Be sure that your library provides enough RP for players to meet all the research thresholds in the stat block.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 212-213

Chases.name: 追逐 Chases
Chases.text:
追逐是一种特殊类型的遭遇战。每一轮中，被追逐的角色先行动，然后追逐的角色再行动。通常，为了减少随机波动，由PC进行检定来取得进展，而他们的对手则以稳定速度前进；但如果你想强调某场特定追逐中你来我往的特性，也可以让双方都进行掷骰。处于同一组中的角色可以按他们偏好的任意顺序行动，每人各进行一个回合。角色必须在自己的回合中行动。如果他们放弃自己的回合或无法行动，他们就无法帮助队伍，并会自动导致队伍失去1点追逐点数。

地下障碍

崩塌走廊（1级）

@Check[acrobatics|dc:13] 以避免惊动墙壁，@Check[crafting|dc:15] 以加固墙壁；

震动走廊（11级） @Check[acrobatics|dc:25], @Check[crafting|dc:30]

真菌洞穴（1级）

@Check[fortitude|dc:15] 以抵受有毒孢子，@Check[survival|dc:13] 以避开蘑菇；

剧毒真菌（5级） @Check[fortitude|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

坍塌隧道（5级）

@Check[athletics|dc:20] 以挖通道路，@Check[perception|dc:18] 以找到另一条路；

古代塌方（12级）@Check[athletics|dc:30], @Check[perception|dc:28]

采矿钻机（5级）

@Check[reflex|dc:20] 以闪避钻机，@Check[thievery|dc:15] 以停用钻机；

钻机群（12级） @Check[reflex|dc:30], @Check[thievery|dc:28]

城市障碍

铁丝网围栏（1级）

@Check[athletics|dc:13] 以攀爬，@Check[thievery|dc:15] 以打开门锁；

高焊接铁丝围栏（8级） @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[thievery|dc:25]

人群（1级）

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] 或 @Check[athletics|dc:15] 以穿行或推挤通过，@Check[society|dc:13] 以顺着人流前进；

会场人潮（4级） @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[society|dc:18]

违规停放的车辆（1级）

@Check[crafting|dc:13] 或 @Check[piloting|dc:13] 以切断刹车，@Check[intimidation|dc:15] 以逼车主把它移开；

餐车（5级）@Check[crafting|dc:20] 或 @Check[piloting|dc:20], @Check[intimidation|dc:22]

摇摇欲坠的消防逃生梯（1级）

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] 以滑下，@Check[athletics|dc:13] 以在各平台间摆荡；

陡峭的消防逃生梯（5级） @Check[acrobatics|dc:18], @Check[athletics|dc:20]

安保无人机（1级）

@Check[computers|dc:14] 以重新编程，@Check[stealth|dc:16] 以偷偷通过；

安保机器人（9级） @Check[computers|dc:26], @Check[stealth|dc:28]

病毒式快闪（2级）

@Check[performance|dc:15] 以加入其中，@Check[thievery|dc:13] 以关闭音响系统；

病毒式惊喜演唱会（12级） @Check[performance|dc:30], @Check[thievery|dc:28]

载具障碍

令人迷惑的小街（1级）

@Check[society|dc:13] 以回想街道布局，@Check[survival|dc:15] 以穿过错综复杂的街巷导航；

曲折的后巷（5级） @Check[society|dc:18], @Check[survival|dc:20]

示威活动（1级）

@Check[intimidation|dc:15] 以分开人群，@Check[performance|dc:13] 以鼓动群众；

游行（5级） @Check[intimidation|dc:20], @Check[performance|dc:18]

红灯（1级）

@Check[computers|dc:13] 以入侵信号灯，@Check[piloting|dc:15] 以穿过迎面而来的车流；

繁忙红灯（11级） @Check[computers|dc:25], @Check[piloting|dc:30]

尖刺护栏（1级）

@Check[athletics|dc:15] 或 @Check[crafting|dc:15] 以制作临时坡道，@Check[perception|dc:13] 以找到绕路的方法；

被封锁的街道（5级） @Check[athletics|dc:20] 或 @Check[crafting|dc:20], @Check[perception|dc:18]

交通堵塞（1级）

@Check[perception|dc:13] 以发现空当，@Check[piloting|dc:15] 以在车流间急转穿行；

交通高峰期（5级） @Check[perception|dc:18], @Check[piloting|dc:20]

施工现场（2级）

@Check[piloting|dc:17] 以在工地中急转穿行，@Check[society|dc:13] 以理解工地的组织与布局；

拆除现场（5级） @Check[piloting|dc:20], @Check[society|dc:18]

荒野障碍

深泥（1级）

@Check[athletics|dc:15] 以艰难跋涉通过，@Check[perception|dc:13] 以找到一条路；

可怖沼泽（5级） @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[perception|dc:18]

暴雨（1级）

@Check[fortitude|dc:13] 以顶着风雨前进，@Check[nature|dc:15] 以预测天气；

魔法雷暴（5级） @Check[fortitude|dc:30], @Check[nature|dc:25]

绳桥（1级）

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] 以小心通过，@Check[crafting|dc:13] 以进行修理；

孤零零的磨损绳索（11级） @Check[acrobatics|dc:25], @Check[crafting|dc:30]

湍急河流（1级）

@Check[athletics|dc:15] 以游过去或踩着石头跳过去，@Check[survival|dc:13] 以在附近找到浅滩；

山洪暴发（5级） @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

纠结森林（2级）

@Check[perception|dc:17] 以找到路，@Check[survival|dc:13] 以规划路径；

魔法森林（5级） @Check[perception|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

章节：子系统与变体规则《Starfinder GM Core》217页

Chases are a special type of encounter. Each round, the pursued character or characters act first, then the pursuing characters act. Typically, to reduce variance, the PCs roll checks to progress while their opponents proceed at a steady pace, but if you want to emphasize the back-and-forth nature of a particular chase, you could have both sides roll instead. Characters in the same group can act in whatever order they prefer, each taking a turn. A character must act on their turn. If they pass their turn or are unable to act, they're unable to help the group and automatically cause the group to lose 1 Chase Point.

Underground Obstacles

Crumbling Corridor (1st)

@Check[acrobatics|dc:13] to avoid disturbing the walls, @Check[crafting|dc:15] to shore up the walls;

Quaking Corridor (11th) @Check[acrobatics|dc:25], @Check[crafting|dc:30]

Fungus Grotto (1st)

@Check[fortitude|dc:15] to endure poisonous spore, @Check[survival|dc:13] to avoid the mushrooms;

Virulent Fungi (5th) @Check[fortitude|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

Collapsed Tunnel (5th)

@Check[athletics|dc:20] to dig through, @Check[perception|dc:18] to find another path;

Ancient Collapse (12th) @Check[athletics|dc:30], @Check[perception|dc:28]

Mining Drill (5th)

@Check[reflex|dc:20] to dodge the drill, @Check[thievery|dc:15] to disable the drill;

Fleet of Drills (12th) @Check[reflex|dc:30], @Check[thievery|dc:28]

Urban Obstacles

Chain Link Fence (1st)

@Check[athletics|dc:13] to climb, @Check[thievery|dc:15] to unlock the gate;

High Welded Wire Fence (8th) @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[thievery|dc:25]

Crowd (1st)

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[athletics|dc:15] to weave or push through, @Check[society|dc:13] to follow the flow;

Convention Crowd (4th) @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[society|dc:18]

Illegally Parked Vehicle (1st)

@Check[crafting|dc:13] or @Check[piloting|dc:13] to cut the brakes, @Check[intimidation|dc:15] to make the owner move it;

Food Truck (5th) @Check[crafting|dc:20] or @Check[piloting|dc:20], @Check[intimidation|dc:22]

Rickety Fire Escape (1st)

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] to slide down, @Check[athletics|dc:13] to swing from landing to landing;

Steep Fire Escape (5th) @Check[acrobatics|dc:18], @Check[athletics|dc:20]

Security Drone (1st)

@Check[computers|dc:14] to reprogram, @Check[stealth|dc:16] to sneak past;

Security Robot (9th) @Check[computers|dc:26], @Check[stealth|dc:28]

Viral Flash Mob (2nd)

@Check[performance|dc:15] to join in, @Check[thievery|dc:13] to disable the sound system;

Viral Surprise Concert (12th) @Check[performance|dc:30], @Check[thievery|dc:28]

Vehicle Obstacles

Confusing Side Streets (1st)

@Check[society|dc:13] to recall the street layout, @Check[survival|dc:15] to navigate through the tangle;

Twisting Back Alleys (5th) @Check[society|dc:18], @Check[survival|dc:20]

Demonstration (1st)

@Check[intimidation|dc:15] to part the crowd, @Check[performance|dc:13] to sway the masses;

Parade (5th) @Check[intimidation|dc:20], @Check[performance|dc:18]

Red Light (1st)

@Check[computers|dc:13] to hack the lights, @Check[piloting|dc:15] to drive through oncoming traffic;

Busy Red Light (11th) @Check[computers|dc:25], @Check[piloting|dc:30]

Spiked Rail (1st)

@Check[athletics|dc:15] or @Check[crafting|dc:15] to create an improvised ramp, @Check[perception|dc:13] to find a way around;

Blockaded Street (5th) @Check[athletics|dc:20] or @Check[crafting|dc:20], @Check[perception|dc:18]

Traffic Jam (1st)

@Check[perception|dc:13] to spot an opening, @Check[piloting|dc:15] to swerve through traffic;

Rush Hour (5th) @Check[perception|dc:18], @Check[piloting|dc:20]

Construction Site (2nd)

@Check[piloting|dc:17] to swerve through the site, @Check[society|dc:13] to understand the site's organization and layout;

Demolition Site (5th) @Check[piloting|dc:20], @Check[society|dc:18]

Wilderness Obstacles

Deep Mud (1st)

@Check[athletics|dc:15] to slog through, @Check[perception|dc:13] to find a path;

Horrid Bog (5th) @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[perception|dc:18]

Downpour (1st)

@Check[fortitude|dc:13] to push through, @Check[nature|dc:15] to predict the weather;

Magical Thunderstorm (5th) @Check[fortitude|dc:30], @Check[nature|dc:25]

Rope Bridge (1st)

@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] to cross carefully, @Check[crafting|dc:13] to make repairs;

Solitary Frayed Rope (11th) @Check[acrobatics|dc:25], @Check[crafting|dc:30]

Rushing River (1st)

@Check[athletics|dc:15] to swim or hop across stones, @Check[survival|dc:13] to find a ford nearby;

Flash Flood (5th) @Check[athletics|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

Tangled Forest (2nd)

@Check[perception|dc:17] to find the way, @Check[survival|dc:13] to plot a path;

Enchanted Forest (5th) @Check[perception|dc:20], @Check[survival|dc:18]

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 217

Infiltration.name: 渗透 Infiltration
Infiltration.text:
进行中的障碍

在角色的回合中，角色会描述他们如何通过该障碍。然后他们进行任何所需的检定（或者执行所需的动作，如果他们的选择不需要检定）。检定结果决定该角色为克服该障碍获得多少渗透点数（Infiltration Points）；或者他们是否反而会引起怀疑并累积警觉点数（Awareness Points）！

大成功 该PC获得 2 点渗透点数。

成功 该PC获得 1 点渗透点数。

失败 所有PC累积 1 点警觉点数。

大失败 所有PC累积 2 点警觉点数。

如果角色的行动无需检定便能自动提供帮助，例如使用法术，他们通常获得 1 点IP，但对于特别有帮助的行动，你可以奖励 2 点。

准备活动

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.EcDcowQ8vS6cEfXd]{侦察地点}

章节：子系统与变体规则Starfinder GM Core pg. 196-199

Obstacles in Play

On a character's turn, the character describes what they do to get past the obstacle. They then attempt any required check (or perform the required action, if their choice doesn't require a check). The result of the check determines how many Infiltration Points the character gains toward overcoming that obstacle—or whether they instead raise suspicions and accrue Awareness Points!

Critical Success The PC gains 2 Infiltration Points.

Success The PC gains 1 Infiltration Point.

Failure The PCs accrue 1 Awareness Point.

Critical Failure The PCs accrue 2 Awareness Points.

If the character's actions automatically help without requiring a check, like using a spell, they usually gain 1 IP, but you can award 2 for particularly helpful actions.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 196-199

Hacking.name: 黑客入侵 Hacking
Hacking.text:
入侵子系统使PC能够获取并控制安全计算机的访问权限。PC们协力发现并利用计算机的弱点，以帮助绕过系统安保而不触发其反制措施。使用入侵子系统时，未受过计算机训练的角色也可以借助魔法、社交技能等方式提供帮助。入侵遭遇分为两种：简单和复杂。

简单入侵快速、精简，其运作方式类似于简单危害。简单计算机只有一个接入点，且没有弱点。入侵一台简单计算机或停用该计算机的反制措施，都是一个双动作活动。如果PC们有充足时间在没有其他遭遇压力的情况下获取一台简单计算机的访问权限，你可以允许PC们在触发该计算机的反制措施之前额外承受最多两次失败。或者，你可以使用构建计算机的指引来引入一个自定义弱点，或以其他方式修改一台简单计算机；但若加入超过一个弱点，就有可能使其变成一个需要更多时间才能入侵的复杂遭遇！

复杂入侵会跨越多个轮次进行，持续时间可能长短不一。在复杂入侵遭遇的每一轮中，每名PC都可以行动一次，尝试利用弱点、察觉并停用反制措施，或入侵该计算机的某个接入点。每当一个角色成功利用某个接入点的弱点时，入侵对应接入点的DC都会按标示值降低。如果某个角色未能停用该接入点的反制措施，或未能入侵某个接入点，他们便会为该接入点累积1次失败（若为严重失败则累积2次）。每个接入点都有一个或多个反制措施，当团队累积足够多失败时便会触发。处于同一团队中的角色可以按自己偏好的任意顺序行动，各自进行自己的回合。通常，尝试入侵计算机的角色会最后行动，以便队伍中其他成员有机会停用计算机的反制措施，并通过利用弱点来降低DC。尽管一群入侵者可能会想要慢慢来，在尝试入侵一台计算机之前探索每一种可能，但这样做是有风险的！在每一轮中，如果PC们尝试利用一个或多个弱点，却没有尝试入侵某个接入点或停用某项反制措施，他们就会为某个相关接入点累积1次失败。

构建一台计算机

每个入侵者都需要一台可供入侵的计算机！计算机的形式可能千差万别，从通过全息界面访问的安全科技数据库，到一棵横跨诸现实、并将数据储存在色彩斑斓且无形的果实中的跨维度之树——而那些果实只能通过清明梦境来接触。尽管二者截然不同，且必然拥有独特的弱点与反制措施，但在入侵子系统的意义上，它们都属于计算机。

概念

构建计算机的第一步是先形成一个初步概念。访问这台计算机会让你的玩家达成什么目标？它是多少级？它是简单还是复杂？它是魔法、科技，还是混合型？它是否拥有虚拟智能，或者它本身就是一个活物？它使用远程接入点，还是要求直接的物理接触？你还应该构思这台计算机的名称和描述，因为这可以帮助你规划它的弱点和反制措施。

计算机类型

大多数计算机具有科技特征，并且可以通过计算机、制作和偷窃等技能来入侵。魔法计算机可能整合了可编程的万世石，或受束缚的机器灵体来指挥远古构装体，通常使用奥秘学、自然、神秘学或宗教来进行入侵。混合型计算机同时具有科技和魔法特征，例如受密码保护的法术芯片，或由控制台操控的奥术屏障。混合型计算机通常会为其魔法与科技组件设置不同的接入点，但入侵任一者都应能取得对整台计算机的访问权限。计算机的数据栏不可能列出角色在入侵遭遇中可能使用的每一种技能。你可以将计算机数据栏中列出的数值作为指引，用于裁定那些富有创意但未被列出的入侵解决方案。

设定数值

使用危害的潜行和停用DC来确定计算机的各项DC。成功利用低DC的弱点应使入侵DC降低1，高DC的弱点应使其降低2，而菁英DC的弱点应使其降低3。在利用弱点时对入侵DC造成的减值可以累积，但绝不应足以将该DC降到低DC以下。察觉反制措施的DC通常低于停用它的DC，而后者总是高DC或菁英DC。

简化快速入侵

对于简化的快速入侵遭遇，你可以让每位玩家掷出合适的技能检定，以支援尝试进行入侵检定的角色。每次成功的技能检定都会使入侵DC降低1，若为大成功则降低2；若为大失败，则改为使入侵DC提高1。

章节：子系统与变体规则《Starfinder GM Core》222-223页

The hacking subsystem enables PCs to gain access to and control secure computers. PCs work together to discover and exploit a computer's vulnerabilities in order to help bypass the system's security without triggering its countermeasures. Using the hacking subsystem, characters who are untrained in Computers can help using magic, social skills, and more. There are two kinds of hacking encounters: simple and complex.

Simple hacking is quick, streamlined, and functions like a simple hazard. Simple computers have one access point and no vulnerabilities. Hacking a simple computer or Disabling the computer's countermeasures is a two-action activity. If the PCs have the time to gain access to a simple computer without the pressure of an accompanying encounter, you can allow the PCs up to two additional failures before triggering the computer's countermeasures. Alternatively, you can use the guidelines for building a computer to introduce a custom vulnerability or otherwise modify a simple computer, but adding more than one vulnerability runs the risk of making it a complex encounter that takes much more time to hack!

Complex hacking occurs over multiple rounds that might last a variable amount of time. During each round of a complex hacking encounter, each PC can act once, attempting to either exploit vulnerabilities, notice and disable countermeasures, or Hack one of the computer's points of access. Each time a character successfully exploits an access point's vulnerability, the DC to Hack the associated access point is lowered by the indicated value. If a character fails to Disable the access point's countermeasures or fails to Hack an access point, they accrue one failure (two on a critical failure) for that access point. Each access point has one or more countermeasures that trigger when a group accrues enough failures. Characters in the same group can act in whatever order they prefer, each taking a turn. Usually, the character attempting to Hack the computer will go last, giving the rest of the party an opportunity to disable the computer's countermeasures and lower the DC by exploiting vulnerabilities. While a group of hackers might be tempted to take their time and explore every avenue before attempting to Hack a computer, doing so is risky! During each round the PCs attempt to exploit one or more vulnerabilities, but don't attempt to Hack an access point or disable a countermeasure, they accrue one failure for an associated access point.

Building a Computer

Every hacker needs a computer to hack! The form a computer takes can vary greatly, from a secure technological database accessed via a holographic interface to an interdimensional tree that grows across realities and stores its data inside colorful, intangible fruits accessible only through lucid dreaming. While incredibly different and bound to sport unique vulnerabilities and countermeasures, both are computers for the purpose of the hacking subsystem.

Concept

The first step to building a computer is to develop an initial concept. What does accessing the computer allow your players to accomplish? What level is it? Is it simple or complex? Is it magical, technological, or hybrid? Does it have a virtual intelligence, or is it a living creature? Does it use remote access points, or does it require direct physical access? You should brainstorm the computer's name and description, as that can help you plan its vulnerabilities and countermeasures.

Computer Types

Most computers have the tech trait and can be hacked using skills like Computers, Crafting, and Thievery. Magic computers might incorporate programmable aeon stones or bound machine spirits that command ancient constructs and are usually Hacked using Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion. Hybrid computers have the tech and magic traits, such as a password-protected spell chip or an arcane barrier controlled by a console. Hybrid computers often have different access points for their magical and technological components, but Hacking either should grant access to the computer. A computer's stat block will never be able to list every possible skill a character might use during a hacking encounter. You can use the values listed in a computer's stat block as a guideline to resolve creative, unlisted solutions to a hacking encounter.

Setting the Statistics

Use a hazard's Stealth and Disable DCs to determine the computer's DCs. Successfully exploiting vulnerabilities with a low DC should reduce the DC to Hack by 1, those with a high DC should reduce it by 2, and those with an elite DC by 3. Penalties to the Hacking DC incurred while exploiting a vulnerability are cumulative and should never be enough to reduce the DC below the low DC. The DC to notice a countermeasure is usually lower than the DC to disable it, which is always high or elite.

Simplified Quick Hacking

For a simplified quick hacking encounter, you can ask each of your players to roll appropriate skill checks to support the character(s) attempting the Hacking check. Each successful skill check lowers the Hacking DC by 1, or 2 on a critical success; a critical failure raises the Hacking DC by 1 instead.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 222-223

Cinematic Starship Scenes.name: 电影感星舰场景 Cinematic Starship Scenes
Cinematic Starship Scenes.text:
运行电影式星舰场景

电影式星舰场景的运行方式与大多数遭遇类似：玩家为自己的角色掷先攻，其依据是角色如何进入场景，并在每轮中按照该顺序分别进行各自的回合。在电影式星舰场景开始之前，每位玩家都要从自己角色所担任的星舰岗位中选择一个，这将决定他们用什么技能来掷先攻。担任驾驶员的人很可能用驾驶掷先攻，而科学官则可能用计算机或察觉。记住，每位PC还可能因可用的星舰加值而在这些掷骰上获得加值！

在每轮开始时，依据场景设定，各个星舰岗位会变为可用状态。在PC回合开始时，他们选择一个可用岗位来占据，并维持该岗位直到下一轮开始。这意味着上一轮担任驾驶员的PC，下一轮可以担任舰长，只要该岗位当前可用且未被占据即可。有些岗位可以被多个PC占据，例如一艘船上有两名炮手，甚至两名科学官。可用岗位以及每个岗位可由多少名角色占据，都会在场景中注明。

根据PC所选择的岗位，他们在自己的回合中会拥有一个或多个可用的特殊动作。这可能代表驾驶员为了摆脱威胁而进行的特殊驾驶机动、科学官可能需要投入处理的反黑客行动、为了封闭附近通往地狱的裂隙所必须进行的魔法仪式，或者甚至只是用舰船的激光炮向敌人简单开火！照常，PC在自己的回合中有3个动作，他们会用这些动作来执行岗位赋予的特殊动作，或自行选择的其他动作。由于大多数星舰动作都需要2个动作来使用，每名PC通常都会剩下1个动作可用，这可能包括PC准备援助一名盟友、施法者施放指引以提高自己技能检定成功的几率，或者PC朝登上舰桥的敌方登舰者开上一枪。

与星舰上的PC不同——他们是这场演出的主角，并通过自己的选择引导故事——电影式星舰场景中的威胁按照预设程序运作，不过有些场景也可能提供程序变化，让PC始终保持警觉！参与场景的敌方星舰执行程序，而不会执行乘员动作。

电影式星舰场景 XP

角色在遭遇电影式星舰场景时都会获得经验值（XP），无论他们是否成功。场景等级表明该场景适合作为哪个队伍等级的挑战。电影式星舰场景的XP数值，等同于同等级怪物或复杂危害的XP。为了给你的玩家提供最佳挑战，你应当尽量将场景设计在队伍等级 - 1 到队伍等级 + 1 的难度范围内。等级低于队伍等级 - 4 的场景几乎毫无挑战，不奖励XP。

你也可以将额外XP作为剧情奖励授予PC，例如成功达成场景的胜利条件、使某项胜利条件所需的胜利点阈值翻倍、完成额外目标、达成重要剧情里程碑，或者甚至提出富有创意的解决方案。

等级

XP

队伍等级 - 4

10 XP

队伍等级 - 3

15 XP

队伍等级 - 2

20 XP

队伍等级 - 1

30 XP

队伍等级

40 XP

队伍等级 + 1

60 XP

队伍等级 + 2

80 XP

队伍等级 + 3

100 XP

队伍等级 + 4

120 XP

其他考量

电影式星舰场景中可能会出现一些与普通遭遇不同的情况。

更多乘员时的平衡：大多数遭遇，包括印刷冒险中的遭遇，都默认以4名在星舰上行动的PC为基准人数。有时某个场景中会包含友方NPC，而其存在已被纳入遭遇平衡。在计算超过4名PC的额外人数时，重要的是要查看所使用的任何胜利点系统中所需的成功次数，以及敌方星舰可能造成的输出。一般而言，PC星舰上可用炮手的人数已经涵盖了伤害输出，因此增加更多PC未必会提高伤害输出，反而会为PC提供更多完成遭遇的方式选择，或提高他们进行其他检定时的成功机会。

角色能力：一些角色可能拥有可在电影式星舰场景中使用的特殊能力，例如专长或法术。职业核心能力，例如特工的瞄准或士兵的压制射击，并非为电影式星舰场景设计。至于专长和法术的大多数应用方式，应由GM根据具体遭遇裁定其是否合适；但总体而言，只要说得通，裁定应略偏宽松。法术可以在PC的回合中使用，其中一些单动作的强化法术，如指引，就与角色在其回合中获得的动作经济特别契合。类似地，GM也可以对施放特别强大的法术——例如幻影舰队——给予加值或奖励，以替代该角色在其回合中执行某个专门设计的星舰动作。记住，目标是让每位玩家都能开心地游玩自己创造的角色。

星舰上的状态：有时，PC的星舰可能会获得某种状态或类似的负面效果，并带有时机要素。多数情况下，这些状态会持续指定的时长；但是，持续性伤害需要略作调整，因为它不应在每位玩家的回合都触发，毕竟伤害影响的是星舰而不是PC。取而代之，应在每轮结束时结算星舰上的持续性伤害，并由一名PC进行平检以恢复。占据工程师岗位的PC可以在其回合中花费2个动作，对其星舰执行协助恢复，使该平检的DC降低至10。这让工程师能够立刻额外尝试一次平检，以结束持续性伤害，但每轮只能一次。这取代了通常的协助恢复规则。

武器射程：为了便于运行这些遭遇，电影式星舰场景中的星舰攻击没有射程增量。这样能保持规则简洁，并避免遭遇必须拥有战术地图。某些特殊动作可能允许驾驶员调整出更好的射击角度，或者让星舰移动到更远的距离，从而使其更难被命中。在计算角色动作——例如法术——的效果时，星舰之间的距离由GM裁定，但通常应假定它们至少相距数百英尺，除非驾驶员采取特殊动作，安全地机动接近另一艘星舰。

章节：子系统与变体规则Starfinder GM Core pg. 226-227

Running Cinematic Starship Scenes

A cinematic starship scene runs like most encounters, with players rolling initiative for their characters based on how their characters entered the scene and taking individual turns in that order during each round. Prior to the start of a cinematic starship scene, each player selects one of the starship roles their character occupies, which determines the skill they roll for initiative. Someone acting as a pilot is likely to roll Piloting for initiative, while a science officer might roll Computers or Perception. Remember that each PC might receive a bonus to their rolls based on the Starship Bonuses available!

At the beginning of a round, each starship role becomes available, as determined by the scene. At the start of a PC's turn, they select an available role to occupy, maintaining that role until the beginning of the next round. This means a PC who acted as pilot in the previous round could act as captain in the following round, as long as the role is currently available and unoccupied. Some roles can be occupied by multiple PCs, such as a ship that has two gunners or even two science officers. The available roles and the number of characters who can occupy each role are noted in the scene.

Based on the role a PC selects, they have one or more special actions they can use on their turn. This might represent a special piloting maneuver to try to escape the threat, a counterhacking endeavor the science officer might need to commit to, a magical ritual necessary to close a nearby rift into Hell, or even a simple firing of the ship's laser cannon at a foe! As usual, PCs have 3 actions during their turn, which they'll use to perform special actions granted by their role or other actions of their choice. As most starship actions require 2 actions to use, each PC is likely to have a single action to spare on their turn, which might include a PC preparing to Aid an ally, a spellcaster casting guidance to improve their odds of success on a skill check, or a PC taking a shot at an enemy boarder invading the bridge.

Unlike the PCs onboard their starship, who are the stars of the show and guide the story with their choices, the threats in a cinematic starship scene operate using preset routines—though some scenes might provide variations on a routine to keep the PCs on their toes! Enemy starships involved in the scene perform routines and don't perform crew actions.

Cinematic Starship Scene XP

Characters gain Experience Points (XP) for encountering a cinematic starship scene, whether they succeed or not. The scene's level indicates what level of party the scene is a good challenge for. The XP values for a cinematic starship scene are equal to the XP for a monster or complex hazard of the same level. To best challenge your players, you should aim to design scenes that range in difficulty from the party's level – 1 to the party's level + 1. Scenes of a lower level than the party's level – 4 are beyond trivial and award no XP.

You can also grant the PCs additional XP as a story award for succeeding at a scene's victory conditions, doubling the Victory Points threshold for a victory condition, completing additional objectives, achieving an important story milestone, or even coming up with creative solutions.

Level

XP

Party level – 4

10 XP

Party level – 3

15 XP

Party level – 2

20 XP

Party level – 1

30 XP

Party level

40 XP

Party level + 1

60 XP

Party level + 2

80 XP

Party level + 3

100 XP

Party level + 4

120 XP

Additional Considerations

There are a few situations that might occur in cinematic starship scenes that are different from normal encounters.

Balancing for More Crew: Most encounters, including those in printed adventures, assume a baseline number of four PCs acting onboard a starship. Sometimes a scene might include a friendly NPC and their presence is balanced for in the encounter. When accounting for additional PCs beyond four, it's important to look at the number of successes required for any associated Victory Points system at play as well as the potential output of enemy starships. Generally, the number of gunners available on the PCs' starship accounts for damage output, so adding more PCs won't necessarily increase damage output, but instead provide the PCs with more options on how to complete the encounter or better their chances with other checks.

Character Abilities: Some characters might have special abilities, such as feats or spells, they can use during a cinematic starship scene. Core class abilities, like Aim for an operative or Suppressing Fire for a soldier, aren't intended for cinematic starship scenes. Most applications for feats and spells are left up to the GM's discretion for what's appropriate to the specific encounter but generally should veer on the more permissive side when it makes sense. Spells might be usable on a PC's turn, with some single-action enhancement spells like guidance fitting exceptionally well into the action economy a character receives during their turn. Similarly, a GM might provide a bonus or reward for casting particularly powerful spells, like phantasmal fleet, instead of taking a bespoke starship action on their turn. Remember, the goal is for every player to have fun playing the characters they created.

Conditions on Starships: Sometimes, the PCs' starship might gain a condition or similar negative effect that has a timing element. In most cases, these conditions last for a specified duration; however, persistent damage requires a slight adjustment as it shouldn't trigger on each player's turn, as the damage affects the starship and not the PCs. Instead, resolve persistent damage on a starship at the end of each round, having one PC roll the flat check to recover. A PC occupying the engineer role can spend 2 actions on their turn to perform Assisted Recovery on their starship, reducing the flat check's DC to 10. This allows the engineer to attempt an extra flat check to end the persistent damage immediately, but only once per round. This is a replacement for the normal Assisted Recovery rules.

Weapon Ranges: For simplicity of running these encounters, there are no range increments for starship attacks in cinematic starship scenes. This keeps things simple and avoids the need for the encounter to have a tactical map. There might be a special action that allows a pilot to line up a better shot or move the starship further out of range to make hitting it more difficult. When accounting for the effects of character actions, such as spells, the distance between starships is up to the GM's discretion but generally should be assumed to be at least several hundred feet apart unless the pilot takes a special action to safely maneuver close to the other starship.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 226-227

Resting.name: 休息 Resting
Resting.text:
角色每天需要 8 小时睡眠。虽然休息通常发生在夜间，但队伍在白天休息也能获得相同的收益。无论哪种情况，他们每 24 小时只能获得一次休息的收益。休息 8 小时的角色会以如下方式恢复。

  • 角色恢复等同于其体质调整值（最低为 1）乘以其等级的生命值。如果他们在没有任何遮蔽或舒适条件的情况下休息，你可以将此治疗量减半（最低为 1 HP）。
  • 角色失去 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 状况。
  • 角色将 doomed 和 drained 状况的严重程度各降低 1。
  • 大多数施法者在恢复当天的法术之前都需要先休息。

处于探索模式的队伍可以尝试休息，但他们并非完全免于危险，休息也可能被打断。不过，这 8 小时的休息不必连续；在中断之后，角色可以重新入睡。

穿着护甲睡觉会导致休息质量不佳，并使角色醒来时处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} 状况。如果角色本应从疲乏中恢复，穿着护甲睡觉会阻止其恢复。

如果角色超过 16 小时不睡觉，他们会变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。

通过长期休息来加快恢复属于停工期的一部分，且不能在探索期间进行。这些规则见第 50 页。

值哨与休息

队伍人数总时间每班值哨时长
216 小时8 小时
312 小时4 小时
410 小时 40 分钟2 小时 40 分钟
510 小时2 小时
69 小时 36 分钟1 小时 36 分钟

章节：运行游戏Starfinder GM Core 第 42-43 页

Characters require 8 hours of sleep each day. Though resting typically happens at night, a group gains the same benefits for resting during the day. Either way, they can gain the benefits of resting only once every 24 hours. A character who rests for 8 hours recovers in the following ways.

  • The character regains Hit Points equal to their Constitution modifier (minimum 1) multiplied by their level. If they rest without any shelter or comfort, you might reduce this healing by half (to a minimum of 1 HP).
  • The character loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition.
  • The character reduces the severity of the doomed and drained conditions by 1.
  • Most spellcasters need to rest before they regain their spells for the day.

A group in exploration mode can attempt to rest, but they aren't entirely safe from danger, and their rest might be interrupted. The 8 hours of rest do not need to be consecutive, however, and after an interruption, characters can go back to sleep.

Sleeping in armor results in poor rest and causes a character to wake up @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}. If a character would have recovered from fatigue, sleeping in armor prevents it.

If a character goes more than 16 hours without going to sleep, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Taking long-term rest for faster recovery is part of downtime and can't be done during exploration. See page 50 for these rules.

Watches and Rest

Group SizeTotal TimeDuration of Each Watch
216 hours8 hours
312 hours4 hours
410 hours, 40 minutes2 hours, 40 minutes
510 hours2 hours
69 hours, 36 minutes1 hour, 36 minutes

Section: Running the GameStarfinder GM Core pg. 42-43

Traits.name: 特征 Traits
Traits.text:
护甲特征

特征描述

非电子

这件护甲虽然摒弃了先进电子设备、计算机系统和电力来源，但它仍是使用最新的先进科技与现代材料制造并校准的。此护甲免疫以科技为目标的能力。除非此护甲同时具有古早特征，否则护甲符文无法在其上生效。非电子护甲通常具有暴露特征。

古早

这件护甲使用传统工艺和材料制作而成。所有来自 Pathfinder 的护甲都具有古早特征。护甲符文在古早护甲上照常生效。

《Starfinder Player Core》 第245页

武器特征

武器和徒手攻击都可以具有这些特征。由特定族裔制作和使用的武器（例如维斯克蜥人多什科）通常会具有该族裔特征。

特征描述

Aeon

你可以用单个互动动作将1枚灵石或法术宝石装入这件武器中。只要你持有这件武器，且其凹槽中嵌有灵石，你就会获得该灵石的全部好处，如同它正环绕你的头部运转一样。若这件武器装有法术宝石，你会获得数量等于法术宝石物品等级 × 5 的额外电池电荷。这些电荷会在你每日准备期间恢复。此外，当你持握这件武器时，你可以使用该法术宝石，不过以这种方式使用宝石仍会将其摧毁。

Armor Traits

TraitDescription

Analog

While this armor eschews advanced electronics, computers systems, and electric power sources, it was manufactured and calibrated using the latest advanced technology and modern materials. This armor is immune to abilities that target technology. Armor runes don't function on this armor unless this armor also has the archaic trait. Analog armor usually has the exposed trait.

Archaic

This armor is crafted using traditional methods and materials. All armors from Pathfinder have the archaic trait. Armor runes function normally with archaic armor.

Starfinder Player Core pg. 245

Weapon Traits

Weapons and unarmed attacks can have these traits. Weapons crafted and used by a given ancestry (such as the vesk doshko) often have the trait for that ancestry.

TraitDescription

Aeon

You can fit one aeon stone or spell gem into this weapon with a single Interact action. While you possess the weapon with an aeon stone in its indentation, you gain all the benefits of the aeon stone as if it were orbiting your head. While the weapon has a spell gem attached, you gain a number of bonus battery charges equal to the spell gem's item level × 5. These charges regenerate during your daily preparations. In addition, you can use the spell gem while wielding the weapon, though using the gem in this manner still destroys it.

Summon Trait.name: 召唤特征 Summon Trait
Summon Trait.text:
带有召唤（特征）的法术可以召来生物，通常是具有特定特征的生物。此类生物可见于《Alien Core》及类似书籍。除非另有说明，该生物必须是常见的，它获得被召唤（特征），并且必须出现在范围内一个足以容纳它的未被占据空间中。该法术所能召唤的生物最高等级取决于法术的环阶，如下表所示。如果你愿意，该法术仍然可以召唤等级更低的生物。这些规则仅适用于带有召唤（特征）的法术；其他会呼唤或 conjure 物品或存在、但不具有该特征的法术，例如 summon instrument，则按该法术中的说明运作。

法术环阶生物最高等级
1环–1
2环1
3环2
4环3
5环5
6环7
7环9
8环11
9环13
10环15

《Starfinder Player Core》 第370页

Spells with the summon trait can conjure creatures, typically ones with a particular trait. Such creatures can be found in Alien Core and similar books. Unless noted otherwise, the creature must be common, it gains the summoned trait, and it must appear in an unoccupied space in range large enough to contain it. The highest level of creature the spell can summon depends on the rank of the spell, as listed below. The spell can still summon a creature of a lower level if you so choose. These rules apply only to spells that have the summon trait; other spells that call or conjure items or beings but that don't have the trait, like summon instrument, work as explained in the spell.

Spell RankMaximum Creature Level
1st–1
2nd1
3rd2
4th3
5th5
6th7
7th9
8th11
9th13
10th15

Starfinder Player Core pg. 370

Special Battles.name: 特殊战斗 Special Battles
Special Battles.text:
骑乘战斗

你可以骑乘某些生物投入战斗。如同骑乘专长基础动作中所述，你的坐骑必须自愿，并且体型至少比你大一级。你的坐骑在你的先攻顺位行动。你必须使用“指挥动物”动作，才能让你的坐骑花费它的动作。如果你不这么做，这只动物就会浪费它的动作。如果你拥有“骑术”泛用专长，那么当你对作为你坐骑的动物使用“指挥动物”时会自动成功。

例如，如果你骑在一只动物身上并进行了三次攻击，你的坐骑会停留在原地，因为你没有指挥它。如果你改为花费第一个动作来“指挥动物”并成功了，你就可以让坐骑进行Stride。你可以花费下一个动作来攻击，或者命令坐骑攻击，但不能两者都做。

骑乘攻击

你和你的坐骑作为一个整体作战。因此，你们共用多重攻击减值。例如，如果你先进行一次Strike，然后再使用“指挥动物”让你的坐骑进行Strike，那么你的坐骑这次攻击要承受 –5 的多重攻击减值。

为了进行攻击，你占据你坐骑空间内的每一个方格。如果你是一个中型生物，骑在大型坐骑上，你可以先攻击坐骑一侧的生物，再攻击另一侧的生物。骑乘中型或更小的坐骑时，使用攻击的正常触及。骑乘大型或巨型坐骑时，如果你的触及为5尺或10尺，你可以攻击与坐骑相邻的任意方格；如果你的触及为15尺，则你可以攻击坐骑10尺内的任意方格（包括对角线）。在判定夹击和其他依赖触及的规则时，使用调整后的触及。

骑乘防御

攻击者可以将你或你的坐骑作为目标。只要你们都在区域内，区域效果就会同时影响你们两者。若你的坐骑任意一个方格处于攻击者的触及或射程内，则你也处于其触及或射程内。由于你的坐骑比你更大，而你又与其共享空间，因此当你处于骑乘状态且坐骑会挡在中间时（由GM判定），针对你的攻击中，你获得次等掩护。

由于骑乘坐骑时你无法像平常那样自由移动身体，因此在骑乘时你的反射豁免承受 –2 的境遇减值。此外，你唯一能使用的移动动作只有用于下坐骑的“骑乘”动作。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.9c93NfZpENofiGUp]{效果：骑乘}

空中战斗

许多怪物都能飞行，而PC也可以借助法术和物品获得飞行能力。飞行生物必须使用“飞行”动作才能在空中移动。进行特别棘手的机动时，可能需要使用特技来进行空中机动。生物也可能从空中坠落，使用第421页上的坠落规则。由GM裁定，一些基于地面的动作在空中可能无法使用。例如，飞行生物不能 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}。

水中战斗

在水中或水下进行战斗时，使用以下规则：

  • 除非你具有游泳速度，否则你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。
  • 你获得酸蚀和火焰伤害抗性 5。
  • 对于穿过水体的钝击或挥砍攻击，你的攻击检定承受 –2 的境遇减值。
  • 由水下生物发出的远程攻击，或以水下目标为目标的远程攻击，其射程增量减半。
  • 你不能在水下施放火焰法术，也不能使用带有火焰特征的动作。按照特征运作的通常规则，任何与火焰无关的效果部分仍然生效。例如，使用一把燃焰战斧进行攻击时，仍可造成其物理伤害，只是不能造成其火焰伤害。
  • 由GM裁定，一些基于地面的动作在水下或漂浮时可能无法使用。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.TPbr1kErAAJKBi3V]{效果：水中战斗}

溺水与窒息

你可以屏住呼吸，持续的轮数等于 5 + 你的体质调整值。在你的每个回合结束时，你的剩余空气减少1轮；如果你在该回合进行了攻击或施放了任何法术，则减少2轮。每当你受到重击，或对一个造成伤害的效果的豁免检定大失败时，你也会失去1轮的空气。如果你说话（包括施放法术），你会失去全部剩余空气。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.2u26bmArDPuoCljc]{效果：剩余空气}

当你耗尽空气时，你会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识} 并开始窒息。你无法从失去意识中恢复，并且必须在你的每个回合结束时尝试一次 DC 20 的 @Check[fortitude] 豁免。若失败，你受到 @Damage[1d10[untyped]] 伤害；若大失败，你死亡。第一次检定之后的每次检定，DC 增加5，伤害增加1d10；这些增加是累积的。一旦你重新获得空气供给，你就会停止窒息，也不再处于失去意识状态（除非你的生命值为0）。

章节：进行游戏Starfinder Player Core 第429页

Mounted Combat

You can ride some creatures into combat. As noted in the Mount specialty basic action, your mount needs to be willing and at least one size larger than you. Your mount acts on your initiative. You must use the Command an Animal action to get your mount to spend its actions. If you don't, the animal wastes its actions. If you have the Ride general feat, you succeed automatically when you Command an Animal that's your mount.

For example, if you're mounted on an animal and you make three attacks, your mount would remain stationary since you didn't command it. If you instead spent your first action to Command an Animal and succeeded, you could get your mount to Stride. You could spend your next action to attack or to command the mount to attack, but not both.

Mounted Attacks

You and your mount fight as a unit. Consequently, you share a multiple attack penalty. For example, if you Strike and then Command an Animal to have your mount Strike, your mount's attack takes a –5 multiple attack penalty.

You occupy every square of your mount's space for the purpose of making attacks. If you were a Medium creature on a Large mount, you could attack a creature on one side of your mount, then attack on the opposite side. On a Medium or smaller mount, use the normal reach of an attack. On a Large or Huge mount, you can attack any square adjacent to the mount if you have 5- or 10-foot reach, or any square within 10 feet of the mount (including diagonally) if you have 15-foot reach. Use the adjusted reach for determining flanking and other rules that depend on reach.

Mounted Defenses

Attackers can target either you or your mount. An area effect affects both of you as long as you're both in the area. You're in an attacker's reach or range if any square of your mount is within reach or range. Because your mount is larger than you and you share its space, you have lesser cover against attacks targeting you when you're mounted if the mount would be in the way (as determined by the GM).

Because you can't move your body as freely while you're riding a mount, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves while mounted. Additionally, the only move action you can use is the Mount action to dismount.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.9c93NfZpENofiGUp]{Effect: Mounted}

Aerial Combat

Many monsters can fly, and PCs can use spells and items to gain the ability to fly. Flying creatures have to use the Fly action to move through the air. Performing an especially tricky maneuver might require using Acrobatics to Maneuver in Flight. Creatures might fall from the sky, using the falling rules found on page 421. At the GM's discretion, some ground-based actions might not work in the air. For instance, a flying creature couldn't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}.

Aquatic Combat

Use these rules for battles in water or underwater:

  • You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} unless you have a swim Speed.
  • You gain resistance 5 to acid and fire.
  • You take a –2 circumstance penalty to your attack roll for bludgeoning or slashing attacks that pass through water.
  • Ranged attacks made by an underwater creature or against an underwater target have their range increments halved.
  • You can't cast fire spells or use actions with the fire trait underwater. As normal for how traits work, any part of the effect that's unrelated to fire still works. For example, an attack with a flaming battleaxe could still deal its physical damage, just not its fire damage.
  • At the GM's discretion, some ground-based actions might not work underwater or while floating.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.TPbr1kErAAJKBi3V]{Effect: Aquatic Combat}

Drowning and Suffocating

You can hold your breath for a number of rounds equal to 5 + your Constitution modifier. Reduce your remaining air by 1 round at the end of each of your turns, or by 2 if you attacked or cast any spells that turn. You also lose 1 round worth of air each time you are critically hit or critically fail a save against a damaging effect. If you speak (including Casting a Spell) you lose all remaining air.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.2u26bmArDPuoCljc]{Effect: Remaining Air}

When you run out of air, you fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and start suffocating. You can't recover from being unconscious and must attempt a DC 20 @Check[fortitude] save at the end of each of your turns. On a failure, you take @Damage[1d10[untyped]] damage, and on a critical failure, you die. On each check after the first, the DC increases by 5 and the damage by 1d10; these increases are cumulative. Once your access to air is restored, you stop suffocating and are no longer unconscious (unless you're at 0 Hit Points).

Section: Playing the GameStarfinder Player Core pg. 429

Attitudes.name: 态度 Attitudes
Attitudes.text:
你对 NPC 的影响以一组态度来衡量，这些态度反映了他们如何看待你的角色。这些只是一种对生物倾向的简要概述。GM 会根据你正在互动的角色的经历与信念提供更多细微差别，而他们的态度也会随着故事发展而改变。以下是这些态度的总结。

  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}：愿意帮助你，并会积极回应你的请求。
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}：对你抱有好感，但不一定会为了帮你而冒险。
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{Indifferent}：对你无所谓。（大多数 NPC 起初都是冷漠态度。）
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{Unfriendly}：不喜欢你，也不想帮助你。
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.ud7gTLwPeklzYSXG]{Hostile}：会积极与你作对——甚至可能仅仅因为厌恶你就攻击你。

任何人都无法用这些技能改变玩家角色的态度。你可以与玩家角色进行角色扮演互动，甚至如果玩家希望从机制上了解某个角色有多么令人信服或有魅力，也可以使用外交结果，但玩家始终对其角色如何回应作出最终决定。

章节：技能《Starfinder 玩家核心》 第 199 页

Your influence on NPCs is measured with a set of attitudes that reflect how they view your character. These are only a brief summary of a creature's disposition. The GM will supply additional nuance based on the history and beliefs of the characters you're interacting with, and their attitudes can change in accordance with the story. The attitudes are summarized here.

  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}: Willing to help you and responds favorably to your requests.
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}: Has a good attitude toward you, but won't necessarily stick their neck out to help you.
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fuG8dgthlDWfWjIA]{Indifferent}: Doesn't care about you either way. (Most NPCs start out indifferent.)
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.I1ffBVISxLr2gC4u]{Unfriendly}: Dislikes you and doesn't want to help you.
  • @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.ud7gTLwPeklzYSXG]{Hostile}: Actively works against you—and might attack you just because of their dislike.

No one can ever change the attitude of a player character with these skills. You can roleplay interactions with player characters, and even use Diplomacy results if the player wants a mechanical sense of how convincing or charming a character is, but players make the ultimate decisions about how their characters respond.

Section: SkillsStarfinder Player Core pg. 199

Weather Effects.name: 天气效果 Weather Effects

Section: Running the GameStarfinder GM Core pg. 95

Ancestry Paragon.name: 族裔完美型 Ancestry Paragon
Ancestry Paragon.text:
许多角色都有一些将他们与自身族裔联系起来的要素，但他们更强烈地认同自己的职业或独特个性。不过，有时某个角色会成为其族裔的化身，以至于这与其职业同样重要。对于一场将族裔背景作为主要主题、且这类角色属于常态的游戏，你们的团队可以考虑使用族裔完美（型）变体。

构建族裔完美（型）角色

创建族裔完美（型）角色时，角色不是以1个族裔专长起始，并在5级、9级、13级和17级各获得1个，而是以2个族裔专长起始，并在此后的每个奇数等级（3级、5级、7级、9级，依此类推）各获得1个，总计获得11个族裔专长。

使用族裔完美（型）角色进行游戏

族裔完美（型）角色比其他角色拥有更多的多样性与力量，尽管他们的额外能力通常局限于该族裔本来就擅长的主题。这不太可能影响战斗遭遇的游戏平衡，但可能会让英雄们在探索和社交挑战中更加轻松。

章节：子系统与变体规则《Starfinder GM Core》 第86页

Many characters have some elements that connect them to their ancestry but identify more strongly with their class or unique personality. Sometimes, though, a character is the embodiment of their ancestry to the point that it's of equal importance to their class. For a game where an ancestral background is a major theme and such characters are the norm, your group might consider using the ancestry paragon variant.

Building an Ancestry Paragon character

When creating an ancestry paragon character, instead of starting with one ancestry feat and gaining another at 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th levels, the character starts with two ancestry feats and gains another at every odd level thereafter (3rd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and so on) for a total of 11 ancestry feats.

Playing with Ancestry Paragon characters

Ancestry paragon characters have more versatility and power than other characters, though their extra abilities are usually limited to themes the ancestry already was suited for. It's unlikely to affect the game balance of combat encounters, but it might make exploration and social challenges easier for the heroes.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 86

Galactic Hero Points.name: 银河英雄点数 Galactic Hero Points
Galactic Hero Points.text:
英雄点数是一种强大的资源，能够通过一次关键的重掷改变一个场景的走向。然而，有时英雄点数的使用会显得不尽如人意，因为重掷结果比初始结果更差——如果重掷结果与原始掷骰结果相同，感觉甚至可能更糟！这个简单的变体规则旨在让英雄点数在你的战役中更具英雄色彩，让你能够把较低的结果重掷成更好的结果。使用这条规则会提高英雄点数的整体强度，而且和其他一些变体规则一样，在将其纳入你的游戏之前，你会需要认真考虑其带来的影响。

英雄式重掷

使用这个变体规则通过英雄点数重掷d20结果时，如果骰子上的结果低于10，则将该骰骰面结果提高为10。这意味着，掷出9会变成10，掷出2也会变成10，而掷出17则仍然保持17。

章节：子系统与变体规则《Starfinder GM Core》pg. 87

Hero Points are a powerful resource that can change the course of a scene via a key reroll. However, sometimes the use of Hero Points can become underwhelming when the reroll result is worse than the initial result—it might even feel worse if the reroll result is the same result as the original roll! This simple variant rule is intended to make Hero Points more of a heroic resource in your campaign, allowing you to reroll low results into something better. Using this rule will increase the overall power of Hero Points and, like some other variant rules, is something you'll want to heavily consider the ramifications of before including in your game.

Heroic Rerolls

When using this variant rule to reroll a d20 result using a Hero Point, if the result on the dice is less than a 10, increase the dice result to become a 10. This means that a result of a 9 would become a 10, a result of a 2 would become a 10, and a result of 17 would remain as 17.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 87

Skill Paragon.name: 技能完美（型） Skill Paragon
Skill Paragon.text:
技能专长让角色能够获得具有主题性的专长，这些专长可以在探索、停工期和社交互动中提供帮助。但由于遭遇模式的风险很高，许多玩家会感到压力，不得不选择能够提升自己在战斗中效能的技能专长，而牺牲那些更能体现其角色能力的专长。如果角色想专精于像外交或驾驶这样的技能，而这些技能所包含的技能专长可能只会在一两次游戏中派上用场，这种情况尤其令人沮丧。

构建技能完美（型）角色

创建技能完美（型）角色时，在选择角色的职业后，选择一项特定技能。该角色在该技能上成为受训。如果他们原本已经在该技能上受训，则改为在另一项技能上成为受训，而不是其所选技能。在3级、7级和15级时，他们获得一次额外的技能提升，但只能应用于其所选技能。只要满足条件，他们便会自动获得所有以所选技能的熟练度为前提、且明确要求该技能的通用常见技能专长。如果他们已经获得这些专长中的一个（例如来自背景或血统），则他们改为获得所选技能的 Assurance；如果他们已经拥有该技能的 Assurance，则改为获得一项相关的知识技能。

并非所有技能都拥有相同数量的专长，而某些技能选择最终会比其他选择授予更多加值技能完美（型）专长。若某个角色获得的加值技能完美（型）专长比队伍中任何其他角色少两个或更多，则他们可以在与其所选技能相关的一个类别中，自选 Additional Lore 技能专长，或在其所选技能或一项相关知识技能上自选 Assurance、Automatic Knowledge 或 Experienced Professional 技能专长。

战役特定技能

你可以根据战役的性质，限制角色能够选择的技能。例如，在一个角色扮演星舰船员的战役中，你可以指定舰船上的特定职务使用特定技能，例如舰长（外交）、医生（医疗）、工程师（制作）和驾驶员（驾驶）。你也可以将该变体规则的收益延后到正式分配战役职务之后，尤其是在将该变体规则与0级角色规则结合使用时。

章节：子系统与变体规则Starfinder GM Core pg. 87

Skill feats allow characters to gain thematic feats that can help them in exploration, downtime, and social interactions. But given the high stakes of encounter mode, many players feel pressured to select skill feats that improve their efficacy in combat at the expense of selecting feats that better represent their character's abilities. This can be especially frustrating if a character wants to specialize in a skill like Diplomacy or Piloting that includes skill feats that might only see use in one or two sessions.

Building a Skill Paragon character

When creating a skill paragon character, after selecting the character's class, choose a specific skill. The character becomes trained in it. If they were already trained in it, they become trained in another skill instead of their chosen skill. At 3rd, 7th, and 15th levels, they gain an additional skill increase they can apply only to their chosen skill. They automatically gain all common general skill feats that specifically requires proficiency in the chosen skill as a prerequisite as soon as they qualify for those feats. If they already gain one of those feats (such as from a background or heritage), they instead gain Assurance for the chosen skill or, if they already have Assurance for that skill, a related Lore skill.

Not all skills have the same number of feats, and some skill choices will end up granting more bonus feats than others. Characters with two or more fewer bonus Skill Paragon feats than any other character in the party gain their choice of the Additional Lore skill feat in a category related to their chosen skill, or the Assurance, Automatic Knowledge, or Experienced Professional skill feat in their chosen skill or a related Lore skill.

Campaign Specific Skills

You can limit the skills characters can select based on the nature of the campaign. For example, in a campaign where characters play as crew members of a starship, you can designate specific roles on the ship that use specific skills, like captain (Diplomacy), doctor (Medicine), engineer (Crafting), and pilot (Piloting). You can delay the benefits of the variant rule until after campaign roles are formally assigned, especially when using the variant rules in tandem with the Level 0 Character rules.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 87

Level 0 Characters.name: 0级角色 Level 0 Characters
Level 0 Characters.text:
在成为英雄之前，每位PC都来自某个地方——无论是在像 Chk Chk 那样尘土飞扬、烈日炙烤的村庄里倒咖啡，还是在像 Dae 那样繁忙的太空港表演。有时，游玩一场设定在PC们作为英雄展开首次冒险之前数年的前传游戏会非常有趣；或者，你也可能会有一个关于低强度冒险的点子。以下规则提供了构建和使用0级PC的方法。

构建角色

构建一名0级角色与构建一名1级角色类似，但你在选择完族裔和背景后就停止。0级角色仍然会获得正常角色创建流程中第6步提供的四次自由属性增强，但不会获得职业属性增强。

初始熟练

0级角色在察觉、所有豁免检定、徒手攻击、无甲防御，以及自选的一种简易武器上都受训。此外，他们还会获得数量等于2 + 其智力调整值的受训技能。0级角色的熟练加值运作方式与平常相同，但由于等级为0，因此受训带来的总熟练加值为+2。

生命值

0级角色将其体质调整值加到其族裔生命值上，以决定其起始生命值。

初始资金

0级角色起始拥有50信用点用于购买装备。

学徒选项

如果你想讲述的故事是关于已经开始接受某个特定职业训练的角色，你可以赋予他们少量额外能力。学徒角色除了获得其初始熟练带来的技能外，还会在所选职业指定的技能上受训（例如，士兵的运动和威吓）。他们还会根据职业获得额外益处。

星辉武者：星辉武者学徒获得星焰、星辉灵光或星辉武器之一（但不是三者全部）。他们的星辉武器只能选择一个特性，且不会获得调谐，因此也不会获得调谐状态带来的额外益处。

其他武斗职业：其他武斗职业的学徒（例如特使、特工和士兵）会在轻甲、所有简易武器，以及该职业初始熟练中列出的一种军用武器上受训。如果这里未列出的某个武斗职业不具备轻甲或军用武器训练，也要额外赋予它另一项能力。

施法者：施法者学徒会在对应的魔法传统上受训，并从其职业中获得两个戏法。预备施法者不能每天更换这些戏法。

游戏进行

对0级角色来说，战斗可能会格外危险。出于安全考虑，你在判断哪些战斗遭遇合适时，可以将这些角色视为–1级。在技能检定方面，他们仍然可以用自己受训的技能完成使用简单受训DC的任务，但成功会更不确定。由于他们掌握的技能较少，队伍中可能没有任何人针对某项任务受过训练。如果你打算让这些角色进行超过几场的游戏，考虑使用快速升级速度（800 XP）将他们提升至1级。如果你的团队想在0级体验更长时间，可以让团队一开始不获得学徒益处，然后升级为学徒（获得这些益处以及其职业对应的学徒调整），之后再升级至1级。

财宝

由于角色起始拥有50信用点，他们在升到1级之前的冒险所得应补足1级角色其余的起始资金。这意味着你应分配总价值为100信用点 × PC数量的财宝，其中很大一部分应当是信用点。

章节：子系统与变体规则Starfinder GM Core pg. 84

Before they were heroes, every PC came from somewhere, whether they poured coffee in a dusty, sun-scoured village like Chk Chk or performed in a busy spaceport like Dae. Sometimes, it can be a lot of fun to play a prequel game set years before the PCs' first adventure as heroes, or you might have an idea for a low-powered adventure. The rules below provide ways to build and use level 0 PCs.

Building Characters

Building a level 0 character is similar to building a 1st-level character, but you stop after choosing your ancestry and background. A level 0 character still gets the four free attribute boosts from Step 6 of the normal character creation process, but not the class attribute boost.

Initial Proficiencies

A level 0 character is trained in Perception, all saving throws, unarmed attacks, unarmored defense, and one simple weapon of their choice. Additionally, they're trained in a number of skills equal to 2 + their Intelligence modifier. The proficiency bonus for a level 0 character works the same way as normal, but since the level is 0, the total proficiency bonus for being trained is +2.

Hit Points

A level 0 character adds their Constitution modifier to their ancestry Hit Points to determine their starting Hit Points.

Starting Money

A level 0 character starts with 50 credits for equipment.

Apprentice Option

If the story you want to tell is about characters who have started training to become a particular class, you can grant them a small number of additional abilities. An apprentice character is trained in the skill or skills specified for their chosen class (such as Athletics and Intimidation for a soldier) in addition to the skills they gain through their initial proficiencies. They also gain benefits based on the class.

Solarian: An apprentice solarian gains a solar flare, solar nimbus, or solar weapon (but not all three). They can only select one trait for their solar weapon and don't gain attunement, so they don't gain the additional benefits of being attuned.

Other Martial Class: An apprentice of another martial class (envoy, operative, and soldier, for example) is trained in light armor, all simple weapons, and one martial weapon listed in the class's initial proficiencies. If a martial class not listed here lacks light armor or martial weapon training, give it a different ability as well.

Spellcaster: An apprentice spellcaster is trained in the appropriate magic tradition and gains two cantrips from their class. A prepared caster can't change these cantrips each day.

Gameplay

Combat can be especially dangerous for level 0 characters. For safety's sake, you might treat the characters as level –1 when determining what combat encounters are appropriate. For skill checks, they can still accomplish tasks with a simple trained DC using their trained skills, but success is less certain. Since they have fewer skills, the party might not have anyone trained for a given task. If you're playing these characters for more than a few sessions, consider advancing them to 1st level using the fast advancement speed (800 XP). If your group wants a longer experience at level 0, start the group without the apprentice benefits, then level up to apprentice (gaining those benefits and the apprentice adjustments for their class), and then level up to 1st level.

Treasure

As the characters start with 50 credits, their adventures up to 1st level should account for the rest of a 1st-level character's starting money. That means you'll distribute treasure worth 100 credits × the number of PCs, a large percentage of which should be in credits.

Section: Subsystem and Variant RulesStarfinder GM Core pg. 84

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.text:
你是操控影响力的大师。你凭借迷人的微笑、敏捷的机智，以及敏锐的自保意识，在物质宇宙中闯出自己的一片天地。你是一名能够激励队友的领袖，能推动他们突破极限，并帮助他们度过难关。你擅长让别人按你的意愿行事，但当局势急转直下时，你也总是准备好迎头面对麻烦。你可能是骗子、外交官、表演者或军官——也可能视情况需要，承担任何角色。

关键属性：魅力

在1级时，你的职业会为你的魅力提供一次属性增强。

生命值：8 + 体质调整值

在1级时，以及此后的每一级，你的最大HP都会增加此数值。

扮演特使

在战斗遭遇中……

你向盟友下达训令，赋予他们增益，并让你能够带头行动。你的言语与行动能够鼓舞盟友或扰乱敌人，而你的机敏足智则能帮助你和团队脱离险境。

在社交遭遇中……

你往往是团队的门面，无论你用的是外交辞令、谎言、威胁，还是任何能让你达成目的的话术。

在探索时……

你能够适应各种局势，并擅长激励团队克服障碍。

在停工期中……

你会寻找新的机会来打响自己的名号，在某个组织中步步高升，或建立属于自己的事业。

你可能会……

  • 渴望领导一家企业或军事组织，或担任一艘星舰的舰长。
  • 在意想不到的地方有朋友——也有敌人。
  • 寻找机会靠一张嘴避免打起来。

其他人多半会……

  • 喜欢你，或者至少尊重你。
  • 在处理复杂的社交场合时向你寻求帮助。
  • 觉得你喜欢发号施令。

初始熟练

在1级时，你在下列数据上获得所列的熟练等级。对于未列出的内容，除非你以其他方式获得了更高的熟练等级，否则你视为未受训。

察觉

察觉受训

豁免检定

强韧受训

反射专家

意志专家

技能

在以下技能中任选一项受训：欺瞒、外交、威吓

根据你的领袖风格，在一项技能上受训 此外，你还会在数量等于6加你的智力调整值的额外技能上受训

攻击

军用武器受训

徒手攻击受训

防御

轻甲受训

无甲防御受训

特使职业DC受训

职业特性

作为特使，你会获得以下能力。在更高等级获得的能力，会在特性名称旁标注你获得它的等级。

族裔与背景

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还拥有所选族裔和背景带来的好处。

属性增强

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还获得4次对不同属性调整值的自由增强。到5级时，以及此后每隔5级，你都会再获得4次对不同属性调整值的自由增强。如果某项属性调整值已经为+4或更高，则需要两次增强才能使其提高；你会先获得一次部分增强，必须在之后的等级再次增强该属性，才能使其提高1点。

特使专长

在1级时，以及此后每个偶数等级，你都会获得一个特使职业专长。

技能专长 2级

在2级时，以及此后每隔2级，你都会获得一个技能专长。技能专长具有技能特征。要选择某个技能专长，你必须在对应技能上达到受训或更高熟练。

技能提升 2级

你获得的技能提升比其他职业成员更多。自2级起，以及此后的每一级，你都会获得一次技能提升。你可以用这次提升让一项你未受训的技能变为受训，或让一项你已受训的技能变为专家。到7级时，你可以用技能提升让一项你已是专家的技能变为大师；到15级时，你可以用技能提升让一项你已是大师的技能变为传说。

适应性天赋 3级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.9nO9EkhE1TiS0Yh6 inline hr=false]

察觉专精 5级

你对细节有敏锐的眼光，并总能对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

武器专精 5级

你已经学会了几招武器技巧。你在简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击上的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你攻击你“狠狠干他们！”的目标时，你都可以使用所有你拥有专家熟练的武器的暴击专精效果。

强韧专精 7级

你的体魄异常强健。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

特使

幸运

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MZ65QZDqa9ignWXm inline hr=false]

You're a master influencer. You make your way in the universe with a charming smile, quick wit, and keen sense of self-preservation. You're a leader who motivates your teammates, pushes them past their limits, and helps them through tough spots. You excel at getting others to do what you want, but you're always ready to face trouble head-on when things take a turn for the worse. You might be a con artist, diplomat, performer, or military officer-or you might take on whatever role the situation demands.

Key Attribute : Charisma

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Charisma.

Hit Points : 8 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Envoy

During Combat Encounters...

You issue directives to your allies, granting benefits and letting you take the lead. Your words and deeds bolster your allies or harry your foes, and your cunning can get you and your team out of danger.

During Social Encounters...

You're often the face for your team, whether you use diplomacy, lies, threats, or whatever words it takes to get your way.

While Exploring...

You adapt to situations and excel at motivating your team to overcome obstacles.

In Downtime...

You look for new opportunities to make a name for yourself, work your way up through the ranks of an organization, or establish an enterprise of your own.

You Might...

  • Aspire to lead a business or military organization, or captain a starship.
  • Have friends-and enemies-in unexpected places.
  • Look for opportunities to talk your way out of fights.

Others Probably...

  • Like you, or at least respect you.
  • Ask for your help navigating complex social situations.
  • Assume you like being in charge.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain the listed proficiency ranks in the following statistics. You are untrained in anything not listed unless you gain a better proficiency rank in some other way.

Perception

Trained in Perception

Saving Throws

Trained in Fortitude

Expert in Reflex

Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in one of the following skills of your choice: Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation

Trained in one skill based on your leadership style Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 6 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons

Trained in martial weapons

Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor

Trained in unarmored defense

Class DC

Trained in envoy class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as an envoy. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Envoy Feats

At 1st level and every even-numbered level, you gain an envoy class feat.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

Skill Increases 2nd

You gain more skill increases than members of other classes. At 2nd level and every level thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase to either become trained in one skill you're untrained in or to become an expert in one skill in which you're already trained. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to become a master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to become legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Adaptive Talent 3rd

Perception Expertise 5th

You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Expertise 5th

You've learned a few tricks with your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you attack the target of your Get 'Em!, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Fortitude Expertise 7th

Your physique is incredibly hardy. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.text:
你是一条引导万物流转的通道，传导着连接并维系宇宙万物的根本力量。你可以汲取这股超自然源泉，与盟友建立深厚的精神纽带，在战斗中强化他们，并在他们受伤时恢复其健康。你的力量会依据你所选择的连接而呈现独特形态，随着你更深入地探索自身连接，还会获得新的、更加高阶的法术。

关键属性：感知

在1级时，你的职业会为你的感知提供一次属性强化。

生命值：6 + 体质调整值

在1级以及此后的每一级，你的最大HP都会增加这一数值。

扮演秘学者

在战斗遭遇中……

你施放强大的法术轰击敌人并强化盟友。你借助自己的活力网络来治疗与你共享纽带的盟友。

在社交遭遇中……

你的连接塑造了你看待世界的视角，以及你处理问题的方式。当已建立纽带的成员之间爆发分歧时，你往往是帮助他们把问题说开的人。

在探索时……

你会搜寻魔法的痕迹，并留意与你的连接相关的细节。

在停工期中……

你会反思自己的连接，以加深理解。你会与和你建立纽带的盟友共度时光，也许一起经营同一份副业、结伴徒步，或者在你最喜欢的视频游戏里组建一个公会。

你可能会……

  • 比任何人都更了解队伍里的其他成员。
  • 对你的连接本质有一些他人看来颇为离经叛道的见解。
  • 看到有关根本力量的奇异幻象。

其他人可能会……

  • 认为你是队伍的核心。
  • 把你们之间的纽带看作一个封闭小圈子，或者觉得你正试图招募他们。
  • 认为你是透过自身连接的视角来看待物质宇宙的。

初始熟练

在1级时，你在以下数据上获得所列的熟练等级。对于未列出的任何项目，你都视为未受训，除非你通过其他方式获得了更高的熟练等级。

察觉

察觉受训

豁免检定

强韧受训

反射受训

意志专家

技能

由你的连接决定的一项技能受训

额外若干技能受训，其数量等于3加你的智力调整值

攻击

简易武器受训

徒手攻击受训

防御

无甲防御受训

法术DC受训

职业DC

职业特性

作为秘学者，你获得以下能力。较高等级获得的能力会在特性名称旁标注你获得它们的等级。

秘学者成长

你的等级职业特性

2秘学者专长、技能专长

族裔与背景

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还拥有所选族裔和背景带来的好处。

属性强化

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还获得四次针对不同属性调整值的自由强化。在5级以及此后每5级，你都会再获得四次针对不同属性调整值的自由强化。如果某项属性调整值已经为+4或更高，则提升它需要两次强化；你会先获得一次部分强化，并且必须在之后的等级再次强化该属性，才能使其提高1点。

法术库

你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学会两个自选的1环法术和四个自选戏法，此外还会从你所选的连接中获得一个额外法术和一个额外戏法。你要从与你所选连接对应传统的常见法术中进行选择，或者从该传统中你有权限获得的其他法术中进行选择。你可以消耗适当法术环阶的法术位，施放法术库中的任意法术。随着等级提升，你会向法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位（见“秘学者每日法术”）时，你都会向法术库中加入一个同环阶的法术。当你获得新环阶法术的施放权限时，你获得的第一个新法术总是由你所选连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以自行选择。2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术，并获得另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你加入法术时，你可以选择某个自己已知法术的更高环阶版本，以便施放该法术的升阶版本。虽然二者以相同速率获得，但你的法术位与法术库中的法术是彼此独立的。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会因此额外给予你一个法术位；反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

随着你的法术库获得新法术，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每次你升级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

秘学者专长 2级

在2级以及此后每个偶数等级，你获得一个秘学者职业专长。

技能专长 2级

在2级以及此后每2级，你获得一个技能专长。技能专长具有技能特征。要选择某个技能专长，你在对应技能上必须至少为受训。

泛用专长 3级

在3级以及此后每4级，你获得一个泛用专长。

群聊 3级

技能提升 3级

在3级以及此后每2级，你获得一次技能提升。你可以用这次提升使一项你未受训的技能变为受训，或者将一项你已受训技能的熟练等级提升为专家。到7级时，你可以用技能提升将一项你已为专家的技能提升为大师；到15级时，你可以用其将一项你已为大师的技能提升为传奇。

族裔专长 5级

除了你初始拥有的族裔专长外，你会在5级以及此后每4级获得一个族裔专长。你可选的族裔专长列表见你的族裔条目。

强韧专精 5级

你的体魄在冒险中变得更加强健。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

专家施法者 7级

你与自己的连接建立了更强大的纽带。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

坚韧灵魂 9级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.2vTSmlYIttoIEwjh inline hr=false]

察觉专精 11级

你始终警惕周遭威胁。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

武器专精 11级

你以基础武器赢得战斗。你的简易武器和徒手攻击熟练等级提升为专家。

护甲专精 13级

你缔结的纽带如同超自然护甲一般保护着你。你的轻甲和无甲防御熟练等级提升为专家。

武器特化 13级

你已学会用武器保护自己和盟友。对于你熟练等级为专家的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加2点。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加至3点；如果你是传奇，则增加至4点。

大师施法者 15级

你通过自身连接引导魔法。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为大师。

传奇施法者 19级

魔法流经你的每一寸身躯。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为传奇。

完美和谐 19级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.99RXzaPifPIiZXv6 inline hr=false]

You're a conduit, channeling the fundamental forces that connect and bind everything in the cosmos. You can draw upon this supernatural wellspring to form deep spiritual bonds with your allies, empower them in combat, and restore their health should they become injured. Your powers take unique shape based on the connection you choose, granting new and more powerful spells as you explore your connection on a deeper level.

Key Attribute : Wisdom

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Wisdom.

Hit Points : 6 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Mystic

During Combat Encounters...

You cast powerful spells that blast enemies and empower allies. You heal allies you share a bond with by drawing on your vitality network.

During Social Encounters...

Your connection shapes your perspective on the world and the way you approach problems. When a disagreement erupts between bonded members, you're often the one to help them talk through their problems.

While Exploring...

You search for traces of magic and notice details relevant to your connection.

In Downtime...

You reflect on your connection to deepen your understanding. You spend time with your bonded allies, perhaps working on the same side hustle, going on a hike together, or forming a guild in your favorite vidgame.

You Might...

  • Know more about the other members of your party than anyone else.
  • Have insights into the nature of your connection that others find unorthodox.
  • Have strange visions about fundamental forces.

Others Probably...

  • Think of you as the heart of your party.
  • View your bond as a closed clique or think you're trying to recruit them.
  • Assume you view the universe through the lens of your connection.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain the listed proficiency ranks in the following statistics. You are untrained in anything not listed unless you gain a better proficiency rank in some other way.

Perception

Trained in Perception

Saving Throws

Trained in Fortitude

Trained in Reflex

Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in one skill determined by your connection

Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 3 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons

Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor

Trained in unarmored defense

Spells

Trained in spell attack modifier

Trained in spell DC

Class DC

Trained in mystic class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as a mystic. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Mystic Advancement

Your LevelClass Features

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Connection

Spell Repertoire

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank. You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot (see Mystic Spells per Day), you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell. Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Mystic Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every even-numbered level, you gain a mystic class feat.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

General Feats 3rd

At 3rd level and every 4 levels thereafter, you gain a general feat.

Reflex Expertise 3rd

Signature Spells 3rd

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ml5oxO1iIxQZYdw4 inline hr=false]

Skill Increases 3rd

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use an increase to either become trained in one skill you're untrained in or to increase your proficiency in one skill in which you're already trained to expert. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to become a master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to become legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Ancestry Feats 5th

In addition to the initial ancestry feat you started with, you gain an ancestry feat at 5th level and every 4 levels thereafter. The list of ancestry feats available to you can be found in your ancestry's entry.

Fortitude Expertise 5th

Your physique has grown hardier from your adventures. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Expert Spellcaster 7th

You've formed a more powerful bond with your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to expert.

Resilient Soul 9th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.2vTSmlYIttoIEwjh inline hr=false]

Perception Expertise 11th

You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Expertise 11th

You win battles with basic weapons. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Armor Expertise 13th

The bonds you've forged protect you like supernatural armor. Your proficiency rank in light armor and unarmored defense increases to expert.

Weapon Specialization 13th

You've learned to protect yourself and your allies with your weapons. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master and 4 if you're legendary.

Master Spellcaster 15th

You channel magic through your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to master.

Legendary Spellcaster 19th

Magic flows through your every pore. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to legendary.

Perfect Harmony 19th

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.text:
你是一名专注、机敏的专业人士，能在高风险的战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准能力和战术训练让你比竞争者更胜一筹——对你来说，即使是最强大的敌人，也不过是另一个要清除的目标。你在自己选择的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的造诣。

关键属性：敏捷

在1级时，你的职业会给予你一次敏捷属性提升

生命值：8 + 体质调整值

在1级时以及之后的每一级，你的最大HP都会增加该数值。

扮演特工

在战斗遭遇中……

你以战术性的精准进行攻击与机动——无论是在远处瞄准完美的爆头、进行徒手近身决斗，还是在近距离互相对射。到更高等级时，你会精通自己选择的武器，并对敌人降下经计算的毁灭。

在社交遭遇中……

你可能会依靠自己的训练，主动发言为盟友提供战略建议，同时警惕陌生人隐藏的意图；或者在自己熟悉的话题上担当主导。

在探索时……

你会占据战术位置，例如前锋或后卫，并扫描周遭环境，让自己的武器随时准备行动。

在停工期中……

你会训练自己的武器运用、获取并升级装备，并为未来的交战练习战术演练。

你可能会……

  • 曾在某个军事组织或佣兵团中受训，并且至今仍与其结盟，或曾从中叛逃。
  • 作为受雇枪手为出价最高者效力，只要信用点足够，任何工作都接。

其他人可能会……

  • 在战斗中依赖你的战略建议和火力支援，但也会因你对有条不紊的暴力所展现的天赋而感到不安。
  • 想雇佣你担任保镖或佣兵。

初始熟练

在1级时，你在以下属性中获得所列的熟练等级。除非你以其他方式获得更高的熟练等级，否则对未列出的任何内容你均为未受训。

察觉

察觉为专家

豁免检定

强韧为受训 反射为专家 意志为专家

技能

由你的专精决定的1项技能为受训 额外获得数量等于3 + 你的智力调整值的技能为受训

攻击

简易枪械为专家 军用枪械为专家 先进枪械为受训 简易武器为受训 军用武器为受训 徒手攻击为受训

防御

轻甲为受训 无甲防御为受训

职业DC

特工职业DC为受训

职业特性

作为特工，你会获得这些能力。较高等级获得的能力会在特性名称旁标注你获得它们的等级。

特工成长

你的等级职业特性

6特工专长、技能专长

8特工专长、技能专长
9族裔专长、强化技俩、特工韧性、技能提升

族裔与背景

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还会获得所选族裔和背景带来的益处。

属性提升

除了你在1级时从职业获得的内容外，你还会获得4次可自由分配给不同属性调整值的提升。在5级以及此后每隔5级时，你都会再获得4次可自由分配给不同属性调整值的提升。如果某项属性调整值已经为+4或更高，则需要两次提升才能提高它；你会先获得一次部分提升，并且必须在之后的等级再次提升该属性，才能使其增加1。

神枪手

你能看出目标的弱点，从而让你使用大多数类型的远程武器造成额外的精准伤害。你获得瞄准动作。

特工专长

在1级以及此后的每个偶数等级，你都会获得一个特工职业专长。

技能专长 2级

在2级以及此后的每2级，你都会获得一个技能专长。技能专长具有技能特征。你必须在对应技能上达到受训或更高熟练等级，才能选择技能专长。

技能提升 3级

在3级以及此后的每2级，你都会获得一次技能提升。你可以将这次提升用于以下两种用途之一：在一项你未受训的技能上变为受训，或在一项你已经受训的技能上变为专家。到7级时，你可以用技能提升让一项你已是专家的技能变为大师；到15级时，你可以用技能提升让一项你已是大师的技能变为传奇。

你已学会如何用自己最熟悉的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你具有专家熟练等级的武器和徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。如果你是大师，则该伤害增加为3点；如果你是传奇，则增加为4点。

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.PmRhyxeb5t4PZOiw inline hr=false]

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition-for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Key Attribute : Dexterity

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Dexterity

Hit Points : 8 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Operative

During Combat Encounters...

You attack and maneuver with tactical precision, whether you're lining up the perfect headshot from a distance, dueling hand-to-hand, or trading shots at close range. At higher levels, you master your weapons of choice and rain calculated destruction on foes.

During Social Encounters...

You might fall back on your training, speaking up to give strategic advice to your allies while remaining alert for strangers' hidden agendas or take the lead about a subject you know.

While Exploring...

You take a tactical position like point or rear guard and scan your surroundings, keeping your weapon ready for action.

In Downtime...

You train with your weapons, acquire and upgrade equipment, and practice tactical drills for future engagements.

You Might...

  • Have trained with a military organization or mercenary group that you remain allied with or have defected from.
  • Work as a gun for hire to the highest bidder, taking any job for enough credits.

Others Probably...

  • Rely on you for strategic advice and firepower in a fight but feel put off by your talent for methodical violence.
  • Want to hire you as a bodyguard or mercenary.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain the listed proficiency ranks in the following statistics. You are untrained in anything not listed unless you gain a better proficiency rank in some other way.

Perception

Expert in Perception

Saving Throws

Trained in Fortitude Expert in Reflex Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in one skill determined by your specialization Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 3 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Expert in simple guns Expert in martial guns Trained in advanced guns Trained in simple weapons Trained in martial weapons Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor Trained in unarmored defense

Class DC

Trained in operative class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as an operative. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Operative Advancement

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Sharpshooter

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the Aim action.

Operative Feats

At 1st level and every even-numbered level, you gain an operative class feat.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

Focused 3rd

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fkRGEE9raPLD8NpN inline hr=false]

General Feats 3rd

At 3rd level and every 4 levels thereafter, you gain a general feat.

Skill Increases 3rd

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase to either become trained in one skill you're untrained in or to become an expert in one skill in which you're already trained. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to become a master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to become legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Specialized Skill Set 3rd

Weapon Specialization 7th

Solarian.name: 星辉武者 Solarian
Solarian.text:
你是宇宙恒星之力的导体——一名太阳骑士。引力与光代表着这些力量的两个极端，而你可以在它们之间调谐自己。作为这一循环的代理者，你显现出一系列太阳装备，并利用自己与恒星之力的连接来强化它们。无论你偏好恒星光谱中的哪一极端，你都可以在它们之间改变自己的调谐状态，以利用通过冥想与练习获得的太阳力量。

关键属性：力量

在1级时，你的职业给予你一次力量属性增强。

生命值：10 + 体质调整值

在1级以及此后的每一级，你的生命值上限都增加此数值。

扮演星辉武者

在战斗遭遇中……

你冲入战局中心，以你的太阳显现发动攻击。你会根据当前的太阳调谐状态，在战场控制与沉重打击之间切换。

在社交遭遇中……

你偏好的太阳面向可能会影响你在社交圈中的表现。你可能是个轻易就能结交朋友的话痨，也可能是个运用自身能力胁迫他人的圆滑操纵者。

在探索时……

你很可能会待在队伍前方附近，以便迅速投入战斗。你利用自己的力量克服挑战，例如搬开瓦砾或攀爬奇异地形。

在停工期中……

你会在冥想与其他活动之间平衡自己的停工期。你可能会建立自己专门的追随者团体，以训练新一代的星辉武者；也可能利用自己炫目的星辉武者能力，作为劳工或表演者赚取信用点。

你可能会……

  • 根据你偏好的调谐状态，以谨慎态度面对障碍，或一头扎进问题之中。
  • 用自己恒星能力的巧妙运用令他人惊讶，完成别人未曾预料到、或根本不知道你能做到的事。
  • 不断冥想或进行影子对练，以臻于完善你的技巧。

其他人可能会……

  • 以为你会没完没了地谈论星辰与太空现象，让他们觉得无聊。
  • 喜欢看你战斗或展示自己的力量。
  • 认为你会是团队中理性发声的人。

初始熟练

在1级时，你获得若干熟练项，代表你的基础训练。这些熟练项列在本职业的开头。

察觉

察觉为专家

豁免检定

强韧受训 反射为专家 意志为专家

技能

运动受训 额外受训若干技能，其数量等于4加你的智力调整值

攻击

简易武器受训 军用武器受训 徒手攻击受训

防御

轻甲受训 中甲受训 无甲防御受训

职业DC

星辉武者职业DC受训

职业特性

作为星辉武者，你获得以下能力。较高等级获得的能力会在特性名称旁标注你获得该能力的等级。

星辉武者成长

你的等级职业特性
1族裔与背景、属性增强、初始熟练、恒星调谐、太阳显现、星辉武者专长
