@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.NU0g3Cmq8BSXneVA inline hr=false]

You're a conduit for the stellar forces of the cosmos-a solar knight. The powers of gravity and light represent the extremes of these forces, and you can attune yourself between them. As an agent of this cycle, you manifest an array of solar equipment and use your own connection to stellar forces to empower them. Regardless of which extreme of the stellar spectrum you prefer, you can change your attunement between them to take advantage of solar powers earned through meditation and practice.

Key Attribute : Strength

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Strength.

Hit Points : 10 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Solarian

During Combat Encounters...

You rush into the thick of things and attack with your solar manifestations. You shift between battlefield control and heavy attacks, depending on your current solar attunement.

During Social Encounters...

Which solar aspect you prefer might influence how you act in social circles. You might be a chatterbox who makes friends easily or a smooth manipulator who uses your abilities to coerce people.

While Exploring...

You likely stick near the front of the group to quickly get into the fight. You use your powers to overcome challenges, like moving debris or climbing strange terrain.

In Downtime...

You balance your downtime between meditation and other activities. You might create your own dedicated following to train a new generation of solarians or use your flashy solarian powers to earn credits as a laborer or performer.

You Might...

  • Approach obstacles with caution or throw yourself headfirst at problems depending upon which attunement you favor.
  • Surprise others with cunning uses of your stellar abilities, performing acts that others weren't expecting or didn't know you could do.
  • Meditate or shadow spar constantly to perfect your techniques.

Others Probably...

  • Expect you to bore them with constant talk of stars and cosmic phenomena.
  • Enjoy watching you fight or demonstrate your powers.
  • Think you'll be the voice of reason in a group.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain a number of proficiencies that represent your basic training. These proficiencies are noted at the start of this class.

Perception

Expert in Perception

Saving Throws

Trained in Fortitude Expert in Reflex Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in Athletics Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 4 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons Trained in martial weapons Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor Trained in medium armor Trained in unarmored defense

Class DC

Trained in solarian class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as a solarian. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Solarian Advancement

Your LevelClass Features
1Ancestry and background, attribute boosts, initial proficiencies, stellar attunement, solar manifestations, solarian feat

16Skill feat, solarian feat

20Attribute boosts, skill feat, solarian feat

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Stellar Attunement

Solarian Feats

At 1st level and every even-numbered level, you gain a solarian class feat.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

General Feats 3rd

At 3rd level and every 4 levels thereafter, you gain a general feat. General feats are listed in Chapter 5.

Skill Increases 3rd

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase either to increase your proficiency rank to trained in one skill you're untrained in, or to increase your proficiency rank in one skill in which you're already trained to expert. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to increase your proficiency rank to master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to increase your proficiency rank to legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.text:
你是范围武器、重甲以及承受伤害方面的大师。你在战场最激烈的地带作战，对敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射，同时承受反过来袭向你的猛烈火力。通过使用强力武器布下压制火力弹幕，你让盟友得以各司其职，同时促使敌人将注意力集中在你身上。

关键属性：体质

在1级时，你的职业使你的体质获得一次属性增强。

生命值：10 + 体质调整值

在1级以及此后的每一级，你的最大HP都会增加此数值。

扮演士兵

在战斗遭遇中……

你在战场上占据位置，用重型武器倾泻火力。敌人将你作为目标时，你无惧伤害，并保护你的战友免受其害。

在社交遭遇中……

你可能会退后一步，让别人来负责交谈，同时用你威慑十足的存在感提醒他人不要招惹你的盟友。有时，你也可能用富有洞见的见解让他人感到意外。

在探索时……

你位于队伍前方。你会让自己处于合适位置，以便对任何突然出现的伏击倾泻一整匣子弹，同时用身体为盟友阻挡敌人。

在停工期中……

当你需要信用点时，你可能会参军、从事体力劳动，或接雇佣兵的活。你很可能会花时间在健身房训练，或摆弄你的武器，并购买新的弹药和升级部件。

你可能会……

  • 在战斗中用你的重型武器吸引敌人的注意，享受战斗的挑战，同时替盟友承受攻击。
  • 向前猛冲，确信你的体格与耐力会让你撑到最后。

其他人多半会……

  • 依赖你带头冲锋并承受来袭火力。
  • 认为那一身装甲底下没多少个性或智慧可言。
  • 欣赏你在谈判桌上那种咄咄逼人的气场。

初始熟练

在1级时，你在下列属性上获得所列的熟练等级。对于任何未列出的项目，你都视为未受训，除非你以其他方式获得了更高的熟练等级。

察觉

察觉为受训

豁免检定

强韧为专家 反射为受训 意志为专家

技能

威吓为受训 额外获得若干技能为受训，其数量等于3 + 你的智力调整值

攻击

简易武器为受训 军用武器为受训 徒手攻击为受训

防御

所有护甲为受训 无甲防御为受训

职业DC

士兵职业DC为受训

职业特性

作为士兵，你获得以下能力。在更高等级获得的能力会在特性名称旁标注你获得它们的等级。

在3级以及此后每2级，你获得一次技能提升。你可以用这次提升将一项你未受训的技能熟练等级提升至受训，或者将一项你已受训的技能熟练等级提升至专家。到7级时，你可以用技能提升将一项你已是专家的技能熟练等级提升至大师；到15级时，你可以用它将一项你已是大师的技能熟练等级提升至传奇。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Key Attribute : Constitution

At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to Constitution.

Hit Points : 10 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Soldier

During Combat Encounters...

You set yourself up on the battlefield to rain down fire with heavy weapons. You defy damage and keep your comrades safe from foes as they target you.

During Social Encounters...

You might stand back and let others do the talking, using your menacing presence to remind others not to mess with your allies. Sometimes you might surprise others with an insightful take.

While Exploring...

You're at the front of the group. You position yourself so you can unload a magazine into any ambush that might pop up while body blocking for your allies.

In Downtime...

You might join a military, perform physical labor, or take mercenary jobs when you need credits. You likely spend time training at a gym or tinkering with your weapons and shopping for new ammunition and upgrades.

You Might...

  • Use your heavy weapons to demand enemy attention in combat, enjoying the challenge of battle while soaking attacks for your allies.
  • Rush forward, knowing that your bulk and endurance will see you through.

Others Probably...

  • Rely on you to lead the charge and take incoming fire.
  • Assume there's not much of a personality or intellect under all that armor.
  • Appreciate your menacing presence at the negotiating table.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level, you gain the listed proficiency ranks in the following statistics. You are untrained in anything not listed unless you gain a better proficiency rank in some other way.

Perception

Trained in Perception

Saving Throws

Expert in Fortitude Trained in Reflex Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in Intimidation Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 3 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons Trained in martial weapons Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in all armor Trained in unarmored defense

Class DC

Trained in soldier class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as a soldier. Abilities gained at higher levels list the level at which you gain them next to the features' names.

Soldier Advancement

Your LevelClass Features
1Ancestry and background, attribute boosts, initial proficiencies, suppressing fire, primary target, soldier fighting style, walking armory, soldier feat

16Skill feat, soldier feat
17Ancestry feat, legendary armor, skill increase
18Skill feat, soldier feat
19General feat, legendary soldier, skill increase
20Attribute boosts, skill feat, soldier feat

Ancestry and Background

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Suppressing Fire

Soldier Feats

At 1st level and every even-numbered level, you gain a soldier class feat.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

Fearsome Bulwark 3rd

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.wz7AMXiqMxMdULHs inline hr=false]

General Feats 3rd

At 3rd level and every 4 levels thereafter, you gain a general feat.

Reflex Expertise 3rd

You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Skill Increases 3rd

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase either to increase your proficiency rank to trained in one skill you're untrained in, or to increase your proficiency rank in one skill in which you're already trained to expert. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to increase your proficiency rank to master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to increase your proficiency rank to legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Ancestry Feats 5th

In addition to the initial ancestry feat you started with, you gain an ancestry feat at 5th level and every 4 levels thereafter. The list of ancestry feats available to you can be found in your ancestry's entry in Chapter 2.

Perception Expertise 5th

You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Soldier Weapon Expert 5th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.bqqCQKroiW9dGPzb inline hr=false]

Armor Expertise 7th

You have grown accustomed to wearing armor and can make the most of its protection. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to expert. You gain the armor specialization effects of medium and heavy armor.

Soldier Expertise 7th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EDPwZPU83FuSZ89r inline hr=false]

Tough as Nails 7th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ZwyuKa2N7QJdPUzN inline hr=false]

Weapon Specialization 7th

You inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Soldier's Resolution 11th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.iOGvwhx11XetNT9p inline hr=false]

Armor Mastery 13th

Your skill with armor further improves. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to master.

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.text:
一场奇异的悖论事件永远改变了你的存在，而你如今能够操纵现实。你探索多元宇宙的无限可能，也许会将变体时间线或平行世界具象化。你创造出颠覆时空的场域，让自己能够施展强大的魔法。你已经学会专注于一个锚定记忆、概念或物体，以帮助自己辨识现实。

关键属性：魅力

或智力 在1级时，你的职业会让你在魅力或智力中任选一项获得一次属性增强。

生命值：8 + 体质调整值

在1级以及此后的每一级，你的最大HP都会增加这一数值。

扮演巫战扭曲者

在战斗遭遇中……

你重塑地形并操纵事件，使其与其他现实相吻合。你施展强大的法术，并在被逼至极限时通过你的锚点让自己重新稳定下来。

在社交遭遇中……

你也许会通过演绎推理或判断数学概率来解决问题，借助你对多元宇宙的深厚知识。

在探索时……

你会搜寻魔法灵光，并在分析周遭环境时，就遇到的超自然现象提供指引。你也许会使用法术宝石来绕过障碍，并保护自己免受危险环境的伤害。

在停工期中……

你会为队伍制作魔法物品。作为训练的一部分，你也许会前往其他维度或遥远的恒星系旅行，或者意外踏上这样的旅程。

你可能会……

  • 前往遥远的目的地，并追寻秘密知识。
  • 努力让自己保持专注于当下，不被所有可能性分散注意力。
  • 记得一次与诡异力量相遇并改变了你的经历。

其他人可能会……

  • 害怕你的能力，或担心你的扭曲可能很危险。
  • 轻视你的预知能力，或怀疑你对当前现实的把握。
  • 希望你能通过改写现实来解决他们的问题。

初始熟练

在1级时，你获得若干项熟练，代表你的基础训练。这些熟练列在本职业的开头。

察觉

察觉受训

豁免检定

强韧受训 反射受训 意志专家

技能

一项由你的悖论决定的技能受训 额外受训的技能数量等于3 + 你的智力调整值

攻击

简易武器受训 徒手攻击受训

防御

轻甲受训 无甲防御受训

职业DC

巫战扭曲者职业DC受训

职业特性

作为巫战扭曲者，你获得以下能力。更高等级获得的能力会在名称旁标注等级。

巫战扭曲者成长

你的等级职业特性

族裔与背景

除职业在1级提供的能力外，你还获得所选族裔与背景带来的好处。

属性增强

除你在1级从职业获得的内容外，你还获得4次可自由分配给不同属性调整值的增强。在5级以及此后每5级时，你都会再获得4次可自由分配给不同属性调整值的增强。如果某项属性调整值已经为+4或更高，则需要两次增强才能提高它；你会先获得一次部分增强，并必须在之后的等级再次增强该属性，才能使其提高1点。

悖论

法术库

你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学会两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还会从你的悖论中额外获得一个法术和一个戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传统中的普通法术里进行选择。你可以使用适当法术环阶的法术位来施放法术库中的任意法术。随着等级提升，你会向法术库中加入更多法术。每当你获得一个法术位（见第167页“巫战扭曲者每日法术”），你就向法术库中加入一个同环阶的法术。在2级时，再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从悖论中获得一个新法术，以及另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，也可以添加你已拥有法术的高环版本，从而施放该法术的升阶版本。尽管你获得它们的速度相同，你的法术位与法术库中的法术彼此独立。如果某个专长或其他能力向你的法术库中添加了一个法术，它不会额外给予你一个法术位，反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

随着你在法术库中获得新法术，你可能会想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你升级并学会新法术时，你可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从悖论获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

技能专长 2级

在2级以及此后每个偶数等级时，你获得一个技能专长。技能专长具有技能特征。要选择某个技能专长，你必须在对应技能上达到受训或更高熟练。

巫战扭曲者专长 2级

在2级以及此后每个偶数等级时，你获得一个巫战扭曲者职业专长。

孤立法术矩阵 3级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.QslkWkHbHQEvWFCL inline hr=false]

ANCHORING

通用专长 3级

在3级以及此后每4级时，你获得一个通用专长。

招牌法术 3级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ml5oxO1iIxQZYdw4 inline hr=false]

技能提升 3级

在3级以及此后每2级时，你获得一次技能提升。你可以用这次提升让一项你未受训的技能熟练等级提升至受训，或让一项你已受训的技能熟练等级提升至专家。在7级时，你可以用技能提升将一项你已达专家的技能提升至大师；在15级时，你可以用它将一项你已达大师的技能提升至传奇。

族裔专长 5级

除你起始拥有的族裔专长外，你在5级以及此后每4级时获得一个族裔专长。你可选的族裔专长列表可在第2章你的族裔条目中找到。

反射专精 5级

凭借惊人的分析能力或对更广阔多元宇宙的理解，你对潜在危险的感知提高了你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至专家。

专家施法者 7级

长期的魔法练习提升了你的能力。你的职业DC、法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升至专家。

魔法强韧 9级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.YtysHqoszmqq7L2K inline hr=false]

察觉专精 11级

你始终对威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升至专家。

武器专精 11级

你对传统武器有了更广泛的理解，以补强你非常规的施法方式。你的简易武器和徒手攻击熟练等级提升至专家。

量子防御 13级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OTac5ufg6zuerW2U inline hr=false]

武器专精化 13级

你已学会如何用自己最擅长的武器造成更严重的创伤。对你达到专家熟练的武器和徒手攻击，你造成额外2点伤害。若你为大师，则该伤害增加为3点；若你为传奇，则增加为4点。

大师施法者 15级

你的法术在所有可能世界中都属最强之列。你的职业DC、法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升至大师。

量子意志 17级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5eGnpfSduO6QeFcZ inline hr=false]

传奇施法者 19级

你远远突破了魔法理论的边界，化身施法技艺的巅峰。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升至传奇。

量子论题 19级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.NgXjtkNTKUcaGk6s inline hr=false]

扭曲无限 19级

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.2BkdnQRLTNf16bb0 inline hr=false]

悖论

你的悖论代表某个永远改变了你的事件或力量。你所选择的悖论决定你的施法传统，并让你在所列出的悖论技能上获得受训熟练。你会如“法术库”特性所述，自动将悖论法术加入你的法术库。你在1级时获得初始扭曲法术，并可通过选择“进阶扭曲”和“强效扭曲”专长来获得先进（型）扭曲法术与高等扭曲法术。你的量子场获得所列的独特效果。

分析师

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6 inline hr=false]

锚点

你的锚点让你保持定向，提醒你何为真实，并帮助抵消引发悖论时可能经历的迷乱效果。你在1级时选择你的锚点。你的锚点会赋予你一项益处，以及一种锚定效果；当你维持你的量子场时，包括具有锚定特征的能力在内，都会触发这种锚定效果。

核心记忆

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT inline hr=false]

焦点

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE inline hr=false]

有形物件

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy inline hr=false]

A strange paradoxical event forever altered your existence, and now you can manipulate reality. You explore the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, possibly visualizing variant timelines or parallel worlds. You create fields that subvert space and time, allowing you to cast powerful magic. You've learned to focus on an anchoring memory, concept, or object to help you identify reality.

Key Attribute : Charisma

or Intelligence At 1st level, your class gives you an attribute boost to your choice of Charisma or Intelligence.

Hit Points : 8 + Constitution Modifier

You increase your maximum number of HP by this number at 1st level and every level thereafter.

Roleplaying the Witchwarper

During Combat Encounters...

You reshape terrain and manipulate events to match other realities. You cast powerful spells and recenter yourself through your anchor when pushed to your limits.

During Social Encounters...

You might solve problems with deductive reasoning or by determining mathematic probabilities, drawing on your deep knowledge of the multiverse.

While Exploring...

You seek magical auras and provide guidance regarding supernatural phenomena you encounter while analyzing the environment around you. You might use spell gems to bypass obstacles and protect yourself from dangerous environments.

In Downtime...

You craft magic items for your party. You might travel to other dimensions or distant star systems as part of your training or embark on such journeys by accident.

You Might...

  • Travel to distant destinations and hunt for secret knowledge.
  • Struggle to remain present without being distracted by all the possibilities.
  • Remember an encounter with bizarre forces that changed you.

Others Probably...

  • Fear your abilities or worry your warps might be dangerous.
  • Dismiss your precognition or doubt your grip on your current reality.
  • Hope you can solve their problems by rewriting reality.

Initial Proficiencies

At 1st level you gain a number of proficiencies that represent your basic training. These proficiencies are noted at the start of this class.

Perception

Trained in Perception

Saving Throws

Trained in Fortitude Trained in Reflex Expert in Will

Skills

Trained in one skill determined by your paradox Trained in a number of additional skills equal to 3 plus your Intelligence modifier

Attacks

Trained in simple weapons Trained in unarmed attacks

Defenses

Trained in light armor Trained in unarmored defense

Class DC

Trained in witchwarper class DC

Class Features

You gain these abilities as a witchwarper. Abilities gained at higher levels list the levels next to their names.

Witchwarper Advancement

Ancestry and Background

In addition to the abilities provided by your class at 1st level, you have the benefits of your selected ancestry and background.

Attribute Boosts

In addition to what you get from your class at 1st level, you have four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. At 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, you get four free boosts to different attribute modifiers. If an attribute modifier is already +4 or higher, it takes two boosts to increase it; you get a partial boost and must boost that attribute again at a later level to increase it by 1.

Spell Repertoire

The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank. You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot (see Witchwarper Spells per Day on page 167), you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell. Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Skill Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every even-numbered level thereafter, you gain a skill feat. Skill feats have the skill trait. You must be trained or better in the corresponding skill to select a skill feat.

Witchwarper Feats 2nd

At 2nd level and every even-numbered level thereafter, you gain a witchwarper class feat.

Skill Increases 3rd

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, you gain a skill increase. You can use this increase either to increase your proficiency rank to trained in one skill you're untrained in or to increase your proficiency rank in one skill in which you're already trained to expert. At 7th level, you can use skill increases to increase your proficiency rank to master in a skill in which you're already an expert, and at 15th level, you can use them to increase your proficiency rank to legendary in a skill in which you're already a master.

Ancestry Feats 5th

In addition to the ancestry feat you started with, you gain an ancestry feat at 5th level and every 4 levels thereafter. The list of ancestry feats available to you can be found in your ancestry's entry in Chapter 2.

Reflex Expertise 5th

Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Expert Spellcaster 7th

Extended practice of magic has improved your capabilities. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to expert.

Magical Fortitude 9th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.YtysHqoszmqq7L2K inline hr=false]

Perception Expertise 11th

You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Expertise 11th

You've gained a broader understanding of conventional weaponry to augment your unconventional spellcasting. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Quantum Defenses 13th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OTac5ufg6zuerW2U inline hr=false]

Weapon Specialization 13th

You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 damage if you're a master, and 4 damage if you're legendary.

Master Spellcaster 15th

Your spells are among the most potent across all possible worlds. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to master.

Quantum Will 17th

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5eGnpfSduO6QeFcZ inline hr=false]

Legendary Spellcaster 19th

You push way past the boundaries of magical theory to embody the pinnacle of spellcasting. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifier and spell DC increase to legendary.

Quantum Thesis 19th

Paradoxes

Your paradox represents an event or force that forever altered you. Your chosen paradox determines your spellcasting tradition and grants you trained proficiency in the listed paradox skill. You automatically add your paradox spells to your spell repertoire, as described in the spell repertoire feature. You gain the initial warp spell at 1st level and can gain the advanced and greater warp spells by selecting the Advanced Warp and Greater Warp feats. Your quantum field gains the listed unique effect.

Anchors

Your anchor keeps you centered, reminding you what's real, and helps counter the disorienting effects one might experience by causing paradoxes. You select your anchor at 1st level. Your anchor grants you a benefit and an anchoring effect that occurs when you Sustain your quantum field, including abilities with the anchoring trait.

Rules.name: 规则 Rules
Rules.text:
你可以通过选择原型专长来代替你的普通专长，从而获得一个原型。首先，找到最符合你角色概念的原型。然后，使用你的一次职业专长选择来选取该原型的献身专长。一旦你选了献身专长，只要满足其先决条件，你就可以选择该原型中的任何专长。大多数原型专长都是用来替代职业专长获得的，因此这些专长被称为原型职业专长。

原型专长要遵循它所替代的职业专长的一切限制。例如，如果你在6级时有一项能力给予你一个额外职业专长加值，但该职业专长必须为4级或以下且具有维斯克蜥人特征，你就可以用那个职业专长来选取一个原型职业专长，但也只能选取一个4级或以下且具有维斯克蜥人特征的原型职业专长。

来源：Starfinder Player Core 第174页

You gain an archetype by selecting archetype feats instead of your normal feats. First, find the archetype that best fits your character concept. Then select that archetype's dedication feat, using one of your class feat choices. Once you've taken the dedication feat, you can select any feat from that archetype, as long as you meet its prerequisites. Most archetype feats are taken in place of class feats, and so these are called archetype class feats.

An archetype feat is subject to any restrictions on the class feat it replaces. For example, if you had an ability at 6th level that granted you a bonus class feat, but that class feat had to be 4th level or lower and have the vesk trait, you could use that class feat to take an archetype class feat, but only one of 4th level or lower with the vesk trait.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Dedication Details.name: 入门细节 Dedication Details
Dedication Details.text:
每个原型的奉献专长都代表你的角色专注投入于学习一套新的能力，这使你无法分散重心并同时追求另一个原型。一旦你选取了一个奉献专长，在你通过从当前原型中再选取两个其他专长来完成你的奉献之前，你不能选择不同的奉献专长。只要你还拥有该原型的任何其他专长，你就不能重训该奉献专长。

来源：Starfinder Player Core，第 174 页

Each archetype's dedication feat represents your character's dedicated effort learning a new set of abilities, making it impossible to split your focus and pursue another archetype at the same time. Once you take a dedication feat, you can't select a different dedication feat until you complete your dedication by taking two other feats from your current archetype. You can't retrain a dedication feat as long as you have any other feats from that archetype.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Additional Feats.name: 补充专长 Additional Feats
Additional Feats.text:
某些原型包含一份出自其他资料来源的“额外专长”列表。该列表列出了每个专长的等级；当你通过该原型获得这些专长时，其等级可能与通常情况不同。你可以将该专长作为该等级的原型专长来选取，这意味着它会计入该原型献身专长所要求的专长数量。当以这种方式选择时，原本通常具有某个职业特征的专长（例如士兵特征）将不具有该职业特征。

来源：Starfinder Player Core 第174页

Some archetypes include a list of "Additional Feats" that appear in other sources. The list includes each feat's level, which might be different than normal when gained from the archetype. You can take the feat as an archetype feat of that level, meaning it counts toward the number of feats required by the archetype's dedication feat. When selected this way, a feat that normally has a class's trait (such as the soldier trait) doesn't have that class trait.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Feats that Grant Feats.name: 赋予专长的专长 Feats that Grant Feats
Feats that Grant Feats.text:
有时，某个原型专长会让你选择另一个专长，例如一个较低等级的职业专长。你必须始终满足你以这种方式获得的专长的所有前提条件。就你的献身而言，这些始终只算作一个专长；例如，选取特使原型的“基础领导力”专长来获得“别死在我面前！”职业专长时，只算作一个专长，而不是两个。

来源：Starfinder Player Core 第174页

Sometimes an archetype feat lets you select another feat, such as a class feat of a lower level. You must always meet any prerequisites of the feat you gain in this way. These always count as only one feat for the purposes of your dedication; for example, taking the envoy archetype's Basic Leadership feat to gain the Don't You Die On Me! class feat counts as only one feat, not two.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Spellcasting Archetypes.name: 施法变体 Spellcasting Archetypes
Spellcasting Archetypes.text:
有些原型会赋予你相当程度的施法能力，尽管与施法职业的角色相比会有所延后。来自施法原型的施法能力也允许你使用物品的“施放法术”启动方式（例如法术芯片和法术宝石）。

施法原型总会在其奉献专长中赋予你施放戏法的能力，之后还会有一个基础施法专长、一个专家施法专长，以及一个大师施法专长。这些专长与该原型共享名称；例如，巫战扭曲者的大师施法专长名为“大师巫战扭曲者施法”。你从施法原型获得的所有法术位都受该原型内限制的约束。例如，秘学者原型允许你在选取其奉献专长时选择一个连接。如果你选择了一个赋予神圣法术的连接，那么该原型随后赋予你的法术位就只能用于施放你作为秘学者准备的神圣法术，即使你是一名法术库中拥有神秘法术的巫战扭曲者也是如此。

基础施法专长

这些专长通常可在4级时获得，并赋予你一个1环法术位。到6级时，它们会赋予你一个2环法术位；如果你拥有法术库，你还可以从法术库中选择一个法术作为招牌法术。到8级时，它们会赋予你一个3环法术位。原型将这些收益称为“基础施法收益”。

专家施法专长

这些专长通常在12级时选取，使你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC上达到专家熟练度，并赋予你一个4环法术位。如果你拥有法术库，你可以从法术库中选择第二个法术作为招牌法术。到14级时，它们会赋予你一个5环法术位；到16级时，它们会赋予你一个6环法术位。原型将这些收益称为“专家施法收益”。

大师施法专长

这些专长通常出现在18级时，使你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC上达到大师熟练度，并赋予你一个7环法术位。如果你拥有法术库，你可以从法术库中选择第三个法术作为招牌法术。到20级时，它们会赋予你一个8环法术位。原型将这些收益称为“大师施法收益”。

来源：《星际探险者玩家核心》 第174页

Some archetypes grant you a substantial degree of spellcasting, albeit delayed compared to a character from a spellcasting class. The spellcasting ability from a spellcasting archetype also allows you to use Cast a Spell activations of items (such as spell chips and spell gems).

Spellcasting archetypes always grant the ability to cast cantrips in their dedication, and then they have a basic spellcasting feat, an expert spellcasting feat, and a master spellcasting feat. These feats share their name with the archetype; for instance, the witchwarper's master spellcasting feat is called Master Witchwarper Spellcasting. All spell slots you gain from spellcasting archetypes are subject to the restrictions within the archetype. For instance, the mystic archetype allows you to pick a connection when you take its dedication feat. If you pick a connection granting divine spells, the archetype then grants you spell slots you can use only to cast divine spells you prepare as a mystic, even if you are a witchwarper with occult spells in your repertoire.

Basic Spellcasting Feat

Usually available at 4th level, these feats grant a 1st-rank spell slot. At 6th level, they grant you a 2nd-rank spell slot, and if you have a spell repertoire, you can select one spell from your repertoire as a signature spell. At 8th level, they grant you a 3rd-rank spell slot. Archetypes refer to these benefits as the "basic spellcasting benefits."

Expert Spellcasting Feat

Typically taken at 12th level, these feats make you an expert in spell attack modifiers and spell DCs and grant you a 4th-rank spell slot. If you have a spell repertoire, you can select a second spell from your repertoire as a signature spell. At 14th level, they grant you a 5th-rank spell slot, and at 16th level, they grant you a 6th-rank spell slot. Archetypes refer to these benefits as the "expert spellcasting benefits."

Master Spellcasting Feat

Usually found at 18th level, these feats make you a master in spell attack modifiers and spell DCs and grant you a 7th-rank spell slot. If you have a spell repertoire, you can select a third spell from your repertoire as a signature spell. At 20th level, they grant you an 8th-rank spell slot. Archetypes refer to these benefits as the "master spellcasting benefits."

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Special Archetypes.name: 特殊变体 Special Archetypes
Special Archetypes.text:
其他书籍中的一些原型专长具有技能特征，这使你可以将它们作为技能专长而非职业专长来选取。技能专长仍然计入满足献身专长的要求。还有一些职业原型，能在1级时就修改你职业的能力。你永远不能拥有超过一个职业原型。

来源：Starfinder Player Core 第174页

Some archetype feats in other books have the skill trait, allowing you to take them in place of a skill feat rather than a class feat. A skill feat still counts to satisfy the requirement of the dedication. There are also class archetypes that can modify your class's abilities as soon as 1st level. You can never have more than one class archetype.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Multiclass Dedications.name: 多职专精奉献 Multiclass Dedications
Multiclass Dedications.text:
这些让你能够将自己的训练拓展到另一职业的专长领域。若你已经是该职业的成员，则不能选择多职业原型的献身专长。

来源：Starfinder Player Core 第174页

These allow you to diversify your training into another class's specialties. You can't select a multiclass archetype's dedication feat if you are already a member of that class.

Source: Starfinder Player Core pg. 174

Envoy.name: 特使 Envoy
Envoy.text:
你挺身而出，带领他人走向胜利，同时操纵那些挡在你面前的人。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wUqOzEWcNX9ohLE2]{特使献身} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 献身

先决条件 魅力 +2

你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.f9dNcZi9kzbaGl8M]{特使训令}职业特性，但不会获得“Get 'Em!”特使训令的“以身作则”收益。你在欺瞒、外交或威吓中选择一项，成为受训，外加另一项由你选择的技能。如果你已经在欺瞒、外交和威吓上全部受训，则你改为在另一项由你选择的额外技能上成为受训。你还会在特使职业DC上成为受训。

来源：Starfinder Player Core

You step up and lead others to victory while manipulating those who stand in your way.

You become trained in Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation plus another skill of your choice. If you were already trained in Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation, you instead become trained in an additional skill of your choice. You also become trained in envoy class DC.

Mystic.name: 秘学者 Mystic
Mystic.text:
你引导物质宇宙的一种根本力量。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.7kCWmCSwlKQqQkLh]{秘学者奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献
  • 多职业

先决条件 感知 +2

选择一个 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.68j2yQ0lamRuR6oF]{连接}。你在该连接的技能上成为受训；或者，如果你已经受训，则改为在你自选的一项技能上成为受训。你不会从所选连接中获得任何其他能力。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvyqzqiWsIrBZt6h]{秘学纽带}职业特性。

你像秘学者一样施放法术，并获得施放法术活动。你获得一个法术 repertory，其中包含两个来自你的连接所授予法术列表的普通戏法、来自你的连接授予的法术中的戏法，或任何你学会或发现的该传承的其他戏法。你在法术攻击调整值和法术 DC 数据上成为受训。你用于秘学者原型法术的关键施法属性为感知，且这些法术是你连接传承的秘学者法术。

  • archetype
  • dedication

Prerequisites Wisdom +2

Choose a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.68j2yQ0lamRuR6oF]{Connection}. You become trained in the connection's skill or, if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of connection. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvyqzqiWsIrBZt6h]{Mystic Bond} class feature.

You cast spells like a mystic and gain the Cast a Spell activity. You gain a spell repertoire with two common cantrips from the spell list granted by your connection, from the spells granted by your connection, or any other cantrips of that tradition you learn or discover. You're trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics. Your key spellcasting attribute for mystic archetype spells is Wisdom, and they are mystic spells of your connection's tradition.

Solarian.text:
你是一名调谐于强大重力与光之力的太阳骑士，将太空循环显化为由恒星能量构成的武装。

你可以显化一把太阳武器。你的武器具有调谐和星辉武者特征，但你不能选择额外特征，且它不会基于你的调谐获得任何增益。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸太阳武器}动作。

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.text:
你是一面坚定不移的护盾，在保护盟友免受危险侵害的同时，从不停下轰击的火力——甚至也包括防范你自己那骇人的毁灭之力。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.5U1q1pLm3eBIHCXl]{士兵奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献
  • 多职业

先决条件 体质 +2

你成为受训于威吓。若你已经受训于威吓，则改为受训于一个你自选的技能。你的最大负重值和负重值上限都增加 2。你成为受训于士兵职业DC。

你成为受训于轻甲和中甲。若你已经受训于轻甲和中甲，你还会获得重甲的受训。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在任一种护甲上的熟练等级提升为专家或更高（但不包括无甲防御）时，你在此专长授予你的护甲类型上也获得该熟练等级。若你拥有一项职业特性，使你在无甲防御上的熟练等级提升为专家，且你的等级为 13 级或更高，你在此专长授予你的护甲类型上也提升为专家。

来源：Starfinder Player Core

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.5U1q1pLm3eBIHCXl]{Soldier Dedication} Feat 2

  • archetype
  • dedication
  • multiclass

Prerequisites Constitution +2

You become trained in Intimidation. If you were already trained in Intimidation, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. Increase your maximum and encumbered Bulk limits by 2. You become trained in soldier class DC.

You become trained in light armor and medium armor. If you already were trained in light armor and medium armor, you gain training in heavy armor as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in any type of armor (but not unarmored defense), you also gain that proficiency in the armor types granted to you by this feat. If you have a class feature that grants you expert proficiency in unarmored defense and you're 13th level or higher, you also become an expert in the armor types granted to you by this feat.

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.text:
你可以借用其他宇宙与时间线的无限可能性，以强大的魔法扭曲现实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P8nPDOlSIiKnkQAy]{巫战扭曲者奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献
  • 兼职

先决条件 智力 +2

选择一个悖论。你在该悖论的技能上变为受训；如果你已经受训，则改为在你自选的一项技能上变为受训。你获得“扭曲现实”动作，但你的量子场为 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]。

你像巫战扭曲者一样施放法术。你获得“施放法术”活动的使用权限。你获得一个法术 repertory，其中包含两个来自与你的悖论相关联的法术列表、由你的悖论授予的法术，或你学习或发现的该传统的任何其他戏法中的常见戏法。你在法术攻击调整值和法术DC统计上变为受训。你用于巫战扭曲者原型法术的关键施法属性为智力，且这些法术属于你悖论传统的巫战扭曲者法术。你不会因所选悖论而获得任何其他能力。

来源：Starfinder Player Core

You can draw on the infinite possibilities of other universes and timelines to warp reality with powerful magic.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P8nPDOlSIiKnkQAy]{Witchwarper Dedication} Feat 2

  • archetype
  • dedication
  • multiclass

Prerequisites Intelligence +2

Choose a paradox. You become trained in the paradox's skill or, if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the Warp Reality action, but your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:10].

You cast spells like a witchwarper. You gain access to the Cast a Spell activity. You gain a spell repertoire with two common cantrips from the spell list associated with your paradox, from the spells granted by your paradox, or any other cantrips of that tradition you learn or discover. You're trained in the spell attack modifier and spell DC statistics. Your key spellcasting attribute for witchwarper archetype spells is Intelligence, and they are witchwarper spells of your paradox's tradition. You don't gain any other abilities from your choice of paradox.

Source: Starfinder Player Core

Abadarcorp Rep.name: 阿巴达尔集团代表 Abadarcorp Rep
Abadarcorp Rep.text:
有些企业工作会让阿巴达尔集团员工走出会议室。愿意承担高风险的代表往往会被快速提拔到报酬丰厚的职位，并被派去令人艳羡的豪华商务旅行。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.MRfRe8pL4rzDrXRE]{阿巴达尔集团代表奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献

先决条件 受训于欺瞒、外交或社群

你已将你所在企业的文化与策略内化于心，并且熟悉一般商业惯例。你获得用于商业知识或企业知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长。

当进行与工作相关主题的回忆知识检定时，例如你公司买卖的商品、你开展业务的个人或聚居地，或行业法律，你可以使用商业知识或企业知识来代替任何其他技能。

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

Hellknight.name: 地狱骑士 Hellknight
Hellknight.text:
地狱骑士是受恶魔誓约与邪恶护甲约束的冷酷战士。未获军阶的新兵若能通过严酷的地狱骑士试炼，便会被引入《准则》与《锁链》之道。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.filmD2J3y8UoVQIh]{地狱骑士奉献} 专长 6

  • 原型
  • 奉献

先决条件 地狱骑士团成员，通过地狱骑士试炼

你那炼狱般的威容令人闻风丧胆。你的威吓熟练等级提升为专家（若你在威吓上已是专家，则改为你自选一项你已受训的其他技能提升为专家）。你获得轻甲和中甲的受训熟练。若你已经受训轻甲和中甲，你还会获得重甲的受训熟练。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在任一种护甲上的熟练等级提升为专家或更高（但不包括无甲防御）时，你在此专长赋予你的护甲类型上也会获得相同的熟练等级。你获得该护甲的护甲专精效果，以及1个额外的护甲升级。该护甲专精提供的抗性（或对重击的减伤）比正常高1，且你获得等于1 + 你的护甲韧性值的物品加值，应用于威吓检定。

地狱骑士团

地狱骑士团典范炼狱伤害与抗性
锁链骑士团惩戒违法者电击
熔炉骑士团考验文明寒冷
日蚀骑士团管控危险信息虚空
焚烧骑士团以火清除煽动性媒体火焰

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

Hellknights are ruthless warriors bound by diabolic oaths and wicked armor. Unranked conscripts who survive the grueling Hellknight Test are initiated into the Measure and the Chain.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.filmD2J3y8UoVQIh]{Hellknight Dedication} Feat 6

  • archetype
  • dedication

Prerequisites member of a Hellknight Order, passed the Hellknight Test

Your infernal countenance is a scourge. You gain expert proficiency in Intimidation (or in another skill in which you're trained of your choice if you were already an expert in Intimidation). You become trained in light armor and medium armor. If you already were trained in light armor and medium armor, you gain training in heavy armor as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in any type of armor (but not unarmored defense), you also gain that proficiency in the armor types granted to you by this feat. You gain the armor specialization effects of that armor and one additional armor upgrade. Your resistance (or reduction from critical hits) from that armor's specialization is 1 higher than normal and you gain an item bonus to Intimidation checks equal to 1 + your armor's resilience value.

Hellknight Orders

Hellknight OrderEdictsInfernal Damage and Resistance
Order of the Chainpunish lawbreakerselectricity
Order of the Crucibletest civilizationscold
Order of the Eclipsecontrol dangerous informationvoid
Order of the Pyrepurge subversive media with firefire

Source: Starfinder Galaxy Guide

Knights of Golarion.name: 格拉利昂骑士 Knights of Golarion
Knights of Golarion.text:
一位戈拉里昂骑士将其一生奉献给正义、荣誉，以及保存失落戈拉里昂的诸文化。尽管并非所有成员都崇拜艾奥梅黛，但所有人都恪守她的价值观，并在行动中践行这些理念。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Z0lKny0VVq0zf3UY]{戈拉里昂骑士奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献

先决条件 力量 +2

你熟悉剑类武器组中的所有武器。为了判定熟练度，将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，将任何先进武器视为军用武器。如果你至少拥有专家熟练度，你获得该武器的重击专精效果。你研究过失落戈拉里昂的古代文化。你在以下两项中成为受训，且这两项必须是你原本尚未受训的：戈拉里昂学识、艾奥梅黛学识，或与失落戈拉里昂的某个族裔或文化相关的一项学识技能，例如地精、半身人、人类或兽人。

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

A Knight of Golarion devotes their life to justice, honor, and the preservation of lost Golarion's cultures. While not all members worship Iomedae, all uphold her values and practice them in their actions.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Z0lKny0VVq0zf3UY]{Knight of Golarion Dedication} Feat 2

  • archetype
  • dedication

Prerequisites Strength +2

You have familiarity with all weapons in the sword weapon group. For the purposes of proficiency, treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons. If you are at least expert, you gain that weapon's critical specialization effect. You've studied lost Golarion's ancient cultures. You become trained in two of the following that you were not already trained in: Golarion Lore, Iomedae Lore, or a Lore skill associated with an ancestry or culture from Lost Golarion, such as Goblin, Halfling, Human, or Orc.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.8aGoy6Jaw4pDFZyN]{太空海盗奉献} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 奉献

先决条件 受训于威吓

作为一名追逐掠夺的太空航行者，你的驾驶变为受训；如果你已经受训，则改为专家。你熟悉所有弯刀、连枷、细剑，以及具有拆毁特征的武器。以熟练项为目的时，将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，将任何先进武器视为军用武器。如果你至少具有专家熟练项，则你获得该武器的重击专精效果。

此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8zWFGKRXg1SxIwFH]{全息骷髅旗} 动作。

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

Additional Feats: 4th @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.ulDDuZsHQsqHKEmj]{Menacing Laughter}; 6th @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.QvOGVk20XzN3xDSQ]{Twin Draw}; 10th @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Wavi0q21NJNXkA6F]{Opening Volley}

As a plunder-seeking spacefarer, you become trained in Piloting, or become an expert in it if you were already trained. You have familiarity with all cutlasses, flails, rapiers, and weapons with the razing trait. For the purposes of proficiency, treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons. If you are at least expert, you gain that weapon's critical specialization effect.

Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8zWFGKRXg1SxIwFH]{Holo-Roger} action.

Starfinder Field Agent.name: 《星际探险家》外勤特工 Starfinder Field Agent
Starfinder Field Agent.text:
你是寻星者协会训练有素的特工。寻星者协会是一个由冒险者、学者和异种考古学家组成的团体，在银河各处寻求知识、宝藏与秘密。

额外专长：4级 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.FnAzJ4DIRPJJaGv7]{危险感知}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.kWOLT8dsYXWwmk2l]{寻星者战地特工献身} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 献身

先决条件 寻星者协会成员，受训于社群

你是寻星者协会训练有素的特工。你的社群熟练等级提升为专家。你获得用于寻星者知识的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外知识} 专长；如果你已经受训于寻星者知识，你还会额外受训于一项自选的知识技能。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.i5OwninARF668ud8]{异种考古学家献身} 专长，即使你尚未习得两个额外的异种考古学家专长，你也可以选择此专长。为了完成这些原型，异种考古学家原型专长视为寻星者战地特工专长，反之亦然。

来源：Starfinder Player Core

Xenoarchaeologist.name: 异星考古学家 Xenoarchaeologist
Xenoarchaeologist.text:
你渴望揭开过去的秘密。在探险途中，你依靠自己的机智、训练，以及相当程度的好运，只为活着见到下一次探险！

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.i5OwninARF668ud8]{异种考古学家献身} 专长 2

  • 原型
  • 献身

前提条件 社群、巧手，以及奥秘、自然、神秘学或宗教中的任意一项达到受训

你的社群和巧手熟练等级提升为专家，并且当你将调查作为你的探索活动时，进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定和深探学识检定时，获得+1处境加值。

你获得关于深探学识的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识}通用专长。你可以用它来对具有考古意义的地点，以及古代历史、遗物、语言和民族进行回忆知识。获得该技能时，为你的深探学识检定选择智力或感知作为关键属性。此选择为永久，之后不能更改。

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

Prerequisites trained in Society, Thievery, and your choice of Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion

You become an expert in Society and Thievery and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks and Delve Lore checks when using Investigate as your exploration activity.

You gain the@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{ Additional Lore} general feat in Delve Lore, which you can use to Recall Knowledge about sites of archaeological significance, and about ancient history, relics, languages, and peoples. Upon gaining this skill, choose either Intelligence or Wisdom as the key attribute for your Delve Lore checks. This choice is permanent and can't be changed later.

Xenodruid.name: 异种德鲁伊 Xenodruid
Xenodruid.text:
你已经学会与生命体演化并繁盛的行星那浩瀚而充满生机的力量建立联系。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.UTA9Fk6V6tPFkMdj]{异星德鲁伊奉献} 专长 4

  • 罕见
  • 原型
  • 奉献

先决条件 秘学者纽带职业特性、可从原始法术列表中选择法术的施法者职业特性、受训于自然

你可以与一个世界诸生态系统的集体灵魂建立纽带。这是一项持续 10 分钟的活动，包含与自然交流和冥想。该行星必须拥有活跃的生物圈。你同一时间只能与一颗行星建立纽带。这会计入你的纽带数量上限。为了法术、先决条件或其他能力（包括你的生命力网络）的用途，行星不视为生物或盟友。

你在回忆关于你的行星上的生命与自然现象的知识时，获得 +1 情境加值。你在其荒野中维生的求生检定上也获得 +1 情境加值，并且对你所建立纽带的行星上自然存在的环境危害与效果进行豁免检定时，获得 +1 情境加值。离开该世界时，你总是知道你的行星相对于你的大致方向（但不知道距离），这使你进行导航的驾驶检定获得 +1 情境加值。

此外，你每天可以一次评估你的行星的健康状况，并尝试定位其生态系统中的任何重大扰动。在与你的行星接触时，尝试一次 @Check[nature|dc:20] 检定。

大成功 你通过其各个生态圈诊断该行星的健康状况。此外，你可以侦测自然世界中正在发生的具体扰动——例如工业采矿，或某个特定山谷中的火灾。你能感知该扰动的距离与方向，并且对由该扰动造成的危害进行豁免检定时获得 +1 情境加值。

成功 如同大成功，但你只能感知发生在巨大尺度上的扰动（例如飓风、火山爆发或遍及整颗行星的污染）以及它的方向。

失败 你诊断出该行星的健康状况，但未能识别任何扰动。

特殊 如果你拥有秘学者兼职原型的奉献专长，即使你尚未再获得两个秘学者专长，你也可以选择此专长。为了完成原型的目的，秘学者原型专长视为异星德鲁伊专长，反之亦然。

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

  • primal

@Embed[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.kPndV25wPdTvTriq inline]

来源：Starfinder Galaxy Guide

You've learned to connect with the immense, vital power of planets where lifeforms evolved and flourished.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.UTA9Fk6V6tPFkMdj]{Xenodruid Dedication} Feat 4

  • Uncommon
  • archetype
  • dedication

Prerequisites mystic bond class feature, spellcaster class feature that chooses spells from the primal spell list, trained in Nature

You can form a bond with the collective spirit of a world's ecosystems. This is a 10-minute activity that involves communing with nature and meditation. The planet must have an active biosphere. You can only bond with one planet at a time. This counts toward your maximum number of bonds. Planets don't count as creatures nor allies for the purposes of spells, prerequisites, or other abilities, including your vitality network.

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge about your planet's life and natural occurrences. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Survival checks to subsist in its wilds and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against environmental hazards and effects naturally found on your bonded planet. When off-world, you always know the general direction your planet lies in relation to you (but not distance), which grants a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks to navigate.

In addition, you can assess the health of your planet once per day and attempt to locate any major disturbances to its ecosystems. Attempt a @Check[nature|dc:20] check while in contact with your planet.

Critical Success You diagnose the planet's health through its various ecospheres. In addition, you can detect specific ongoing disturbances to the natural world—such as industrial mining or a fire in a particular valley. You can sense the distance and direction of the disturbance and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against hazards created by this disturbance.

Success As a critical success, but you can only sense disturbances happening on a massive scale (such as hurricanes, volcanic eruptions, or planetwide pollution) and the direction to it.

Failure You diagnose the planet's health but don't identify any disturbances.

Special You can take this feat if you have the mystic multiclass archetype dedication feat even if you haven't taken two additional mystic feats. Mystic archetype feats count as xenodruid feats, and vice-versa, for purposes of completing the archetypes.

Source: Starfinder Galaxy Guide
